items.title: Fortran performance optimisation and auto-parallelisation by leveraging MLIR-based domain specific abstractions in Flang.
items.abstract: MLIR has become popular since it was open sourced in 2019. A sub-project of LLVM, the flexibility provided by MLIR to represent Intermediate Representations (IR) as dialects at different abstraction levels, to mix these, and to leverage transformations between dialects provides opportunities for automated program optimisation and parallelisation. In addition to general purpose compilers built upon MLIR, domain specific abstractions have also been developed.
items.abstract_zh: MLIR 自 2019 年开源以来一直很受欢迎。作为 LLVM 的子项目，MLIR 提供的灵活性可将中间表示 (IR) 表示为不同抽象级别的方言、混合这些以及利用方言之间的转换，为自动化程序优化和并行化提供了机会。除了基于 MLIR 构建的通用编译器之外，还开发了特定领域的抽象。

items.title: Is RISC-V ready for HPC prime-time: Evaluating the 64-core Sophon SG2042 RISC-V CPU.
items.abstract: The Sophon SG2042 is the world’s first commodity 64-core RISC-V CPU for high performance workloads and an important question is whether the SG2042 has the potential to encourage the HPC community to embrace RISC-V.
items.abstract_zh: Sophon SG2042 是全球首款用于高性能工作负载的商用 64 核 RISC-V CPU，一个重要的问题是 SG2042 是否有潜力鼓励 HPC 社区采用 RISC-V。

items.title: Evaluating the Performance of One-sided Communication on CPUs and GPUs.
items.abstract: Effective programming models offer programmers the ability to harness the capabilities of the underlying platform. For decades, the two-sided Message Passing Interface (MPI) has become a de facto standard for communication among processes running on distributed memory systems. As high-performance GPU computing becomes the trend, GPU-initiated one-sided communication becomes a viable solution for multi-GPU scaling. It also highlights the use of one-sided communication on CPUs. However, the lack of deep understanding of one-sided communication performance and its impact on an application’s performance becomes a hurdle. In this paper, we overcome this hurdle by proposing a Message Roofline model, which characterizes an application’s sustained messaging performance (GB/s) as a function of its message size, number of messages per synchronization, peak network bandwidth, and network latency. We use three benchmarks to demonstrate the potentials of one-sided communication on CPUs and GPUs. These benchmarks include Stencils representing applications that follow the bulk synchronization programming model, Sparse Triangular Solve representing directed acyclic graph computations that perform asynchronous point-to-point communications, and Distributed HashTable performing atomic compare and swaps. Our evaluation provides insights into practically understanding the two-sided and one-sided communications in MPI applications, and can also guide hardware vendors with design principles lest the potential performance of one-sided communications being under-utilized.
items.abstract_zh: 有效的编程模型使程序员能够利用底层平台的功能。几十年来，双向消息传递接口 (MPI) 已成为分布式内存系统上运行的进程之间通信的事实上的标准。随着高性能GPU计算成为趋势，GPU发起的单边通信成为多GPU扩展的可行解决方案。它还强调了 CPU 上单侧通信的使用。然而，缺乏对单方面通信性能及其对应用程序性能的影响的深入理解成为一个障碍。在本文中，我们通过提出 Message Roofline 模型克服了这一障碍，该模型将应用程序的持续消息传递性能 (GB/s) 描述为其消息大小、每次同步的消息数量、峰值网络带宽和网络延迟的函数。我们使用三个基准测试来展示 CPU 和 GPU 上单向通信的潜力。这些基准测试包括代表遵循批量同步编程模型的应用程序的模板、代表执行异步点对点通信的有向非循环图计算的稀疏三角求解，以及执行原子比较和交换的分布式哈希表。我们的评估提供了对 MPI 应用中双向和单侧通信的实际理解的见解，并且还可以指导硬件供应商的设计原则，以免单侧通信的潜在性能未被充分利用。

items.title: Benchmarking and In-depth Performance Study of Large Language Models on Habana Gaudi Processors.
items.abstract: Transformer models have achieved remarkable success in various machine learning tasks but suffer from high computational complexity and resource requirements. The quadratic complexity of the self-attention mechanism further exacerbates these challenges when dealing with long sequences and large datasets. Specialized AI hardware accelerators, such as the Habana GAUDI architecture, offer a promising solution to tackle these issues. GAUDI features a Matrix Multiplication Engine (MME) and a cluster of fully programmable Tensor Processing Cores (TPC). This paper explores the untapped potential of using GAUDI processors to accelerate Transformer-based models, addressing key challenges in the process. Firstly, we provide a comprehensive performance comparison between the MME and TPC components, illuminating their relative strengths and weaknesses. Secondly, we explore strategies to optimize MME and TPC utilization, offering practical insights to enhance computational efficiency. Thirdly, we evaluate the performance of Transformers on GAUDI, particularly in handling long sequences and uncovering performance bottlenecks. Lastly, we evaluate the end-to-end performance of two Transformer-based large language models (LLM) on GAUDI. The contributions of this work encompass practical insights for practitioners and researchers alike. We delve into GAUDI’s capabilities for Transformers through systematic profiling, analysis, and optimization exploration. Our study bridges a research gap and offers a roadmap for optimizing Transformer-based model training on the GAUDI architecture.
items.abstract_zh: Transformer 模型在各种机器学习任务中取得了显着的成功，但面临着高计算复杂性和资源需求的问题。在处理长序列和大数据集时，自注意力机制的二次复杂度进一步加剧了这些挑战。 Habana GAUDI 架构等专用人工智能硬件加速器为解决这些问题提供了一种有前途的解决方案。 GAUDI 具有矩阵乘法引擎 (MME) 和一组完全可编程的张量处理核心 (TPC)。本文探讨了使用 GAUDI 处理器加速基于 Transformer 的模型的未开发潜力，解决了该过程中的关键挑战。首先，我们对 MME 和 TPC 组件进行了全面的性能比较，阐明了它们的相对优势和劣势。其次，我们探索优化 MME 和 TPC 利用率的策略，为提高计算效率提供实用见解。第三，我们评估 Transformers 在 GAUDI 上的性能，特别是在处理长序列和发现性能瓶颈方面。最后，我们评估了两个基于 Transformer 的大型语言模型（LLM）在 GAUDI 上的端到端性能。这项工作的贡献包括对从业者和研究人员的实用见解。我们通过系统的剖析、分析和优化探索，深入研究 GAUDI 在 Transformers 方面的能力。我们的研究弥补了研究空白，并提供了在 GAUDI 架构上优化基于 Transformer 的模型训练的路线图。

items.title: Short Paper: Accelerating Hyperparameter Optimization Algorithms with Mixed Precision.
items.abstract: Hyperparameter Optimization (HPO) of Neural Networks (NNs) is a computationally expensive procedure. On accelerators, such as NVIDIA Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) equipped with Tensor Cores, it is possible to speed-up the NN training by reducing the precision of some of the NN parameters, also referred to as mixed precision training. This paper investigates the performance of three popular HPO algorithms in terms of the achieved speed-up and model accuracy, utilizing early stopping, Bayesian, and genetic optimization approaches, in combination with mixed precision functionalities. The benchmarks are performed on 64 GPUs in parallel on three datasets: two from the vision and one from the Computational Fluid Dynamics domain. The results show that larger speed-ups can be achieved for mixed compared to full precision HPO if the checkpoint frequency is kept low. In addition to the reduced runtime, small gains in generalization performance on the test set are observed.
items.abstract_zh: 神经网络 (NN) 的超参数优化 (HPO) 是一个计算成本高昂的过程。在加速器上，例如配备 Tensor Core 的 NVIDIA 图形处理单元 (GPU)，可以通过降低某些 NN 参数的精度来加速 NN 训练，也称为混合精度训练。本文利用早期停止、贝叶斯和遗传优化方法，结合混合精度功能，研究了三种流行的 HPO 算法在加速比和模型精度方面的性能。这些基准测试是在 64 个 GPU 上对三个数据集并行执行的：两个数据集来自视觉，一个来自计算流体动力学领域。结果表明，如果检查点频率保持较低，则与全精度 HPO 相比，混合可以实现更大的加速。除了减少运行时间之外，还观察到测试集上的泛化性能略有提高。

items.title: GPU-based LU Factorization and Solve on Batches of Matrices with Band Structure.
items.abstract: This paper presents a portable and performance-efficient approach to solve a batch of linear systems of equations using Graphics Processing Units (GPUs). Each system is represented using a special type of matrices with a band structure above and/or below the diagonal. Each matrix is factorized using an LU factorization with partial pivoting for numerical stability. Subsequently, the factors are used to find the solution for as many right hand sides as needed. The width of the band is often small enough that performing a fully dense LU factorization results in poor performance. We follow the standard LAPACK specifications for addressing this type of problems and develop a dedicated solver that runs efficiently on GPUs. No similar solver is currently available in the vendor’s software stack, so performance results are shown on both NVIDIA and AMD GPUs relative to a parallel CPU solution utilizing OpenMP for thread-level parallelization.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种便携式且高效的方法，用于使用图形处理单元 (GPU) 求解一批线性方程组。每个系统都使用特殊类型的矩阵来表示，该矩阵具有对角线上方和/或下方的能带结构。每个矩阵均使用 LU 分解进行分解，并采用部分主元旋转来实现数值稳定性。随后，使用这些因子来根据需要找到尽可能多的右侧的解决方案。带的宽度通常足够小，以至于执行完全密集的 LU 分解会导致性能不佳。我们遵循解决此类问题的标准 LAPACK 规范，并开发了在 GPU 上高效运行的专用求解器。目前供应商的软件堆栈中没有类似的求解器，因此相对于利用 OpenMP 进行线程级并行化的并行 CPU 解决方案，在 NVIDIA 和 AMD GPU 上显示了性能结果。

items.title: Accelerating Data-Intensive Seismic Research Through Parallel Workflow Optimization and Federated Cyberinfrastructure.
items.abstract: Earthquake early warning systems use synthetic data from simulation frameworks like MudPy to train models for predicting the magnitudes of large earthquakes. MudPy, although powerful, has limitations: a lengthy simulation time to generate the required data, lack of user-friendliness, and no platform for discovering and sharing its data. We introduce FakeQuakes DAGMan Workflow (FDW), which utilizes Open Science Grid (OSG) for parallel computations to accelerate and streamline MudPy simulations. FDW significantly reduces runtime and increases throughput compared to a single-machine setup. Using FDW, we also explore partitioned parallel HTCondor DAGMan workflows to enhance OSG efficiency. Additionally, we investigate leveraging cyberinfrastructure, such as Virtual Data Collaboratory (VDC), for enhancing MudPy and OSG. Specifically, we simulate using Cloud bursting policies to enforce FDW job-offloading to VDC during OSG peak demand, addressing shared resource issues and user goals; we also discuss VDC’s value in facilitating a platform for broad access to MudPy products.
items.abstract_zh: 地震预警系统使用来自 MudPy 等模拟框架的合成数据来训练模型来预测大地震的震级。 MudPy 虽然功能强大，但也有局限性：生成所需数据的模拟时间较长、缺乏用户友好性以及没有发现和共享数据的平台。我们引入 FakeQuakes DAGMan 工作流程 (FDW)，它利用开放科学网格 (OSG) 进行并行计算，以加速和简化 MudPy 模拟。与单机设置相比，FDW 显着缩短了运行时间并提高了吞吐量。使用 FDW，我们还探索分区并行 HTCondor DAGMan 工作流程以提高 OSG 效率。此外，我们还研究利用虚拟数据协作实验室 (VDC) 等网络基础设施来增强 MudPy 和 OSG。具体来说，我们模拟使用云爆发策略在 OSG 高峰需求期间强制将 FDW 工作卸载到 VDC，解决共享资源问题和用户目标；我们还讨论了 VDC 在促进广泛访问 MudPy 产品的平台方面的价值。

items.title: Energy Efficiency of Quantum Statevector Simulation at Scale.
items.abstract: Classical simulations are essential for the development of quantum computing, and their exponential scaling can easily fill any modern supercomputer. In this paper we consider the performance and energy consumption of large Quantum Fourier Transform (QFT) simulations run on ARCHER2, the UK’s National Supercomputing Service, with QuEST toolkit. We take into account CPU clock frequency and node memory size, and use cache-blocking to rearrange the circuit, which minimises communications. We find that using 2.00 GHz instead of 2.25 GHz can save as much as 25% of energy at 5% increase in runtime. Higher node memory also has the potential to be more efficient, and cost the user fewer CUs, but at higher runtime penalty. Finally, we present a cache-blocking QFT circuit, which halves the required communication. All our optimisations combined result in 40% faster simulations and 35% energy savings in 44 qubit simulations on 4,096 ARCHER2 nodes.
items.abstract_zh: 经典模拟对于量子计算的发展至关重要，其指数缩放可以轻松填充任何现代超级计算机。在本文中，我们考虑使用 QuEST 工具包在英国国家超级计算服务 ARCHER2 上运行的大型量子傅立叶变换 (QFT) 模拟的性能和能耗。我们考虑 CPU 时钟频率和节点内存大小，并使用缓存阻塞来重新排列电路，从而最大限度地减少通信。我们发现，使用 2.00 GHz 代替 2.25 GHz 可以节省多达 25% 的能源，同时运行时间增加 5%。更高的节点内存还具有提高效率的潜力，并且用户消耗的 CU 更少，但运行时间损失更高。最后，我们提出了一种缓存阻塞 QFT 电路，它将所需的通信量减半。我们所有的优化相结合，在 4,096 个 ARCHER2 节点上的 44 个量子位模拟中，模拟速度提高了 40%，能源节省了 35%。

items.title: Physical Oscillator Model for Supercomputing.
items.abstract: A parallel program together with the parallel hardware it is running on is not only a vehicle to solve numerical problems, it is also a complex system with interesting dynamical behavior: resynchronization and desynchronization of parallel processes, propagating phases of idleness, and the peculiar effects of noise and system topology are just a few examples. We propose a physical oscillator model (POM) to describe aspects of the dynamics of interacting parallel processes. Motivated by the well-known Kuramoto Model, a process with its regular compute-communicate cycles is modeled as an oscillator which is coupled to other oscillators (processes) via an interaction potential. Instead of a simple all-to-all connectivity, we employ a sparse topology matrix mapping the communication structure and thus the inter-process dependencies of the program onto the oscillator model and propose two interaction potentials that are suitable for different scenarios in parallel computing: resource-scalable and resource-bottlenecked applications. The former are not limited by a resource bottleneck such as memory bandwidth or network contention, while the latter are. Unlike the original Kuramoto model, which has a periodic sinusoidal potential that is attractive for small angles, our characteristic potentials are always attractive for large angles and only differ in the short-distance behavior. We show that the model with appropriate potentials can mimic the propagation of delays and the synchronizing and desynchronizing behavior of scalable and bottlenecked parallel programs, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 并行程序及其运行的并行硬件不仅是解决数值问题的工具，而且还是具有有趣动态行为的复杂系统：并行进程的重新同步和去同步、空闲阶段的传播以及噪声和系统拓扑的特殊影响只是几个例子。我们提出了一个物理振荡器模型（POM）来描述相互作用的并行过程的动力学的各个方面。受著名的 Kuramoto 模型的启发，具有规则计算通信周期的过程被建模为一个振荡器，该振荡器通过交互势与其他振荡器（过程）耦合。我们采用稀疏拓扑矩阵来代替简单的全对全连接，从而将通信结构以及程序的进程间依赖关系映射到振荡器模型上，并提出了两种适用于并行计算中不同场景的交互势：资源可扩展和资源瓶颈应用程序。前者不受内存带宽或网络争用等资源瓶颈的限制，而后者则受到限制。与原始的仓本模型不同，原始的仓本模型具有对小角度有吸引力的周期性正弦势，而我们的特征势总是对大角度有吸引力，并且仅在短距离行为上有所不同。我们证明，具有适当势能的模型可以分别模拟延迟传播以及可扩展和瓶颈并行程序的同步和去同步行为。

items.title: SPEChpc 2021 Benchmarks on Ice Lake and Sapphire Rapids Infiniband Clusters: A Performance and Energy Case Study.
items.abstract: In this work, fundamental performance, power, and energy characteristics of the full SPEChpc 2021 benchmark suite are assessed on two different clusters based on Intel Ice Lake and Sapphire Rapids CPUs using the MPI-only codes’ variants. We use memory bandwidth, data volume, and scalability metrics in order to categorize the benchmarks and pinpoint relevant performance and scalability bottlenecks on the node and cluster levels. Common patterns such as memory bandwidth limitation, dominating communication and synchronization overhead, MPI serialization, superlinear scaling, and alignment issues could be identified, in isolation or in combination, showing that SPEChpc 2021 is representative of many HPC workloads. Power dissipation and energy measurements indicate that the modern Intel server CPUs have such a high idle power level that race-to-idle is the paramount strategy for energy to solution and energy-delay product minimization. On the chip level, only memory-bound code shows a clear advantage of Sapphire Rapids compared to Ice Lake in terms of energy to solution.
items.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，使用仅 MPI 代码的变体，在基于 Intel Ice Lake 和 Sapphire Rapids CPU 的两个不同集群上评估了完整 SPEChpc 2021 基准套件的基本性能、功耗和能源特性。我们使用内存带宽、数据量和可扩展性指标来对基准进行分类，并查明节点和集群级别的相关性能和可扩展性瓶颈。可以单独或组合地识别内存带宽限制、主要通信和同步开销、MPI 序列化、超线性缩放和对齐问题等常见模式，这表明 SPEChpc 2021 代表了许多 HPC 工作负载。功耗和能量测量表明，现代英特尔服务器 CPU 具有如此高的空闲功率水平，以至于“竞赛到空闲”是能源解决方案和能源延迟产品最小化的首要策略。在芯片层面，只有内存限制的代码在解决方案的能源方面与 Ice Lake 相比，才显示出 Sapphire Rapids 的明显优势。

items.title: What Operations can be Performed Directly on Compressed Arrays, and with What Error?
items.abstract: In response to the rapidly escalating data movement-related costs of computing with large matrices and multidimensional arrays, several lossy compression methods have been developed that help reduce the volume of data moved. Unfortunately, all these methods require the data to be decompressed before operating on it. In this work, we develop a lossy compressor for arbitrary-dimensional arrays called PyBlaz 1 that supports a dozen non-trivial operations directly on compressed data while also offering good compression ratios. PyBlaz is based on the PyTorch framework, and thus can be run on CPUs or GPUs without any code changes. We evaluate the efficacy of PyBlaz on datasets originating in three applications: comparing shallow-water simulation implementations, measuring statistics from MRI images, and detecting the scission point in plutonium fission data. Our results demonstrate that PyBlaz’s compressed-domain operations achieve good scalability while incurring controllable errors. To our best knowledge, this is the first such lossy compressor that supports compressed-domain operations in the realm of handling arbitrary-dimensional scientific datasets.
items.abstract_zh: 为了应对大型矩阵和多维数组计算中与数据移动相关的成本迅速上升，人们开发了几种有损压缩方法来帮助减少移动的数据量。不幸的是，所有这些方法都需要在对其进行操作之前对数据进行解压缩。在这项工作中，我们为任意维数组开发了一种有损压缩器，称为 PyBlaz 1，它支持直接对压缩数据进行十几种重要操作，同时还提供良好的压缩比。 PyBlaz 基于 PyTorch 框架，因此可以在 CPU 或 GPU 上运行，无需更改任何代码。我们评估了 PyBlaz 在源自三种应用的数据集上的功效：比较浅水模拟实现、测量 MRI 图像的统计数据以及检测钚裂变数据中的分裂点。我们的结果表明，PyBlaz 的压缩域操作实现了良好的可扩展性，同时产生了可控的错误。据我们所知，这是第一个支持处理任意维科学数据集领域的压缩域操作的有损压缩器。

items.title: OctoRay: Framework for Scalable FPGA Cluster Acceleration of Python Big Data Applications.
items.abstract: In this paper, we introduce OctoRay, a Python framework that allows users to easily combine several FPGA and Python libraries to run their big data analytics pipelines in parallel on FPGA-enabled clusters. We show that OctoRay provides users with multiple levels of freedom, regarding the type of FPGA, the choice of the application and the number of available FPGAs per node, while illustrating the simplicity of the usage of the framework. Additionally, we evaluate the performance of the framework on two use cases that represent typical stages of many big data analytics pipelines. We show that the FPGA implementation outperforms the software baseline by 2x to 12x as the number of FPGAs scales from 1 to 6. This demonstrates that the speedup scales linearly with the number of FPGAs, indicating the speedup potential OctoRay offers and the low overhead of the framework. OctoRay is open source and publicly available at https://github.com/abs-tudelft/octoray
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 OctoRay，这是一个 Python 框架，允许用户轻松组合多个 FPGA 和 Python 库，在支持 FPGA 的集群上并行运行大数据分析管道。我们表明，OctoRay 为用户提供了多个级别的自由度，涉及 FPGA 类型、应用程序的选择以及每个节点可用 FPGA 的数量，同时说明了该框架使用的简单性。此外，我们还评估了框架在两个用例上的性能，这两个用例代表了许多大数据分析管道的典型阶段。我们表明，当 FPGA 数量从 1 增加到 6 时，FPGA 实现的性能优于软件基线 2 倍到 12 倍。这表明加速与 FPGA 数量成线性关系，表明 OctoRay 提供的加速潜力和框架的低开销。 OctoRay 是开源的，可在 https://github.com/abs-tudelft/octoray 上公开获取

items.title: Cross-Facility Orchestration of Electrochemistry Experiments and Computations.
items.abstract: Instrument-computing ecosystems supporting automated electrochemical workflows typically require the integration of disparate instruments such as syringe pump, fraction collector, and potentiostat, all connected to an electrochemical cell. These specialized instruments with custom software and interfaces are not typically designed for network integration and remote automation. We developed a networked ecosystem of these instruments and computing platforms, which includes software to enable automated workflow orchestration from remote computers. Specifically, we developed Python wrappers of APIs and custom Pyro client-server modules to support remote operation of these instruments over the ecosystem network. Herein, we describe a specific workflow for generating and validating voltammogram (I-V) measurements of an electrolyte solution pumped into the electrochemical cell. We demonstrate the orchestration of this workflow which is composed using a Jupyter notebook and executed on a remote computer.
items.abstract_zh: 支持自动化电化学工作流程的仪器计算生态系统通常需要集成不同的仪器，例如注射泵、馏分收集器和恒电位仪，所有这些仪器都连接到电化学电池。这些带有定制软件和接口的专用仪器通常不是为网络集成和远程自动化而设计的。我们开发了这些仪器和计算平台的网络生态系统，其中包括支持远程计算机自动工作流程编排的软件。具体来说，我们开发了 API 的 Python 包装器和自定义 Pyro 客户端-服务器模块，以支持通过生态系统网络对这些仪器进行远程操作。在此，我们描述了用于生成和验证泵入电化学电池的电解质溶液的伏安图 (I-V) 测量的具体工作流程。我们演示了此工作流程的编排，该工作流程使用 Jupyter 笔记本组成并在远程计算机上执行。

items.title: A Systematic Mapping Study of Italian Research on Workflows.
items.abstract: An entire ecosystem of methodologies and tools revolves around scientific workflow management. They cover crucial non-functional requirements that standard workflow models fail to target, such as interactive execution, energy efficiency, performance portability, Big Data management, and intelligent orchestration in the Computing Continuum. Characterizing and monitoring this ecosystem is crucial to developing an informed view of current and future research directions. This work conducts a systematic mapping study of the Italian workflow research community, analyzing 25 tools and 10 applications from several scientific domains in the context of the "National Research Centre for HPC, Big Data, and Quantum Computing" (ICSC). The study aims to outline the main current research directions and determine how they address the critical needs of modern scientific applications. The findings highlight a variegated research ecosystem of tools, with a prominent interest in advanced workflow orchestration and still immature but promising efforts toward energy efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 整个方法论和工具生态系统都围绕着科学的工作流程管理。它们涵盖了标准工作流模型无法满足的关键非功能性需求，例如交互式执行、能源效率、性能可移植性、大数据管理和计算连续体中的智能编排。表征和监测这个生态系统对于深入了解当前和未来的研究方向至关重要。这项工作对意大利工作流研究界进行了系统的映射研究，在“国家 HPC、大数据和量子计算研究中心”(ICSC) 的背景下分析了来自多个科学领域的 25 个工具和 10 个应用程序。该研究旨在概述当前的主要研究方向，并确定它们如何满足现代科学应用的关键需求。这些发现凸显了一个多样化的研究工具生态系统，其中对先进的工作流程编排有着浓厚的兴趣，并且在能源效率方面仍然不成熟但有希望的努力。

items.title: EduHPC Lightning Talk Summary.
items.abstract: Lightning Talks are a lightweight format to discuss emerging ideas and topics pertaining to education and high-performance computing. EduHPC 2023 compiles the lightning talks into a single submission with key takeaways for each of the presentations. The accepted author submissions are also linked via Figshare for complete details. Lightning Talks are competitively selected and undergo full peer review.
items.abstract_zh: 闪电演讲是一种轻量级的形式，用于讨论与教育和高性能计算相关的新兴想法和主题。 EduHPC 2023 将闪电演讲编译成一份提交内容，其中包含每个演示的关键要点。已接受的作者提交的内容也可通过 Figshare 链接以获取完整的详细信息。闪电演讲是经过竞争性选择的，并经过全面的同行评审。

items.title: Performance Portability Evaluation of Blocked Stencil Computations on GPUs.
items.abstract: In this new era where multiple GPU vendors are leading the supercomputing landscape, and multiple programming models are available to users, the drive to achieve performance portability across platforms faces new challenges. Consider stencil algorithms, where architecture-specific solutions are required to optimize for the parallelism hierarchy and memory hierarchy of emerging systems. In this work, we analyze performance portability of the BrickLib domain-specific library and vector code generator for stencils. BrickLib employs fine-grain data blocking to reduce the large amount of data movement associated with stencils. We compare different GPUs (NVIDIA, AMD and Intel) and their associated programming models (CUDA, HIP and SYCL). By testing a wide range of stencil configurations, we show that overall, BrickLib achieves good performance independent of machine or programming model. Moreover, we introduce correlation models as a new tool for comparing architectures and programming models from Roofline model data.
items.abstract_zh: 在多个GPU供应商引领超级计算格局、用户可以使用多种编程模型的新时代，实现跨平台性能可移植性面临着新的挑战。考虑模板算法，其中需要特定于体系结构的解决方案来优化新兴系统的并行层次结构和内存层次结构。在这项工作中，我们分析了 BrickLib 特定领域库和模板矢量代码生成器的性能可移植性。 BrickLib 采用细粒度数据阻塞来减少与模板相关的大量数据移动。我们比较了不同的 GPU（NVIDIA、AMD 和 Intel）及其相关的编程模型（CUDA、HIP 和 SYCL）。通过测试各种模板配置，我们表明总体而言，BrickLib 实现了独立于机器或编程模型的良好性能。此外，我们引入相关模型作为一种新工具，用于比较 Roofline 模型数据的架构和编程模型。

items.title: Performance-Portable GPU Acceleration of the EFIT Tokamak Plasma Equilibrium Reconstruction Code.
items.abstract: This paper presents the steps followed to GPU-offload parts of the core solver of EFIT-AI, an equilibrium reconstruction code suitable for tokamak experiments and burning plasmas. For this work, we will focus on the fitting procedure that consists of a Grad–Shafranov (GS) equation inverse solver that calculates equilibrium reconstructions on a grid. We will show profiling results of the original code (CPU-baseline), as well as the directives used to GPU-offload the most time-consuming function, initially to compare OpenACC and OpenMP on NVIDIA and AMD GPUs and later on to assess OpenMP performance portability on NVIDIA, AMD and Intel GPUs. We will make a performance comparison for different spatial grid sizes and show the speedup achieved on NVIDIA A100 (Perlmutter-NERSC), AMD MI250X (Frontier-OLCF) and Intel PVC GPUs (Sunspot-ALCF). Finally, we will draw some conclusions and recommendations to achieve high-performance portability for an equilibrium reconstruction code on the new HPC architectures.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 EFIT-AI 核心求解器的 GPU 卸载部分所遵循的步骤，EFIT-AI 是一种适用于托卡马克实验和燃烧等离子体的平衡重建代码。在这项工作中，我们将重点关注由 Grad–Shafranov (GS) 方程逆求解器组成的拟合过程，该求解器计算网格上的平衡重建。我们将展示原始代码（CPU 基线）的分析结果，以及用于 GPU 卸载最耗时函数的指令，最初是为了比较 NVIDIA 和 AMD GPU 上的 OpenACC 和 OpenMP，然后评估 OpenMP 在 NVIDIA、AMD 和 Intel GPU 上的性能可移植性。我们将对不同空间网格大小进行性能比较，并展示在 NVIDIA A100 (Perlmutter-NERSC)、AMD MI250X (Frontier-OLCF) 和 Intel PVC GPU (Sunspot-ALCF) 上实现的加速。最后，我们将得出一些结论和建议，以实现新 HPC 架构上平衡重构代码的高性能可移植性。

items.title: PM100: A Job Power Consumption Dataset of a Large-scale Production HPC System.
items.abstract: The power requirements of modern High-Performance Computing (HPC) systems pose environmental and financial challenges, as they contribute to carbon emissions and strain power grids. Optimizing power consumption together with system performance has thus become a crucial goal for HPC centers. As jobs running on a system contribute to the whole system’s power usage, predicting their power requirements before execution on the system would allow to forecast the overall power consumption and perform techniques like power capping at the workload manager level. Such predictive studies need quality data, which is limited due to the inherent complexity of collecting structured data for job power characterization in a production system. This paper aims to fill the lack of resources for job power prediction and provide the HPC community with (i) a methodology to create a job power consumption dataset from workload manager data and node power metrics logs, and (ii) a novel and large dataset comprising around 230K jobs and their corresponding power consumption values. The dataset is derived from M100, a holistic dataset extracted from a production supercomputer hosted at the HPC centre CINECA in Italy.
items.abstract_zh: 现代高性能计算 (HPC) 系统的电力要求带来了环境和财务挑战，因为它们会增加碳排放并给电网带来压力。因此，优化功耗和系统性能已成为 HPC 中心的一个重要目标。由于系统上运行的作业会影响整个系统的功耗，因此在系统上执行之前预测其功耗需求将允许预测总体功耗并在工作负载管理器级别执行功率上限等技术。此类预测研究需要高质量的数据，但由于收集结构化数据以描述生产系统中的工作能力特征的固有复杂性，质量数据受到限制。本文旨在填补作业功率预测资源的缺乏，并为 HPC 社区提供（i）一种根据工作负载管理器数据和节点功率指标日志创建作业功耗数据集的方法，以及（ii）一个包含约 23 万个作业及其相应功耗值的新颖的大型数据集。该数据集源自 M100，这是从意大利 HPC 中心 CINECA 托管的生产超级计算机中提取的整体数据集。

items.title: Augmenting ML-based Predictive Modelling with NLP to Forecast a Job's Power Consumption.
items.abstract: As modern High-Performance Computing (HPC) reach exascale performance, their power consumption becomes a serious threat to environmental and energy sustainability. Efficient power management in HPC systems is crucial for optimizing workload management, reducing operational costs, and promoting environmental sustainability. Accurate prediction of job power consumption plays an important role in achieving such goals. In this paper, we apply a technique combining Machine Learning (ML) algorithms with Natural Language Processing (NLP) tools to predict job power consumption. The solution is able to predict job maximum and average power consumption per node, leveraging only information which is available at the time of job submission. The prediction is performed in an online fashion, and we validate the approach using batch system logs extracted from Supercomputer Fugaku, hosted at the RIKEN Center for Computational Science, in Japan. The experimental evaluation shows promising results of outperforming classical technique while obtaining an R2 score of more than 0.53 for our two prediction tasks.
items.abstract_zh: 随着现代高性能计算 (HPC) 达到百亿亿次性能，其功耗成为对环境和能源可持续性的严重威胁。 HPC 系统中的高效电源管理对于优化工作负载管理、降低运营成本和促进环境可持续性至关重要。准确预测工作功耗对于实现这些目标起着重要作用。在本文中，我们应用一种将机器学习（ML）算法与自然语言处理（NLP）工具相结合的技术来预测工作功耗。该解决方案能够仅利用作业提交时可用的信息来预测每个节点的作业最大功耗和平均功耗。预测以在线方式进行，我们使用从日本 RIKEN 计算科学中心托管的超级计算机 Fugaku 中提取的批处理系统日志来验证该方法。实验评估显示出优于经典技术的有希望的结果，同时我们的两个预测任务获得了超过 0.53 的 R2 分数。

items.title: A Fast and Responsive Web-based Framework for Visualizing HPC Application Usage.
items.abstract: Insights about applications and user environments can help HPC center staff make data-driven decisions about cluster operations. In this paper, we present a fast and responsive web-based visualization framework for analyzing HPC application usage. By leveraging XALT, a powerful tool for tracking application and library usage, we collected tens of millions of data points on a national supercomputer. The portable visualization framework created with Plotly Dash can be easily launched as a container and accessed from a web browser. The presented visualizations take a deep dive into the XALT data, analyzing application use, compiler usage, library usage, and even user-specific usage. Our analysis codes can distinguish between centrally installed applications and user-installed applications and can generate plots based on different metrics (no. of jobs or cpu-hours). Initial insights gained from this visualization framework have helped our support staff identify several goals for improving the software stack and helping users proactively.
items.abstract_zh: 有关应用程序和用户环境的见解可以帮助 HPC 中心工作人员做出有关集群操作的数据驱动决策。在本文中，我们提出了一个快速响应的基于 Web 的可视化框架，用于分析 HPC 应用程序的使用情况。通过利用 XALT 这一用于跟踪应用程序和库使用情况的强大工具，我们在国家超级计算机上收集了数千万个数据点。使用 Plotly Dash 创建的便携式可视化框架可以作为容器轻松启动并从 Web 浏览器访问。所呈现的可视化深入研究了 XALT 数据，分析应用程序使用情况、编译器使用情况、库使用情况，甚至特定于用户的使用情况。我们的分析代码可以区分集中安装的应用程序和用户安装的应用程序，并可以根据不同的指标（作业数量或 CPU 小时数）生成图表。从这个可视化框架中获得的初步见解帮助我们的支持人员确定了改进软件堆栈和主动帮助用户的几个目标。

items.title: Asynchronous Multi-Level Checkpointing: An Enabler of Reproducibility using Checkpoint History Analytics.
items.abstract: High-performance computing applications are increasingly integrating checkpointing libraries for reproducibility analytics. However, capturing an entire checkpoint history for reproducibility study faces the challenges of high-frequency checkpointing across thousands of processes. As a result, the runtime overhead affects application performance and intermediate results when interleaving is introduced during floating-point calculations. In this paper, we extend asynchronous multi-level checkpoint/restart to study the intermediate results generated from scientific workflows. We present an initial prototype of a framework that captures, caches, and compares checkpoint histories from different runs of a scientific application executed using identical input files. We also study the impact of our proposed approach by evaluating the reproducibility of classical molecular dynamics simulations executed using the NWChem software. Experiment results show that our proposed solution improves the checkpoint write bandwidth when capturing checkpoints for reproducibility analysis by a minimum of 30 × and up to 211 × compared to the default checkpointing approach in NWChem.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能计算应用程序越来越多地集成检查点库以进行再现性分析。然而，捕获整个检查点历史以进行可重复性研究面临着跨数千个流程进行高频检查点的挑战。因此，在浮点计算期间引入交错时，运行时开销会影响应用程序性能和中间结果。在本文中，我们扩展了异步多级检查点/重启来研究科学工作流程生成的中间结果。我们提出了一个框架的初始原型，该框架捕获、缓存和比较使用相同输入文件执行的科学应用程序的不同运行的检查点历史记录。我们还通过评估使用 NWChem 软件执行的经典分子动力学模拟的再现性来研究我们提出的方法的影响。实验结果表明，与 NWChem 中的默认检查点方法相比，我们提出的解决方案在捕获用于再现性分析的检查点时将检查点写入带宽提高了至少 30 倍和高达 211 倍。

items.title: High-Performance Programming and Execution of a Coral Biodiversity Mapping Algorithm Using Chapel.
items.abstract: This paper will demonstrate how the parallelism and expressiveness of the Chapel programming language are used to achieve an enormous improvement in computational speed for a problem related to coral reef conservation. Chapel’s concise syntax and versatile data structures enable this problem to be solved in under 300 lines of code, while reducing the time to solution from days down to the order of seconds. This improvement is so substantial that it represents a paradigm shift in the way biodiversity can be measured at scale, providing a wealth of novel information for marine ecosystem managers and opening up brand new avenues for scientific inquiry. This paper will review the solution strategy and data structures in Chapel that allowed these improvements to be realized, and will preview future extensions of this work that have been made possible by this drastic speedup.
items.abstract_zh: 本文将演示如何利用 Chapel 编程语言的并行性和表达能力来大幅提高与珊瑚礁保护相关的问题的计算速度。 Chapel 简洁的语法和通用的数据结构使这个问题能够在 300 行代码内得到解决，同时将解决时间从几天缩短到几秒钟。这一进步是如此巨大，以至于它代表了大规模测量生物多样性的方式的范式转变，为海洋生态系统管理者提供了大量新颖的信息，并为科学探究开辟了全新的途径。本文将回顾 Chapel 中实现这些改进的解决方案策略和数据结构，并将预览通过这种大幅加速而实现的这项工作的未来扩展。

items.title: Novel Approaches Toward Scalable Composable Workflows in Hyper-Heterogeneous Computing Environments.
items.abstract: The annual Workshop on Workflows in Support of Large-Scale Science (WORKS) is a premier venue for the scientific workflow community to present the latest advances in research and development on the many facets of scientific workflows throughout their life-cycle. The Lightning Talks at WORKS focus on describing a novel tool, scientific workflow, or concept, which are work-in-progress and address emerging technologies and frameworks to foster discussion in the community. This paper summarizes the lightning talks at the 2023 edition of WORKS, covering five topics: leveraging large language models to build and execute workflows; developing a common workflow scheduler interface; scaling uncertainty workflow applications on exascale computing systems; evaluating a transcriptomics workflow for cloud vs. HPC systems; and best practices in migrating legacy workflows to workflow management systems.
items.abstract_zh: 年度支持大规模科学的工作流程研讨会 (WORKS) 是科学工作流程社区展示科学工作流程整个生命周期各个方面的最新研究和开发进展的首要场所。 WORKS 的闪电演讲重点描述一种新颖的工具、科学工作流程或概念，这些工具、科学工作流程或概念正在开发中，并涉及新兴技术和框架，以促进社区讨论。本文总结了 2023 年版 WORKS 上的闪电演讲，涵盖五个主题：利用大型语言模型构建和执行工作流程；开发通用工作流调度程序接口；在百亿亿次计算系统上扩展不确定性工作流程应用程序；评估云与 HPC 系统的转录组学工作流程；以及将遗留工作流程迁移到工作流程管理系统的最佳实践。

items.title: CaRV - Accelerating Program Optimization through Capture, Replay, Validate.
items.abstract: This paper presents a new methodology and tool that speeds up the process of optimizing science and engineering programs. The tool, called CaRV (Capture, Replay, and Validate), enables users to experiment quickly with large applications, comparing individual program sections before and after optimizations in terms of efficiency and accuracy. Using language-level checkpointing techniques, CaRV captures the necessary data for replaying the experimental section as a separate execution unit after the code optimization and validating the optimization against the original program. The tool reduces the amount of time and resources spent on experimentation with long-running programs by up to two orders of magnitude, making program optimization more efficient and cost-effective.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的方法和工具，可以加快优化科学和工程项目的过程。该工具称为 CaRV（捕获、重放和验证），使用户能够快速试验大型应用程序，比较优化前后各个程序部分的效率和准确性。使用语言级检查点技术，CaRV 捕获必要的数据，以便在代码优化后将实验部分作为单独的执行单元重放，并根据原始程序验证优化。该工具可将长时间运行的程序实验所花费的时间和资源减少多达两个数量级，从而使程序优化更加高效且更具成本效益。

items.title: When to checkpoint at the end of a fixed-length reservation?
items.abstract: This work considers an application executing for a fixed duration, namely the length of the reservation that it has been granted. The checkpoint duration is a stochastic random variable that obeys some well-known probability distribution law. The question is when to take a checkpoint towards the end of the execution, so that the expectation of the work done is maximized. We address two scenarios. In the first scenario, a checkpoint can be taken at any time; despite its simplicity, this natural problem has not been considered yet (to the best of our knowledge). We provide the optimal solution for a variety of probability distribution laws modeling checkpoint duration. The second scenario is more involved: the application is a linear workflow consisting of a chain of tasks with IID stochastic execution times, and a checkpoint can be taken only at the end of a task. First, we introduce a static strategy where we compute the optimal number of tasks before the application checkpoints at the beginning of the execution. Then, we design a dynamic strategy that decides whether to checkpoint or to continue executing at the end of each task. We instantiate this second scenario with several examples of probability distribution laws for task durations.
items.abstract_zh: 这项工作考虑了一个应用程序在固定持续时间内执行，即已授予的保留时间长度。检查点持续时间是一个随机变量，遵循一些众所周知的概率分布定律。问题是何时在执行结束时采取检查点，以便最大化完成工作的期望。我们解决两种情况。第一种场景，可以随时拿取检查点；尽管很简单，但这个自然问题尚未被考虑（据我们所知）。我们为建模检查点持续时间的各种概率分布规律提供最佳解决方案。第二个场景涉及更多：应用程序是一个线性工作流程，由具有 IID 随机执行时间的任务链组成，并且只能在任务结束时获取检查点。首先，我们引入一种静态策略，在执行开始时计算应用程序检查点之前的最佳任务数。然后，我们设计一个动态策略，决定在每个任务结束时是检查点还是继续执行。我们用任务持续时间的概率分布定律的几个例子来实例化第二个场景。

items.title: Characterizing the Performance of Triangle Counting on Graphcore's IPU Architecture.
items.abstract: In recent years, we have seen an emergence of novel spatial architectures to accelerate domain-specific workloads like Machine Learning. There is a need to investigate their performance characteristics for traditional HPC workloads for their tighter integration with current and future heterogeneous compute resources. In this work, we implement, optimize and evaluate a parallel algorithm for Triangle Counting for graphs in Bulk Synchronous Parallel (BSP) model for Graphcore’s IPU architecture as well as discuss lessons learned. This study demonstrates IPU’s competency in handling such irregular workloads by providing an average speedup of up to 5.3x over NVIDIA A100 GPU on real-world datasets.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，我们看到了新颖的空间架构的出现，可以加速机器学习等特定领域的工作负载。有必要研究它们对于传统 HPC 工作负载的性能特征，以便与当前和未来的异构计算资源更紧密地集成。在这项工作中，我们在 Graphcore 的 IPU 架构的批量同步并行 (BSP) 模型中实现、优化和评估了图形三角形计数的并行算法，并讨论了经验教训。这项研究证明了 IPU 在处理此类不规则工作负载方面的能力，在实际数据集上提供的平均加速比 NVIDIA A100 GPU 高达 5.3 倍。

items.title: Evaluation of SCION for User-driven Path Control: a Usability Study.
items.abstract: The UPIN (User-driven Path verification and control in Inter-domain Networks) project aims to implement a way for users of a network to control how their data is traversing it. In this paper we investigate the possibilities and limitations of SCION for user-driven path control. Exploring several aspects of the performance of a SCION network allows us to define the most efficient path to assign to a user, following specific requests. We extensively analyze multiple paths, specifically focusing on latency, bandwidth and data loss, in SCIONLab, an experimental testbed and implementation of a SCION network. We gather data on these paths and store it in a database, that we then query to select the best path to give to a user to reach a destination, following their request on performance or devices to exclude for geographical or sovereignty reasons. Results indicate our software is a viable option to offer users many paths to choose from, following a series of requests, and therefore perform user-driven path control in a SCION network.
items.abstract_zh: UPIN（域间网络中的用户驱动路径验证和控制）项目旨在为网络用户实现一种方法来控制其数据如何穿越网络。在本文中，我们研究了 SCION 用于用户驱动路径控制的可能性和局限性。通过探索 SCION 网络性能的多个方面，我们可以根据特定请求定义分配给用户的最有效路径。我们在 SCIONLab（一个 SCION 网络的实验测试平台和实现）中广泛分析了多个路径，特别关注延迟、带宽和数据丢失。我们收集这些路径上的数据并将其存储在数据库中，然后根据用户对性能或出于地理或主权原因排除的设备的请求，查询该数据库以选择提供给用户到达目的地的最佳路径。结果表明，我们的软件是一个可行的选择，可以根据一系列请求为用户提供多种路径可供选择，从而在 SCION 网络中执行用户驱动的路径控制。

items.title: Tournament-Based Pretraining to Accelerate Federated Learning.
items.abstract: Advances in hardware, proliferation of compute at the edge, and data creation at unprecedented scales have made federated learning (FL) necessary for the next leap forward in pervasive machine learning. For privacy and network reasons, large volumes of data remain stranded on endpoints located in geographically austere (or at least austere network-wise) locations. However, challenges exist to the effective use of these data. To solve the system and functional level challenges, we present an three novel variants of a serverless federated learning framework. We also present tournament-based pretraining, which we demonstrate significantly improves model performance in some experiments. Overall, these extensions to FL and our novel training method enable greater focus on science rather than ML development.
items.abstract_zh: 硬件的进步、边缘计算的激增以及前所未有的规模的数据创建使得联邦学习（FL）成为普及机器学习的下一次飞跃所必需的。出于隐私和网络原因，大量数据仍然滞留在位于地理位置严峻（或至少在网络方面严峻）的端点上。然而，有效利用这些数据存在挑战。为了解决系统和功能级别的挑战，我们提出了无服务器联邦学习框架的三种新颖变体。我们还提出了基于锦标赛的预训练，我们在一些实验中证明它显着提高了模型性能。总体而言，FL 的这些扩展和我们新颖的训练方法使我们能够更加关注科学而不是 ML 开发。

items.title: symPACK: A GPU-Capable Fan-Out Sparse Cholesky Solver.
items.abstract: Sparse symmetric positive definite systems of equations are ubiquitous in scientific workloads and applications. Parallel sparse Cholesky factorization is the method of choice for solving such linear systems. Therefore, the development of parallel sparse Cholesky codes that can efficiently run on today’s large-scale heterogeneous distributed-memory platforms is of vital importance. Modern supercomputers offer nodes that contain a mix of CPUs and GPUs. To fully utilize the computing power of these nodes, scientific codes must be adapted to offload expensive computations to GPUs.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏对称正定方程组在科学工作量和应用中无处不在。并行稀疏 Cholesky 分解是求解此类线性系统的首选方法。因此，开发能够在当今大规模异构分布式内存平台上高效运行的并行稀疏 Cholesky 代码至关重要。现代超级计算机提供包含 CPU 和 GPU 混合的节点。为了充分利用这些节点的计算能力，必须调整科学代码以将昂贵的计算卸载到 GPU。

items.title: Linking the Dynamic PicoProbe Analytical Electron-Optical Beam Line / Microscope to Supercomputers.
items.abstract: The Dynamic PicoProbe at Argonne National Laboratory is undergoing upgrades that will enable it to produce up to 100s of GB of data per day. While this data is highly important for both fundamental science and industrial applications, there is currently limited on-site infrastructure to handle these high-volume data streams. We address this problem by providing a software architecture capable of supporting large-scale data transfers to the neighboring supercomputers at the Argonne Leadership Computing Facility. To prepare for future scientific workflows, we implement two instructive use cases for hyperspectral and spatiotemporal datasets, which include: (i) off-site data transfer, (ii) machine learning/artificial intelligence and traditional data analysis approaches, and (iii) automatic metadata extraction and cataloging of experimental results. This infrastructure supports expected workloads and also provides domain scientists the ability to reinterrogate data from past experiments to yield additional scientific value and derive new insights.
items.abstract_zh: 阿贡国家实验室的动态 PicoProbe 正在进行升级，使其每天能够生成多达 100 GB 的数据。虽然这些数据对于基础科学和工业应用都非常重要，但目前处理这些大量数据流的现场基础设施有限。我们通过提供能够支持向阿贡领导计算设施的相邻超级计算机进行大规模数据传输的软件架构来解决这个问题。为了为未来的科学工作流程做好准备，我们针对高光谱和时空数据集实施了两个指导性用例，其中包括：（i）异地数据传输，（ii）机器学习/人工智能和传统数据分析方法，以及（iii）实验结果的自动元数据提取和编目。该基础设施支持预期的工作负载，还为领域科学家提供了重新询问过去实验中的数据的能力，以产生额外的科学价值并得出新的见解。

items.title: Modelling Data Locality of Sparse Matrix-Vector Multiplication on the A64FX.
items.abstract: One of the novel features of the Fujitsu A64FX CPU is the sector cache. This feature enables hardware-supported partitioning of the L1 and L2 caches and allows the programmer control of which partition is used to place data in. This paper performs an in-depth study of how to apply the sector cache to a frequently used sparse matrix-vector multiplication (SpMV) kernel. A performance model based on reuse analysis is used to better understand situations where the sector cache leads to improved reuse and to predict the cache behavior. The model correctly predicts the number of L2 cache misses within 2–3 % for sequential and parallel SpMV with 48 threads using a collection of 490 sparse matrices. Further experiments show the effect of various sector cache configurations on performance. A median speedup of about 1.05 × is achieved, whereas the maximum speedup is about 1.6 ×.
items.abstract_zh: Fujitsu A64FX CPU 的一项新颖功能是扇区缓存。此功能支持硬件支持的 L1 和 L2 缓存分区，并允许程序员控制使用哪个分区来放置数据。本文深入研究了如何将扇区缓存应用于常用的稀疏矩阵向量乘法 (SpMV) 内核。基于重用分析的性能模型用于更好地了解扇区缓存导致改进重用的情况并预测缓存行为。该模型使用 490 个稀疏矩阵的集合，正确预测具有 48 个线程的顺序和并行 SpMV 的 L2 缓存未命中次数在 2-3% 范围内。进一步的实验显示了各种扇区缓存配置对性能的影响。中值加速比约为 1.05 倍，而最大加速比约为 1.6 倍。

items.title: Entropy-driven Optimal Sub-sampling of Fluid Dynamics for Developing Machine-learned Surrogates.
items.abstract: Optimal sub-sampling of large datasets from fluid dynamics simulations is essential for training reduced-order machine learned models. A method using Shannon entropy was developed to weight flow features according to their level of information content, such that the most informative features can be extracted and used for training a surrogate model. The method is demonstrated in the canonical flow over a cylinder problem simulated with OpenFOAM. Both time-independent predictions and temporal forecasting were investigated as well as two types of prediction targets: local per-grid-point predictions and global per-time-step predictions. When tested on training a surrogate model, results indicate that our entropy-based sampling method typically outperforms random sampling and yields more reproducible results in less iterations. Finally, the method was used to train a surrogate model for modeling turbulence in magnetohydrodynamic flows, which revealed various challenges and opportunities for future research.
items.abstract_zh: 流体动力学模拟中的大型数据集的最佳子采样对于训练降阶机器学习模型至关重要。开发了一种使用香农熵的方法，根据流特征的信息内容水平对流特征进行加权，以便可以提取信息最多的特征并将其用于训练代理模型。该方法在使用 OpenFOAM 模拟的圆柱体正则流动问题中得到了演示。研究了与时间无关的预测和时间预测以及两种类型的预测目标：局部每网格点预测和全局每时间步预测。当对训练代理模型进行测试时，结果表明我们基于熵的采样方法通常优于随机采样，并且在更少的迭代中产生更多可重复的结果。最后，该方法用于训练模拟磁流体动力流中湍流的替代模型，这揭示了未来研究的各种挑战和机遇。

items.title: Faculty Development Workshops for Integrating PDC in Early Undergraduate Curricula: An Experience Report.
items.abstract: Parallel and Distributed Computing (PDC) has become pervasive and is now exercised on a variety of platforms. Therefore, understanding how parallelism and distributed computing affect problem solving is important for every computing and engineering professional. However, most students in computer science (CS) and computer engineering (CE) programs are still introduced to computational problem solving using an old model, in which all processing is serial and synchronous, with input and output via text using a terminal interface or a local file system.
items.abstract_zh: 并行和分布式计算（PDC）已经变得普遍，并且现在在各种平台上运行。因此，了解并行性和分布式计算如何影响问题解决对于每个计算和工程专业人士来说都很重要。然而，大多数计算机科学（CS）和计算机工程（CE）课程的学生仍然使用旧模型来解决计算问题，其中所有处理都是串行和同步的，使用终端接口或本地文件系统通过文本进行输入和输出。

items.title: Peachy Parallel Assignments (EduHPC 2023).
items.abstract: Peachy Parallel Assignments are model assignments for teaching parallel computing concepts. They are competitively selected for being adoptable by other instructors and “cool and inspirational” for students. Thus, they allow instructors to easily add high-quality assignments that will engage students to their classes.
items.abstract_zh: Peachy 并行作业是用于教授并行计算概念的模型作业。他们经过竞争性选拔，可供其他教师采用，并对学生来说“很酷且鼓舞人心”。因此，教师可以轻松添加高质量的作业，吸引学生参与课堂。

items.title: Optimizing Write Performance for Checkpointing to Parallel File Systems Using LSM-Trees.
items.abstract: The widening gap between compute performance and I/O performance on modern HPC systems means that writing checkpoints to a parallel file system for fault tolerance is fast becoming a bottleneck to high-performance. It is therefore vital that software is engineered such that it can achieve the highest proportion of available performance on the underlying hardware; and this is a burden often carried by I/O middleware libraries. In this paper, we outline such an I/O library based on a Log-structured Merge Tree (LSM-Tree), not just for metadata, but also scientific data. We benchmark its performance using the IOR benchmark, demonstrating 2.4 to 76.7 × better performance than alternative file formats, such as ADIOS2, HDF5, and IOR baseline when running on a Lustre Parallel File System. We further demonstrate that when our LSM-Tree I/O library is used as a storage layer for ADIOS2, the resulting I/O library still outperforms the default ADIOS2 implementation by 1.5 ×.
items.abstract_zh: 现代 HPC 系统上计算性能和 I/O 性能之间不断扩大的差距意味着将检查点写入并行文件系统以实现容错很快就会成为高性能的瓶颈。因此，软件设计必须能够在底层硬件上实现最高比例的可用性能；这是 I/O 中间件库经常承担的负担。在本文中，我们概述了这样一个基于日志结构合并树（LSM-Tree）的 I/O 库，不仅适用于元数据，还适用于科学数据。我们使用 IOR 基准对其性能进行基准测试，结果表明，在 Lustre 并行文件系统上运行时，性能比其他文件格式（例如 ADIOS2、HDF5 和 IOR 基准）高 2.4 至 76.7 倍。我们进一步证明，当我们的 LSM-Tree I/O 库用作 ADIOS2 的存储层时，生成的 I/O 库的性能仍然比默认的 ADIOS2 实现高 1.5 倍。

items.title: A Performance Model for Estimating the Cost of Scaling to Practical Quantum Advantage.
items.abstract: We present a simple performance model to estimate the qubit-count and runtime associated with large-scale error-corrected quantum computations. Our estimates extrapolate current usage costs of quantum computers and show that computing the ground state of the 2D Hubbard model, which is widely believed to be an early candidate for practical quantum advantage, could start at a million dollars. Our model shows a clear cost advantage of up to four orders of magnitude for quantum processors based on superconducting technology compared to ion trap devices. Our analysis shows that usage costs, while substantial, will not necessarily block the road to practical quantum advantage. Furthermore, the combined effects of algorithmic improvements, more efficient error correction codes, and R&D cost amortization are likely to lead to orders of magnitude reductions in cost.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个简单的性能模型来估计与大规模纠错量子计算相关的量子位计数和运行时间。我们的估计推断了量子计算机当前的使用成本，并表明计算 2D 哈伯德模型的基态可能需要 100 万美元，该模型被广泛认为是实际量子优势的早期候选者。我们的模型显示，与离子阱设备相比，基于超导技术的量子处理器具有高达四个数量级的明显成本优势。我们的分析表明，使用成本虽然很高，但不一定会阻碍实现实际量子优势的道路。此外，算法改进、更高效的纠错码和研发成本摊销的综合效应可能会导致成本降低几个数量级。

items.title: Domain-Specific Energy Modeling for Drug Discovery and Magnetohydrodynamics Applications.
items.abstract: Over the past few years, the adoption of energy efficiency techniques in modern computer systems is becoming increasingly relevant for sustainable computing. A well-known power management software technique for energy-efficient computing is frequency scaling which modulates the device frequency to explore the energy-performance trade-off. To achieve energy savings, a frequency tuning phase is required because different applications can have different energy and runtime behaviors depending on the frequency setting. Machine learning models can be used to predict energy and runtime, and therefore optimal frequency configurations, based on static or dynamic features extracted from the target application. While general-purpose energy models can be very accurate for a wide range of applications, their accuracy can be limited by the specific input of the target application. We present an energy characterization that spans the fields of drug discovery and magnetohydrodynamics by using two real-world applications as case studies: LiGen and Cronos. Additionally, to overcome the limitations of general-purpose approaches, we define two domain-specific energy models, which enhance the general-purpose energy models by leveraging the target application’s input parameter to increase the final accuracy. Experimental results show that for both applications, domain-specific models achieve a ten times lower error compared to the general-purpose energy models.
items.abstract_zh: 在过去的几年中，现代计算机系统中节能技术的采用与可持续计算变得越来越相关。用于节能计算的一种众所周知的电源管理软件技术是频率缩放，它可以调节设备频率以探索能源性能权衡。为了实现节能，需要频率调谐阶段，因为不同的应用根据频率设置可能具有不同的能量和运行时间行为。机器学习模型可用于根据从目标应用提取的静态或动态特征来预测能量和运行时间，从而预测最佳频率配置。虽然通用能源模型对于各种应用来说都非常准确，但其准确性可能受到目标应用的特定输入的限制。我们通过使用两个现实世界的应用作为案例研究：LiGen 和 Cronos，提出了跨越药物发现和磁流体动力学领域的能量表征。此外，为了克服通用方法的局限性，我们定义了两个特定领域的能量模型，它们通过利用目标应用程序的输入参数来提高最终精度，从而增强通用能量模型。实验结果表明，对于这两种应用，特定领域模型的误差比通用能源模型低十倍。

items.title: Uncertainty Quantification of Metal Additive Manufacturing Processing Conditions Through the use of Exascale Computing.
items.abstract: Metal additive manufacturing (AM) is a disruptive manufacturing technology that opens the design space for parts outside those possible from traditional manufacturing methods. In order to accelerate industry and R&D needs to certify AM parts, the Exascale Additive Manufacturing project (ExaAM) has developed a suite of exascale-ready computational tools to model the process-to-structure-to-properties (PSP) relationship for additively manufactured metal components. One such tool is an uncertainty quantification (UQ) pipeline to quantify the effect that uncertainty in processing conditions has on local mechanical responses. We present an overview of this pipeline and its required simulation and workflow codes. Using the Oak Ridge National Laboratory’s (ORNL) exascale computer, Frontier, we utilize this pipeline to cross multiple length and time scales to predict the local mechanical response of a location within a complex AM bridge part, AMB2018-01 produced by the National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) as part of their 2018 AM-Bench test series. Our results are then compared to experimental mechanical tests of parts from the NIST build to quantify the error in the ExaAM UQ workflow.
items.abstract_zh: 金属增材制造 (AM) 是一种颠覆性制造技术，它为传统制造方法之外的零件开辟了设计空间。为了加速行业和研发需求来认证增材制造零件，百亿亿次增材制造项目 (ExaAM) 开发了一套百亿亿次级计算工具，用于对增材制造金属部件的工艺-结构-性能 (PSP) 关系进行建模。其中一种工具是不确定性量化 (UQ) 管道，用于量化加工条件的不确定性对局部机械响应的影响。我们概述了该管道及其所需的模拟和工作流程代码。使用橡树岭国家实验室 (ORNL) 的百亿亿级计算机 Frontier，我们利用该管道跨越多个长度和时间尺度来预测复杂 AM 桥梁部件内某个位置的局部机械响应，AMB2018-01 由美国国家标准与技术研究所 (NIST) 制作，作为其 2018 年 AM-Bench 测试系列的一部分。然后将我们的结果与 NIST 构建的零件的实验机械测试进行比较，以量化 ExaAM UQ 工作流程中的错误。

items.title: Sunfish: An Open Centralized Composable HPC Management Framework.
items.abstract: Traditional HPC systems are provisioned with static fixed quantities of memory, storage, accelerators, and CPU resources to execute requested computation. This is not sufficient for today’s datacenters that are running modern dynamic workloads, resulting in workloads executing on systems that are not optimized for their needs. Datacenters often end up over-provisioning hardware resources to attempt enabling any workload to run on any server in the cluster. Composable Disaggregated Infrastructure (CDI) enables servers to be composed out of physically disaggregated resources to support the requirements of a given workload. Resource management, using a standardized interface, can enable clients to monitor, compose, and intelligently provision resources, in beneficial ways. The OpenFabrics Alliance in collaboration with DMTF, SNIA, and the CXL Consortium, is developing the Sunfish Management Framework. The goal of Sunfish is to enable interoperability through common interfaces for connecting workloads with resources, without having to worry about the underlying network technology.
items.abstract_zh: 传统 HPC 系统配备静态固定数量的内存、存储、加速器和 CPU 资源来执行请求的计算。对于当今运行现代动态工作负载的数据中心来说，这还不够，导致工作负载在未针对其需求进行优化的系统上执行。数据中心通常会过度配置硬件资源，以尝试使任何工作负载能够在集群中的任何服务器上运行。可组合分解基础设施 (CDI) 使服务器能够由物理分解的资源组成，以支持给定工作负载的要求。使用标准化接口的资源管理可以使客户端以有益的方式监控、组合和智能地配置资源。 OpenFabrics 联盟与 DMTF、SNIA 和 CXL 联盟合作，正在开发 Sunfish 管理框架。 Sunfish 的目标是通过通用接口实现互操作性，将工作负载与资源连接起来，而不必担心底层网络技术。

items.title: Sustainability in HPC: Vision and Opportunities.
items.abstract: Tackling climate change by reducing and eventually eliminating carbon emissions is a significant milestone on the path toward establishing an environmentally sustainable society. As we transition into the exascale era, marked by an increasing demand and scale of HPC resources, the HPC community must embrace the challenge of reducing carbon emissions from designing and operating modern HPC systems. In this position paper, we describe challenges and highlight different opportunities that can aid HPC sites in reducing the carbon footprint of modern HPC systems.
items.abstract_zh: 通过减少并最终消除碳排放来应对气候变化是建立环境可持续社会道路上的一个重要里程碑。随着我们进入百亿亿次时代，高性能计算资源的需求和规模不断增加，高性能计算社区必须迎接减少设计和运营现代高性能计算系统碳排放的挑战。在本立场文件中，我们描述了挑战并强调了可以帮助 HPC 站点减少现代 HPC 系统碳足迹的不同机遇。

items.title: Specialized Kernels for Optimizing GPU Offload in OpenMP.
items.abstract: Programming models for general purpose GPU (GPGPU) computing include grid and non-grid languages. Grid languages like CUDA and HIP map directly to the GPU hardware and can extract high performance from applications. However, this low-level programming approach makes them more difficult to program than non-grid languages such as C, C++, and Fortran with OpenMP target offload. Furthermore, grid languages often have more portability issues than non-grid languages. However, code generated from non-grid languages using automatic compiler and runtime techniques often incur higher overhead while generating GPU kernels for target regions.
items.abstract_zh: 通用 GPU (GPGPU) 计算的编程模型包括网格和非网格语言。 CUDA 和 HIP 等网格语言直接映射到 GPU 硬件，可以从应用程序中获取高性能。然而，这种低级编程方法使得它们比非网格语言（例如具有 OpenMP 目标卸载的 C、C++ 和 Fortran）更难编程。此外，网格语言通常比非网格语言有更多的可移植性问题。然而，使用自动编译器和运行时技术从非网格语言生成的代码在为目标区域生成 GPU 内核时通常会产生更高的开销。

items.title: Data Race Detection Using Large Language Models.
items.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are demonstrating significant promise as an alternate strategy to facilitate analyses and optimizations of high-performance computing programs, circumventing the need for resource-intensive manual tool creation. In this paper, we explore a novel LLM-based data race detection approach combining prompting engineering and fine-tuning techniques. We create a dedicated dataset named DRB-ML, which is derived from DataRaceBench, with fine-grain labels showing the presence of data race pairs and their associated variables, line numbers, and read/write information. DRB-ML is then used to evaluate representative LLMs and fine-tune open-source ones. Our experiment shows that LLMs can be a viable approach to data race detection. However, they still cannot compete with traditional data race detection tools when we need detailed information about variable pairs causing data races.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 作为一种替代策略展现出了巨大的前景，可以促进高性能计算程序的分析和优化，从而避免创建资源密集型手动工具的需要。在本文中，我们探索了一种新颖的基于 LLM 的数据竞争检测方法，该方法结合了提示工程和微调技术。我们创建了一个名为 DRB-ML 的专用数据集，该数据集源自 DataRaceBench，具有细粒度标签，显示数据竞争对及其关联变量、行号和读/写信息的存在。然后使用 DRB-ML 评估代表性的法学硕士并对开源法学硕士进行微调。我们的实验表明，LLM 可以成为数据竞争检测的可行方法。然而，当我们需要有关引起数据竞争的变量对的详细信息时，它们仍然无法与传统的数据竞争检测工具竞争。

items.title: MPI-xCCL: A Portable MPI Library over Collective Communication Libraries for Various Accelerators.
items.abstract: The evolution of high-performance computing toward diverse accelerators, including NVIDIA, AMD, Intel GPUs, and Habana Gaudi Accelerators, demands a user-friendly and efficient utilization of these technologies. While both GPU-aware MPI libraries and vendor-specific communication libraries cater to communication requirements, trade-offs emerge based on library selection across various message sizes. Thus, prioritizing usability, we propose MPI-xCCL, a Message Passing Interface-based runtime with cross-accelerator support for efficient, portable, scalable, and optimized communication performance. MPI-xCCL incorporates vendor-specific libraries with GPU-aware MPI runtimes ensuring multi-accelerator compatibility while adhering to MPI standards. The proposed hybrid designs leverage the benefits of MPI and xCCL algorithms and transparently to the end user. We evaluated our designs on various HPC systems using OSU Micro-Benchmarks, and Deep Learning frameworks TensorFlow with Horovod. On NVIDIA-GPU-enabled ThetaGPU, our designs outperformed Open MPI by 4.6x. On emerging Habana Gaudi-based systems, MPI-xCCL was also able to deliver similar performance as vendor-provided communication runtimes.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能计算向各种加速器（包括 NVIDIA、AMD、Intel GPU 和 Habana Gaudi 加速器）发展，需要用户友好且高效地利用这些技术。虽然 GPU 感知的 MPI 库和特定于供应商的通信库都可以满足通信要求，但根据不同消息大小的库选择，会出现权衡。因此，为了优先考虑可用性，我们提出了 MPI-xCCL，这是一种基于消息传递接口的运行时，具有跨加速器支持，可实现高效、可移植、可扩展和优化的通信性能。 MPI-xCCL 将供应商特定的库与 GPU 感知的 MPI 运行时相结合，确保多加速器兼容性，同时遵守 MPI 标准。所提出的混合设计充分利用了 MPI 和 xCCL 算法的优势，并且对最终用户透明。我们使用 OSU Micro-Benchmarks 以及深度学习框架 TensorFlow 和 Horovod 在各种 HPC 系统上评估了我们的设计。在支持 NVIDIA GPU 的 ThetaGPU 上，我们的设计比 Open MPI 性能高出 4.6 倍。在新兴的基于 Habana Gaudi 的系统上，MPI-xCCL 还能够提供与供应商提供的通信运行时类似的性能。

items.title: VSCuda: LLM based CUDA extension for Visual Studio Code.
items.abstract: The CUDA programming language has developed to constantly accommodate new functionalities since its introduction. For beginners in particular, it is already difficult to remember the expected function parameters of commonly used CUDA features, let alone optimize their code by exploiting newly introduced functionalities. To reduce the burden for CUDA programmers, we propose VSCuda, a Visual Studio Code extension for CUDA C/C++ that includes functionalities including but not limited to CUDA syntax highlighting, code help for all CUDA APIs, code completion for all CUDA functions, and integrated code improvement suggestions from state-of-the-art large language models.
items.abstract_zh: 自推出以来，CUDA 编程语言不断发展以适应新功能。特别是对于初学者来说，记住常用 CUDA 功能的预期功能参数已经很困难，更不用说通过利用新引入的功能来优化代码了。为了减轻 CUDA 程序员的负担，我们提出了 VSCuda，它是 CUDA C/C++ 的 Visual Studio Code 扩展，其功能包括但不限于 CUDA 语法突出显示、所有 CUDA API 的代码帮助、所有 CUDA 函数的代码完成以及来自最先进的大型语言模型的集成代码改进建议。

items.title: Dynamic Selective Protection of Sparse Iterative Solvers via ML Prediction of Soft Error Impacts.
items.abstract: Soft errors occur frequently on large computing platforms due to the increasing scale and complexity of HPC systems. Various resilience techniques (e.g., checkpointing, ABFT, and replication) have been proposed to protect scientific applications from soft errors at different levels. Among them, system-level replication often involves duplicating or even triplicating the entire computation, thus resulting in high resilience overhead. This paper proposes dynamic selective protection for sparse iterative solvers, in particular for the Preconditioned Conjugate Gradient (PCG) solver, at the system level to reduce the resilience overhead. For this method, we leverage machine learning (ML) to predict the impact of soft errors that strike different elements of a key computation (i.e., sparse matrix-vector multiplication) at different iterations of the solver. Based on the result of the prediction, we design a dynamic strategy to selectively protect those elements that would result in a large performance degradation if struck by soft errors. An experimental evaluation demonstrates that our dynamic protection strategy is able to reduce the resilience overhead compared to existing algorithms.
items.abstract_zh: 由于 HPC 系统的规模和复杂性不断增加，大型计算平台上经常出现软错误。人们提出了各种弹性技术（例如检查点、ABFT 和复制）来保护科学应用程序免受不同级别的软错误的影响。其中，系统级复制往往涉及到整个计算的重复甚至三倍，从而导致较高的弹性开销。本文提出了在系统级别对稀疏迭代求解器（特别是预条件共轭梯度（PCG）求解器）进行动态选择性保护，以减少弹性开销。对于这种方法，我们利用机器学习 (ML) 来预测软错误的影响，这些软错误在求解器的不同迭代中对关键计算的不同元素（即稀疏矩阵向量乘法）造成影响。根据预测结果，我们设计了一种动态策略来选择性地保护那些如果受到软错误攻击会导致性能大幅下降的元素。实验评估表明，与现有算法相比，我们的动态保护策略能够降低弹性开销。

items.title: CuPBoP-AMD: Extending CUDA to AMD Platforms.
items.abstract: The proliferation of artificial intelligence applications has underscored the need for increased portability among graphic processing units (GPUs) from different vendors. With CUDA as one of the most popular GPU programming languages, CuPBoP (CUDA for Parallelized and Broad-range Processors) aims to provide NVIDIA’s proprietary CUDA language support to a variety of GPU and CPU platforms by translating CUDA programs at the LLVM/NVVM IR level. Our work extends CuPBoP to AMD GPUs as CuPBoP-AMD. CuPBoP-AMD is a CUDA translator that translates CUDA programs at NVVM IR level to HIP-compatible IR that can run on AMD GPUs. Currently, CuPBoP-AMD translates a broader range of applications in the Rodinia benchmark suite while maintaining approximately equal performance than the existing state-of-the-art AMD-developed translator, HIPIFY, without requiring programmer intervention.
items.abstract_zh: 人工智能应用程序的激增凸显了提高不同供应商的图形处理单元 (GPU) 之间的可移植性的需求。 CUDA 作为最流行的 GPU 编程语言之一，CuPBoP（CUDA for Parallelized and Broad-range Processors）旨在通过在 LLVM/NVVM IR 级别翻译 CUDA 程序，为各种 GPU 和 CPU 平台提供 NVIDIA 专有的 CUDA 语言支持。我们的工作将 CuPBoP 扩展到 AMD GPU，称为 CuPBoP-AMD。 CuPBoP-AMD 是一款 CUDA 转换器，可将 NVVM IR 级别的 CUDA 程序转换为可在 AMD GPU 上运行的 HIP 兼容 IR。目前，CuPBoP-AMD 在 Rodinia 基准测试套件中翻译了更广泛的应用程序，同时保持与现有最先进的 AMD 开发的翻译器 HIPIFY 大致相同的性能，而无需程序员干预。

items.title: DDStore: Distributed Data Store for Scalable Training of Graph Neural Networks on Large Atomistic Modeling Datasets.
items.abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are a class of Deep Learning models used in designing atomistic materials for effective screening of large chemical spaces. To ensure robust prediction, GNN models must be trained on large volumes of atomistic data on leadership class supercomputers. Even with the advent of modern architectures that consist of multiple storage layers that include node-local NVMe devices in addition to device memory for caching large datasets, extreme-scale model training faces I/O challenges at scale.
items.abstract_zh: 图神经网络 (GNN) 是一类深度学习模型，用于设计原子材料以有效筛选大型化学空间。为了确保稳健的预测，GNN 模型必须在领先级超级计算机上接受大量原子数据的训练。即使出现了由多个存储层组成的现代架构，其中除了用于缓存大型数据集的设备内存之外，还包括节点本地 NVMe 设备，超大规模模型训练仍面临着大规模的 I/O 挑战。

items.title: Enabling Communication with FPGA-based Network-attached Accelerators for HPC Workloads.
items.abstract: The use of stand-alone, network-coupled Field Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) accelerators is intended to significantly increase the energy efficiency of HPC applications and thus also of HPC data centers. A loose coupling between the nodes of the HPC data center and the FPGAs is established through the high-speed network of the data center. This allows greater flexibility in combining different nodes and accelerators. Both the resulting energy savings and the increased flexibility through the network connection, enable the economical use of FPGAs. This work presents a communication stack to integrate the so-called Network-attached Accelerator (NAA) into the HPC data center. A low-level Remote Direct Memory Access (RDMA) Application Programming Interface (API) and a high-level Remote Procedure Call (RPC) API is designed on top of the RDMA over Converged Ethernet v2 (RoCEv2) communication stack. The experimental results over 100 Gbps RoCEv2 show that our design and implementation deliver performance close to the theoretical maximum.
items.abstract_zh: 使用独立的网络耦合现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 加速器旨在显着提高 HPC 应用程序以及 HPC 数据中心的能源效率。 HPC数据中心的节点与FPGA之间通过数据中心的高速网络建立松耦合。这使得组合不同节点和加速器具有更大的灵活性。由此产生的能源节约和通过网络连接提高的灵活性，使得 FPGA 的使用更加经济。这项工作提出了一个通信堆栈，用于将所谓的网络附加加速器 (NAA) 集成到 HPC 数据中心。低级远程直接内存访问 (RDMA) 应用程序编程接口 (API) 和高级远程过程调用 (RPC) API 设计在融合以太网 RDMA v2 (RoCEv2) 通信堆栈之上。超过 100 Gbps RoCEv2 的实验结果表明，我们的设计和实现提供的性能接近理论最大值。

items.title: Vertical Scaling of Variational Multiscale Modeling for Fluid Dynamics: Successes, Challenges, and Opportunities.
items.abstract: We investigate the vertical scaling of a mixed-precision variational multiscale method. In this method, the finescales are represented in reduced-precision floating-point format while the coarse scales are represented in double-precision floating-point format. We accelerate the solve of the finescale problem by shifting the solve of the finescale problem from the central processing unit to the graphical processing unit. We observe that this vertical scaling technique successfully accelerates the solve of the finescale problem by over 900x in some instances. However, we also note the observed acceleration is parameter-dependent and varies wildly based on the coarse scale and finescale polynomial degrees chosen for the variational multiscale method. Despite the demonstrated success of the present work, this case study highlights existing challenges when merging vertical and horizontal scaling techniques and motivates opportunities for future research on the topic.
items.abstract_zh: 我们研究了混合精度变分多尺度方法的垂直缩放。在该方法中，细尺度以降低精度浮点格式表示，而粗尺度以双精度浮点格式表示。我们通过将精细尺度问题的解决从中央处理单元转移到图形处理单元来加速精细尺度问题的解决。我们观察到，在某些情况下，这种垂直缩放技术成功地将精细尺度问题的解决加速了 900 倍以上。然而，我们还注意到，观测到的加速度与参数相关，并且根据为变分多尺度方法选择的粗尺度和细尺度多项式次数而有很大变化。尽管目前的工作取得了成功，但本案例研究强调了合并垂直和水平扩展技术时存在的挑战，并为该主题的未来研究提供了机会。

items.title: Optimizing Irregular Communication with Neighborhood Collectives and Locality-Aware Parallelism.
items.abstract: Irregular communication often limits both the performance and scalability of parallel applications. Typically, applications individually implement irregular communication as point-to-point, and any optimizations are integrated directly into the application. As a result, these optimizations lack portability. It is difficult to optimize point-to-point messages within MPI, as the interface for single messages provides no information on the collection of all communication to be performed. However, the persistent neighbor collective API, released in the MPI 4 standard, provides an interface for portable optimizations of irregular communication within MPI libraries.
items.abstract_zh: 不规则的通信通常会限制并行应用程序的性能和可扩展性。通常，应用程序单独实现点对点的不规则通信，并且任何优化都直接集成到应用程序中。因此，这些优化缺乏可移植性。在 MPI 内优化点对点消息很困难，因为单个消息的接口不提供有关要执行的所有通信的集合的信息。然而，MPI 4 标准中发布的持久邻居集合 API 提供了一个接口，用于 MPI 库内不规则通信的可移植优化。

items.title: ICE 2.0: Restructuring and Growing an Instructional HPC Cluster.
items.abstract: The Partnership for an Advanced Computing Environment (PACE) at Georgia Tech (GT) has been running two campus-wide cluster resources available for academic courses and workshops for five years. The initial design focused on creating a federated resource for a wide range of educational topics, based on a PACE and College of Computing (COC) partnership. Due to funding, this took the form of separate resources, one funded by PACE, and another by COC. These "Instructional Cluster Environments", PACE-ICE and COC-ICE, became very popular with instructors at GT but led to a high maintenance cost due to the split nature of the environments. With the transition to the Slurm scheduler, PACE collaborated with COC to merge the two clusters into one, ICE. This work details the strategies used to sensibly merge the two production systems, including the storage architecture, shared system policies, and scheduler priority configurations that honor funding complexities.
items.abstract_zh: 佐治亚理工学院 (GT) 的高级计算环境合作伙伴 (PACE) 五年来一直在运行两个校园范围内的集群资源，可用于学术课程和研讨会。最初的设计重点是基于 PACE 和计算机学院 (COC) 的合作伙伴关系，为广泛的教育主题创建联合资源。由于资金原因，这采取了单独资源的形式，一个由 PACE 资助，另一个由 COC 资助。这些“教学集群环境”PACE-ICE 和 COC-ICE 非常受 GT 教师的欢迎，但由于环境的分裂性质，导致了高昂的维护成本。随着向 Slurm 调度程序的过渡，PACE 与 COC 合作将两个集群合并为一个集群，即 ICE。这项工作详细介绍了用于合理合并两个生产系统的策略，包括存储架构、共享系统策略和满足资金复杂性的调度程序优先级配置。

items.title: Analysis and Characterization of Performance Variability for OpenMP Runtime.
items.abstract: In the high performance computing (HPC) domain, performance variability is a major scalability issue for parallel computing applications with heavy synchronization and communication. In this paper, we present an experimental performance analysis of OpenMP benchmarks regarding the variation of execution time, and determine the potential factors causing performance variability. Our work offers some understanding of performance distributions and directions for future work on how to mitigate variability for OpenMP-based applications. Two representative OpenMP benchmarks from the EPCC OpenMP micro-benchmark suite and BabelStream are run across two x86 multicore platforms featuring up to 256 threads. From the obtained results, we characterize and explain the execution time variability as a function of thread-pinning, simultaneous multithreading (SMT) and core frequency variation.
items.abstract_zh: 在高性能计算 (HPC) 领域，性能可变性是具有大量同步和通信的并行计算应用程序的主要可扩展性问题。在本文中，我们针对执行时间的变化对 OpenMP 基准测试进行了实验性性能分析，并确定了导致性能变化的潜在因素。我们的工作提供了对性能分布的一些了解，以及未来如何减轻基于 OpenMP 的应用程序的可变性的工作方向。 EPCC OpenMP 微基准测试套件和 BabelStream 中的两个代表性 OpenMP 基准测试在两个具有多达 256 个线程的 x86 多核平台上运行。根据获得的结果，我们将执行时间变化描述为线程固定、同时多线程 (SMT) 和核心频率变化的函数，并将其解释为函数。

items.title: Using Azure Quantum Resource Estimator for Assessing Performance of Fault Tolerant Quantum Computation.
items.abstract: The automatic resource estimation tools provided by Azure Quantum and Microsoft Quantum Development Kit are described, which enable the evaluation of the resources required to run algorithms on fault-tolerant quantum computers. An example is given of obtaining resource estimates for quantum fault-tolerant implementations of several multiplication algorithms.
items.abstract_zh: 介绍了 Azure Quantum 和 Microsoft Quantum 开发套件提供的自动资源估计工具，该工具可以评估在容错量子计算机上运行算法所需的资源。给出了获取几种乘法算法的量子容错实现的资源估计的示例。

items.title: High-level GPU code: a case study examining JAX and OpenMP.
items.abstract: In recent years, a new scientific software design pattern has emerged, pairing a Python interface with high-performance kernels in lower-level languages. The rise of general-purpose GPUs necessitates the rewriting of many such kernels, which poses challenges in GPU programming and ensures future portability and flexibility. This paper documents our experience and observations during the process of porting TOAST, a cosmology software framework designed to take full advantage of a supercomputer, to work with GPUs. This exploration led us to compare two different porting strategies: utilizing the JAX Python library and employing OpenMP Target Offload compiler directives. JAX allows kernel code to be written in pure Python, whereas OpenMP Target Offload is a directive-based strategy that integrates seamlessly with our existing OpenMP-accelerated C++ kernels. Both frameworks are high-level, abstracting system architecture details while aiming for straightforward, portable, yet performant GPU code. Through the porting of a dozen kernels, we delve into the analysis of development cost, performance, and the viability of employing either of these frameworks for complex numerical Python applications.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，出现了一种新的科学软件设计模式，将 Python 界面与低级语言的高性能内核配对。通用GPU的兴起需要重写许多此类内核，这对GPU编程提出了挑战，并确保了未来的可移植性和灵活性。本文记录了我们在移植 TOAST（一个旨在充分利用超级计算机的宇宙学软件框架）以与 GPU 配合使用的过程中的经验和观察。这种探索使我们比较了两种不同的移植策略：利用 JAX Python 库和使用 OpenMP Target Offload 编译器指令。 JAX 允许用纯 Python 编写内核代码，而 OpenMP Target Offload 是一种基于指令的策略，可与我们现有的 OpenMP 加速 C++ 内核无缝集成。这两个框架都是高层框架，抽象了系统架构细节，同时旨在实现简单、可移植且高性能的 GPU 代码。通过移植十几个内核，我们深入分析了开发成本、性能以及将这些框架用于复杂数值 Python 应用程序的可行性。

items.title: An Efficient Distributed Graph Engine for Deep Learning on Graphs.
items.abstract: Traditional graph-processing algorithms have been widely used in Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). This combination has shown state-of-the-art performance in many real-world network mining tasks. Current approaches to graph processing in deep learning face two main problems. On the one hand, easy-to-use deep learning libraries lack support for widely used graph-processing algorithms and do not provide low-level APIs for building distributed graph-processing algorithms. On the other hand, existing graph-processing libraries are not user-friendly for deep learning researchers. Their graph primitives are not designed for batch processing, which is essential for deep learning use cases. In this paper, we present an efficient and easy-to-use graph engine that incorporates distributed graph processing into deep learning ecosystems. We develop a distributed graph storage system with an efficient batching technique to minimize communication overhead incurred by Remote Procedure Calls (RPC) between computing nodes. We propose an optimized method for distributed computation of Single Source Personalized PageRank (SSPPR) using the Forward Push algorithm based on lock-free parallel maps. Experimental evaluations demonstrate significant improvement, with up to three orders of magnitude in SSPPR throughput, of our graph engine compared with the tensor-based implementation. Both methods offer necessary usability with tensor operations, which are widely used for graph processing in current deep graph libraries.
items.abstract_zh: 传统的图处理算法已广泛应用于图神经网络（GNN）中。这种组合在许多现实世界的网络挖掘任务中表现出了最先进的性能。当前深度学习中的图形处理方法面临两个主要问题。一方面，易于使用的深度学习库缺乏对广泛使用的图处理算法的支持，并且不提供用于构建分布式图处理算法的低级 API。另一方面，现有的图形处理库对于深度学习研究人员来说并不方便。它们的图基元并不是为批处理而设计的，而批处理对于深度学习用例至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种高效且易于使用的图引擎，它将分布式图处理纳入深度学习生态系统。我们开发了一种分布式图存储系统，采用高效的批处理技术，以最大限度地减少计算节点之间远程过程调用（RPC）产生的通信开销。我们提出了一种使用基于无锁并行映射的前向推送算法的单源个性化 PageRank (SSPPR) 分布式计算的优化方法。实验评估表明，与基于张量的实现相比，我们的图形引擎有了显着的改进，SSPPR 吞吐量提高了三个数量级。这两种方法都提供了张量操作的必要可用性，这些操作广泛用于当前深度图库中的图处理。

items.title: Infrastructure for Writing Fork-Join Tests.
items.abstract: We have developed a software infrastructure for testing multi-threaded programs that implement the fork-join concurrency model. The infrastructure employs several key ideas: The student solutions use print statements to trace the execution of the fork-join phases. The test writer provides a high-level specification of the problem-specific aspects of the traces, which is used by the infrastructure to handle the problem-independent and low-level details of processing the traces. During performance testing, trace output is disabled automatically. During functionality testing, fine-grained feedback is provided to identify the correct and incorrect implementation of the various fork-join phases. Tests written using our infrastructure have been used in an instructor-training workshop as an instructor agent clarifying requirements and checking in-progress work. The size of the code to check the concurrency correctness of final and intermediate results was far smaller than the code to check the serial correctness of such results.
items.abstract_zh: 我们开发了一个软件基础设施，用于测试实现 fork-join 并发模型的多线程程序。该基础设施采用了几个关键思想： 学生解决方案使用打印语句来跟踪 fork-join 阶段的执行。测试编写器提供了跟踪的特定于问题的方面的高级规范，基础设施使用它来处理处理跟踪的与问题无关的低级细节。在性能测试期间，跟踪输出会自动禁用。在功能测试期间，提供细粒度的反馈来识别各个 fork-join 阶段的正确和错误实现。使用我们的基础设施编写的测试已在讲师培训研讨会中使用，作为讲师代理澄清要求并检查正在进行的工作。检查最终结果和中间结果的并发正确性的代码的大小远远小于检查此类结果的串行正确性的代码的大小。

items.title: Fine-grained accelerator partitioning for Machine Learning and Scientific Computing in Function as a Service Platform.
items.abstract: Function-as-a-service (FaaS) is a promising execution environment for high-performance computing (HPC) and machine learning (ML) applications as it offers developers a simple way to write and deploy programs. Nowadays, GPUs and other accelerators are indispensable for HPC and ML workloads. These accelerators are expensive to acquire and operate; consequently, multiplexing them can increase their financial profitability. However, we have observed that state-of-the-art FaaS frameworks usually treat accelerator as a single device to run single workload and have little support for multiplexing accelerators.
items.abstract_zh: 功能即服务 (FaaS) 是高性能计算 (HPC) 和机器学习 (ML) 应用程序的一种很有前途的执行环境，因为它为开发人员提供了一种编写和部署程序的简单方法。如今，GPU 和其他加速器对于 HPC 和 ML 工作负载来说是不可或缺的。这些加速器的获取和运营成本高昂；因此，对它们进行多路复用可以提高它们的财务盈利能力。然而，我们观察到，最先进的 FaaS 框架通常将加速器视为运行单个工作负载的单个设备，并且对多路复用加速器的支持很少。

items.title: Protein Generation via Genome-scale Language Models with Bio-physical Scoring.
items.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) trained on vast biological datasets can learn biological motifs and correlations across the evolutionary landscape of natural proteins. LLMs can then be used for de novo design of novel proteins with specific structures, functions, and physicochemical properties. We employ a pre-trained genome-scale language model that uses codons as tokens and integrate it into a workflow for targeted generation of sequences. Our framework suggests new gene sequences that are ranked for downstream evaluation by metrics that collectively capture extensive sequence-specific, biophysical, and biochemical properties. We demonstrate our integrated workflow to design novel variants of the enzyme, malate dehydrogenase (MDH), that exhibit more favorable activation energies than their natural counterparts (reduction of 4.01 kJ/mol) with sustained sequence generation rates of ∼ 104/hr and simulation rates of ∼ 102/hr on 64 nodes of Polaris with about 99.7 system utilization during the run.
