items.abstract_zh: 在大量生物数据集上训练的大型语言模型 (LLM) 可以学习天然蛋白质进化景观中的生物基序和相关性。然后，法学硕士可用于从头设计具有特定结构、功能和理化性质的新型蛋白质。我们采用预先训练的基因组规模语言模型，该模型使用密码子作为标记，并将其集成到工作流程中以有针对性地生成序列。我们的框架建议新的基因序列，通过共同捕获广泛的序列特异性、生物物理和生化特性的指标对下游评估进行排序。我们展示了我们的集成工作流程来设计苹果酸脱氢酶 (MDH) 的新变体，其比天然对应物表现出更有利的激活能（减少 4.01 kJ/mol），在 Polaris 的 64 个节点上持续序列生成速率为 ∼ 104/小时，模拟速率为 ∼ 102/小时，运行期间系统利用率约为 99.7。

items.title: Evaluating HPX and Kokkos on RISC-V using an astrophysics application Octo-Tiger.
items.abstract: In recent years, computers based on the RISC-V architecture have raised broad interest in the high-performance computing (HPC) community. As the RISC-V community develops the core instruction set architecture (ISA) along with ISA extensions, the HPC community has been actively ensuring HPC applications and environments [10, 29] are supported. In this context, assessing the performance of asynchronous many-task runtime systems (AMT) is essential. In this paper, we describe our experience with porting of a full 3D adaptive mesh-refinement, multi-scale, multi-model, and multi-physics application, Octo-Tiger, that is based on the HPX AMT, and we explore its performance characteristics on different RISC-V systems. Despite the (limited) capabilities of the RISC-V test systems we used, Octo-Tiger already shows promising results and good scaling. We, however, expect that additional hardware support based on dedicated ISA extensions (such as single-cycle context switches, extended atomic operations, and direct support for HPX’s global address space) would allow for even better performance results.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，基于RISC-V架构的计算机引起了高性能计算（HPC）界的广泛兴趣。随着 RISC-V 社区开发核心指令集架构 (ISA) 以及 ISA 扩展，HPC 社区一直在积极确保 HPC 应用程序和环境 [10, 29] 得到支持。在这种情况下，评估异步多任务运行时系统 (AMT) 的性能至关重要。在本文中，我们描述了基于 HPX AMT 的全 3D 自适应网格细化、多尺度、多模型和多物理应用程序 Octo-Tiger 的移植经验，并探讨了其在不同 RISC-V 系统上的性能特征。尽管我们使用的 RISC-V 测试系统的功能有限，但 Octo-Tiger 已经显示出有希望的结果和良好的扩展性。然而，我们期望基于专用 ISA 扩展（例如单周期上下文切换、扩展原子操作以及对 HPX 全局地址空间的直接支持）的额外硬件支持将带来更好的性能结果。

items.title: HPC-GPT: Integrating Large Language Model for High-Performance Computing.
items.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs), including the LLaMA model, have exhibited their efficacy across various general-domain natural language processing (NLP) tasks. However, their performance in high-performance computing (HPC) domain tasks has been less than optimal due to the specialized expertise required to interpret the model’s responses. In response to this challenge, we propose HPC-GPT, a novel LLaMA-based model that has been supervised fine-tuning using generated QA (Question-Answer) instances for the HPC domain. To evaluate its effectiveness, we concentrate on two HPC tasks: managing AI models and datasets for HPC, and data race detection. By employing HPC-GPT, we demonstrate comparable performance with existing methods on both tasks, exemplifying its excellence in HPC-related scenarios. Our experiments on open-source benchmarks yield extensive results, underscoring HPC-GPT’s potential to bridge the performance gap between LLMs and HPC-specific tasks. With HPC-GPT, we aim to pave the way for LLMs to excel in HPC domains, simplifying the utilization of language models in complex computing applications.
items.abstract_zh: 包括 LLaMA 模型在内的大型语言模型 (LLM) 已在各种通用领域自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务中展示了其功效。然而，由于解释模型响应所需的专业知识，它们在高性能计算 (HPC) 领域任务中的性能并未达到最佳。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 HPC-GPT，这是一种基于 LLaMA 的新型模型，该模型已使用 HPC 领域生成的 QA（问题-答案）实例进行监督微调。为了评估其有效性，我们专注于两项 HPC 任务：管理 HPC 的 AI 模型和数据集以及数据竞争检测。通过采用 HPC-GPT，我们在这两项任务上展示了与现有方法相当的性能，体现了其在 HPC 相关场景中的卓越性能。我们在开源基准测试上的实验产生了广泛的结果，强调了 HPC-GPT 弥合法学硕士和 HPC 特定任务之间性能差距的潜力。通过 HPC-GPT，我们的目标是为法学硕士在 HPC 领域取得优异成绩铺平道路，简化复杂计算应用程序中语言模型的使用。

items.title: Trigger Smart Data Saving Applied to CO2 Capture in Metal-Organic Frameworks.
items.abstract: Facing the need for carbon emission reduction, processes such as CO2 capture in nanoporous Metal-Organic Frameworks (MOFs) have emerged. However, such processes still need to be improved, by understanding the dynamic properties of CO2 molecules when confined in MOF nanopores. To do so, molecular dynamics (MD) simulations are run for several millions of iterations, enabling to accurately compute the CO2 residency time. Nevertheless, this dynamical parameter remains challenging to compute by standard post-processing approaches and may require terabytes of memory when data are saved after each iteration. To tackle this issue, we developed a trigger-based in situ approach that saves only the relevant data. We implement it by instrumenting the LAMMPS MD code with the SENSEI/Python in situ API. We show that this approach reduces the quantity of data saved by 4 orders of magnitude and can be up to 14% faster than traditional MD simulations without in situ processing.
items.abstract_zh: 面对减少碳排放的需求，纳米多孔金属有机框架（MOF）中二氧化碳捕获等工艺应运而生。然而，通过了解 CO2 分子被限制在 MOF 纳米孔中时的动态特性，此类过程仍需要改进。为此，分子动力学 (MD) 模拟会运行数百万次迭代，从而能够准确计算二氧化碳停留时间。然而，通过标准后处理方法计算该动态参数仍然具有挑战性，并且在每次迭代后保存数据时可能需要数 TB 的内存。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种基于触发器的原位方法，仅保存相关数据。我们通过使用 SENSEI/Python 现场 API 检测 LAMMPS MD 代码来实现它。我们证明，这种方法将保存的数据量减少了 4 个数量级，并且比无需原位处理的传统 MD 模拟快 14%。

items.title: WisdomWombat: A polyglot dataflow CFD code using Python and Dragon.
items.abstract: We present a prototype solution for a polyglot computational fluid dynamics code using the Python Multiprocessing API and Dragon. The code uses an actor-based dataflow architecture with a directed graph to explicitly express program execution including parallelization and asynchronous communication. Computation-heavy parts are covered with individual Fortran executables, the shared state description is written in C with Fortran and Cython wrappers. Our code demonstrates data flow programming in Python for a classical tightly coupled HPC problem, combining cloud-native programming paradigms with HPC communication techniques like RDMA through the Dragon runtime. We demonstrate how a scalable software architecture for classical HPC, AI/ML and HPC workflow applications could look like in the future.
items.abstract_zh: 我们使用 Python 多处理 API 和 Dragon 提出了多语言计算流体动力学代码的原型解决方案。该代码使用基于参与者的数据流架构和有向图来显式表达程序执行，包括并行化和异步通信。计算量大的部分由单独的 Fortran 可执行文件覆盖，共享状态描述由 Fortran 和 Cython 包装器用 C 语言编写。我们的代码演示了针对经典紧密耦合 HPC 问题的 Python 数据流编程，通过 Dragon 运行时将云原生编程范例与 RDMA 等 HPC 通信技术相结合。我们展示了经典 HPC、AI/ML 和 HPC 工作流程应用程序的可扩展软件架构在未来的样子。

items.title: Evaluating the Potential of Elastic Jobs in HPC Systems.
items.abstract: It is generally assumed that elastic parallel applications, with the ability to dynamically resize their process count, would provide numerous benefits to High-Performance Computing (HPC) systems and applications. Supporting this capability, however, requires significant effort at several layers of the HPC software stack. At a minimum, the resource management system, the distributed communication libraries, and the distributed applications themselves would have to explicitly support elasticity. With this level of widespread support required, there must be significant motivation for developers to commit to adding this capability. We aim to determine whether there are practical benefits to supporting elasticity by simulating HPC systems with support for elastic jobs using real-world job data. Our simulations show significant improvements of adding elastic jobs with up to 35.34% higher system utilization, 75.3% lower runtime, 99.76% lower wait time, and 75.22% lower total turnaround time.
items.abstract_zh: 人们普遍认为，能够动态调整进程数量的弹性并行应用程序将为高性能计算 (HPC) 系统和应用程序带来诸多好处。然而，支持此功能需要在 HPC 软件堆栈的多个层上付出巨大努力。至少，资源管理系统、分布式通信库和分布式应用程序本身必须明确支持弹性。由于需要这种程度的广泛支持，开发人员必须有很大的动力致力于添加此功能。我们的目标是通过使用真实工作数据来模拟支持弹性工作的 HPC 系统，以确定支持弹性是否有实际好处。我们的模拟显示，添加弹性作业有显着改进，系统利用率提高了 35.34%，运行时间缩短了 75.3%，等待时间缩短了 99.76%，总周转时间缩短了 75.22%。

items.title: GPU Acceleration in Unikernels Using Cricket GPU Virtualization.
items.abstract: Today, large compute clusters increasingly move towards heterogeneous architectures by employing accelerators, such as GPUs, to realize ever-increasing performance. To achieve maximum performance on these architectures, applications have to be tailored to the available hardware by using special APIs to interact with the hardware resources, such as the CUDA APIs for NVIDIA GPUs. Simultaneously, unikernels emerge as a solution for the increasing overhead introduced by the complexity of modern operating systems and their inability to optimize for specific application profiles. Unikernels allow for better static code checking and enable optimizations impossible with monolithic kernels, yielding more robust and faster programs. Despite this, there is a lack of support for using GPUs in unikernels. Due to the proprietary nature of the CUDA APIs, direct support for interacting with NVIDIA GPUs from unikernels is infeasible, resulting in applications requiring GPUs being unsuitable for deployment in unikernels.
items.abstract_zh: 如今，大型计算集群越来越多地转向异构架构，通过使用 GPU 等加速器来实现不断提高的性能。为了在这些架构上实现最大性能，必须通过使用特殊 API 与硬件资源交互（例如用于 NVIDIA GPU 的 CUDA API）来根据可用硬件定制应用程序。同时，unikernels 作为一种解决方案出现，解决了现代操作系统的复杂性及其无法针对特定应用程序配置文件进行优化所带来的不断增加的开销。 Unikernels 允许更好的静态代码检查，并实现单片内核不可能实现的优化，从而产生更健壮、更快的程序。尽管如此，在 unikernels 中仍缺乏对使用 GPU 的支持。由于 CUDA API 的专有性质，直接支持从 unikernels 与 NVIDIA GPU 交互是不可行的，导致需要 GPU 的应用程序不适合在 unikernels 中部署。

items.title: Checkpoint/Restart for CUDA Kernels.
items.abstract: In HPC clusters, it has become common to employ Checkpoint/Restart (C/R), that is, saving the execution state of applications in order to restore their computational progress at a later point in time. The benefits of this technique for clusters include more flexibility when reacting to changing workloads and an increased fault tolerance. While many clusters already benefit from C/R tools for traditional CPU applications, there is a lack of comparable tools enabling preemptive and transparent C/R for heterogeneous computing, where applications execute partly on accelerator devices, such as s. This is despite the increasing use of s as accelerators in High-Performance Computing (HPC) clusters. Therefore, we propose a novel C/R tool that enables saving the execution state of CUDA kernels, thus allowing preemptive C/R of applications without the need to wait for kernels to finish. We show that full-featured C/R for NVIDIA s is possible despite the proprietary nature of the hardware and software of these devices.
items.abstract_zh: 在 HPC 集群中，采用检查点/重启 (C/R) 已变得很常见，即保存应用程序的执行状态，以便在以后的某个时间点恢复其计算进度。这种技术对集群的好处包括在响应不断变化的工作负载时具有更大的灵活性以及更高的容错能力。虽然许多集群已经受益于传统 CPU 应用程序的 C/R 工具，但缺乏支持异构计算的抢占式和透明 C/R 的类似工具，其中应用程序部分在加速器设备（例如 s）上执行。尽管在高性能计算 (HPC) 集群中越来越多地使用 s 作为加速器，但情况仍然如此。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的 C/R 工具，可以保存 CUDA 内核的执行状态，从而允许抢占式 C/R 应用程序，而无需等待内核完成。我们证明，尽管这些设备的硬件和软件具有专有性质，但 NVIDIA 的全功能 C/R 是可能的。

items.title: End-to-End Workflows for Climate Science: Integrating HPC Simulations, Big Data Processing, and Machine Learning.
items.abstract: Current scientific workflow systems do not typically integrate simulation-centric and data-centric aspects due to their very different software/infrastructure requirements. A transparent integration of such components into a single end-to-end workflow would lead to a more efficient and automated way for generating insights from large simulation data. This work presents a complex case study related to extreme events analysis of future climate data that integrates in the same workflow numerical simulations, Big Data analytics and Machine Learning models. The case study is being implemented in the context of the eFlows4HPC project using the project’s software stack for deployment and orchestration of the workflow. The solution implemented in the project has shown to simplify the development and execution of end-to-end climate workflows with heterogeneous software requirements. Moreover, such an approach can, in the long term, increase the reuse of workflows by scientists and their portability over different HPC infrastructures.
items.abstract_zh: 当前的科学工作流程系统通常不会集成以模拟为中心和以数据为中心的方面，因为它们的软件/基础设施要求截然不同。将这些组件透明地集成到单个端到端工作流程中将带来一种更高效、更自动化的方式来从大型模拟数据中生成见解。这项工作提出了一个与未来气候数据的极端事件分析相关的复杂案例研究，该案例集成在相同的工作流程数值模拟、大数据分析和机器学习模型中。该案例研究是在 eFlows4HPC 项目的背景下实施的，使用该项目的软件堆栈来部署和编排工作流程。该项目中实施的解决方案已证明可以简化具有异构软件需求的端到端气候工作流程的开发和执行。此外，从长远来看，这种方法可以提高科学家对工作流程的重用及其在不同 HPC 基础设施上的可移植性。

items.title: msr-genie: Navigating Model Specific Registers Across Processor Generations.
items.abstract: Performance tuning of High-Performance Computing (HPC) applications depends on sophisticated tuning of parameters on diverse architectures. These parameters are made available by vendors through low-level dials such as model-specific registers (MSRs). While the MSRs themselves provide a powerful mechanism for users to monitor and control processor features, accessing them is laborious due to lack of standard interfaces and clear documentation. As a result, the burden of determining which MSRs to consider and how to fine-tune them for an application lies with the end user. In this paper, we present msr-genie, an efficient and extensible query tool that reduces this user-level burden. The tool allows them to query bi-directionally across MSR lists as well as processor families and models, and provides them with guidance on appropriate bitmasks. The msr-genie tool is open-source and easily extensible, and we demonstrate its effectiveness with over thirty Intel processor models and over two-thousand unique MSRs.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 应用程序的性能调整取决于不同架构上参数的复杂调整。这些参数由供应商通过低级拨号（例如特定于型号的寄存器（MSR））提供。虽然 MSR 本身为用户提供了强大的机制来监视和控制处理器功能，但由于缺乏标准接口和清晰的文档，访问它们很费力。因此，确定要考虑哪些 MSR 以及如何针对应用程序对其进行微调的责任由最终用户承担。在本文中，我们提出了 msr-genie，这是一种高效且可扩展的查询工具，可以减轻用户级的负担。该工具允许他们跨 MSR 列表以及处理器系列和型号进行双向查询，并为他们提供有关适当位掩码的指导。 msr-genie 工具是开源的且易于扩展，我们通过 30 多个英特尔处理器型号和 2000 多个独特的 MSR 展示了其有效性。

items.title: Efficient Probabilistic Tuning of Ensemble Forecasting Method.
items.abstract: Ensemble forecasting techniques are gaining popularity in the weather and renewable energy communities, thanks to their ability to produce accurate predictions and at the same time to provide a measure of the uncertainty in the forecast. Analog ensemble techniques are a class of computationally efficient ensemble forecasting methods that predict future weather events based on historical similar cases (i.e., analogs). The definition of "similar" is dependent on the type of predictors used for searching in the historical dataset, and on how relevant they are to identify a similar weather event happened in the past. For a given geographical location, the relevancy of a predictor in identifying good analogs requires a long tuning process usually performed via brute-force. Although highly parallelizable, the brute-force tuning approach becomes unfeasible when large datasets and/or many predictors are used, even on modern supercomputers equipped with powerful accelerators. In this work, we provide several probabilistic alternatives to the tuning process, based on the dataset size, computational cost of a single evaluation, and number of predictors.
items.abstract_zh: 集合预报技术在天气和可再生能源领域越来越受欢迎，因为它们能够产生准确的预测，同时提供预测中不确定性的衡量标准。模拟集合技术是一类计算高效的集合预报方法，可根据历史类似案例（即模拟）预测未来的天气事件。 “相似”的定义取决于用于在历史数据集中搜索的预测变量的类型，以及它们与识别过去发生的类似天气事件的相关程度。对于给定的地理位置，预测器在识别良好类似物方面的相关性需要通常通过强力执行的漫长调整过程。尽管高度并行化，但当使用大型数据集和/或许多预测器时，即使在配备强大加速器的现代超级计算机上，强力调整方法也变得不可行。在这项工作中，我们根据数据集大小、单次评估的计算成本和预测变量的数量，为调整过程提供了几种概率替代方案。

items.title: Lossy and Lossless Compression for BioFilm Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT).
items.abstract: Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) is a fast and non-destructive technology for bacterial biofilm imaging. However, OCT generates approximately 100 GB per flow cell, which complicates storage and data sharing. Data reduction reduces data complications by reducing overhead and the amount of data transferred. This work leverages the similarities between layers of OCT images to minimize data in order to improve compression. This paper evaluates 5 lossless and 2 lossy state-of-the-art compressors as well as 2 pre-processing techniques to reduce OCT data. Reduction techniques are evaluated to determine which compressor has the most significant compression ratio while maintaining a strong bandwidth and minimal image distortion. Results show SZ with frame before pre-processing is able to achieve the highest CR of 204.6 × on its higher error bounds. The maximum compression bandwidth SZ on higher error bounds is ∼ 41MB/s, for decompression bandwidth, it is able to outperform ZFP achieving ∼ 67MB/s.
items.abstract_zh: 光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 是一种快速、无损的细菌生物膜成像技术。然而，OCT 每个流动池生成约 100 GB 的数据，这使存储和数据共享变得复杂。数据缩减通过减少开销和传输的数据量来减少数据复杂性。这项工作利用 OCT 图像层之间的相似性来最小化数据，从而提高压缩率。本文评估了 5 种无损和 2 种有损最先进的压缩器以及 2 种用于减少 OCT 数据的预处理技术。评估缩减技术以确定哪种压缩器具有最显着的压缩比，同时保持强大的带宽和最小的图像失真。结果表明，预处理前帧的 SZ 能够在其较高的误差范围内实现 204.6 × 的最高 CR。在较高误差范围上的最大压缩带宽 SZ 为 ∼ 41MB/s，对于解压缩带宽，它能够超越 ZFP，达到 ∼ 67MB/s。

items.title: Perspectives and Experiences Supporting Containers for Research Computing at the Texas Advanced Computing Center.
items.abstract: Containers are becoming essential to support the diversity of scientific computing workloads at academic computing centers. Here, we offer perspectives and experiences from the Texas Advanced Computing Center on: the installation, configuration, and support of select containerization platforms; incorporation of containers into the module system to improve their discoverability and usability; facilitation of advanced use cases including MPI containers, GPU containers, and support for multiple instruction set architectures; and finally instruction on best practices to end users through workshops and university courses. We will briefly discuss case studies that highlight the importance of supporting containers for research computing.
items.abstract_zh: 容器对于支持学术计算中心科学计算工作负载的多样性变得至关重要。在这里，我们提供德克萨斯高级计算中心在以下方面的观点和经验：选定容器化平台的安装、配置和支持；将容器合并到模块系统中以提高其可发现性和可用性；促进高级用例，包括 MPI 容器、GPU 容器以及对多指令集架构的支持；最后通过研讨会和大学课程向最终用户提供最佳实践指导。我们将简要讨论强调支持研究计算容器重要性的案例研究。

items.title: Using Benford's Law to Identify Unusual Failure Regions.
items.abstract: Fault tolerance remains a key challenge for current high performance computing systems. Effective and efficient scheduling of mitigation methods continues to be a critical issue in the face of dynamic and difficult-to-predict error rates found on many systems. Using failure data from the Astra supercomputer, we examine the efficacy of a simple method to determine if a sliding window of recent failures contains an unusual pattern of errors. Specifically, we investigate using Benford’s Law to predict the likelihood that the system is currently in a period of unusual failure occurrences. While still in its initial stages, this work provides critical analysis of failure status for extreme-scale systems and a simple form of prediction for determining when the scheduling of failure mitigation may be suboptimal and needs to be reevaluated due to the unusual pattern of errors that are occurring.
items.abstract_zh: 容错仍然是当前高性能计算系统的一个关键挑战。面对许多系统上发现的动态且难以预测的错误率，有效且高效的缓解方法调度仍然是一个关键问题。使用来自 Astra 超级计算机的故障数据，我们检查了一种简单方法的有效性，以确定最近故障的滑动窗口是否包含不寻常的错误模式。具体来说，我们研究使用本福德定律来预测系统当前处于异常故障发生时期的可能性。虽然仍处于初始阶段，但这项工作提供了对极端规模系统的故障状态的关键分析，并提供了一种简单的预测形式，用于确定故障缓解的调度何时可能不是最佳的，并且由于正在发生的异常模式而需要重新评估。

items.title: CARAT KOP: Towards Protecting the Core HPC Kernel from Linux Kernel Modules.
items.abstract: Extending Linux through the kernel module interface can offer immense benefits and capabilities in high performance computing (HPC). These extensions can also be more readily deployed because Linux is the common, typically only, supported OS choice among supercomputing vendors. However, because Linux is monolithic, Linux kernel modules are free to read and write any address with kernel-level permissions. A poorly written—or untrustworthy—module can wreak havoc on the whole system. This unfortunately means that many production HPC systems often do not permit custom kernel modules to be inserted into the system, no matter the benefit.
items.abstract_zh: 通过内核模块接口扩展 Linux 可以在高性能计算 (HPC) 方面提供巨大的优势和功能。这些扩展也可以更容易地部署，因为 Linux 是超级计算供应商中常见的、通常是唯一受支持的操作系统选择。然而，由于Linux是整体的，Linux内核模块可以自由地读写具有内核级权限的任何地址。编写不当或不值得信赖的模块可能会对整个系统造成严重破坏。不幸的是，这意味着许多生产 HPC 系统通常不允许将自定义内核模块插入到系统中，无论有什么好处。

items.title: A gem5 Implementation of the Sequential Codelet Model: Reducing Overhead and Expanding the Software Memory Interface.
items.abstract: Modern tasking models define applications in a fine-grained manner that necessitates lower overhead per segment of computation. Fine-grained tasks, if done right, enable higher utilization of many-core systems. While previous work has seen multiple implementations of hardware support for a variety of tasking models, many lack the support required by the rise of heterogeneity in high performance computing. Moreover, the previously proposed hardware supports are short of supporting the expanding memory interfaces for data-centric needs and memory utilization. In this paper, we propose and implement a hardware support scheme of the sequential codelet model (SCM). The hardware support makes it possible to demonstrate SCM’s potential advantage on heterogeneous workloads and SCM’s capability of supporting the expanding software memory interface. This hardware support can be simulated at the desired scale in gem5 by designing and adding custom hardware modules to a conventional system in simulation, therefore avoiding unnecessary development effort, The gem5 implementation of the Sequential Codelet Model functions as a foundation to demonstrate the benefits offered by the SCM program execution model by moving hardware support closer to program semantics. The implementation utilizes conventional Intel Skylake CPU cores and caches while maintaining an open path to heterogeneity, streaming, and data recoding. Minimal hardware modules per core effectively reduce the overhead of the PXM runtime without removing the possibility of conventional program execution on the system. We compare the overhead with DARTS, a software implementation of the base Codelet Model that has been shown to be an effective vehicle for fine-grained execution, and show a 20x reduction in overhead. The increased efficiency allows for even more finely-grained programs to be effective on the system.
items.abstract_zh: 现代任务分配模型以细粒度的方式定义应用程序，这需要降低每段计算的开销。如果处理得当，细粒度的任务可以提高多核系统的利用率。虽然以前的工作已经看到了对各种任务分配模型的硬件支持的多种实现，但许多缺乏高性能计算中异构性兴起所需的支持。此外，先前提出的硬件支持缺乏支持用于以数据为中心的需求和存储器利用率的扩展存储器接口。在本文中，我们提出并实现了顺序codelet模型（SCM）的硬件支持方案。硬件支持可以展示SCM在异构工作负载上的潜在优势以及SCM支持扩展软件内存接口的能力。通过设计自定义硬件模块并将其添加到模拟中的传统系统，可以在 gem5 中以所需的规模模拟这种硬件支持，从而避免不必要的开发工作。顺序 Codelet 模型的 gem5 实现可作为基础，通过使硬件支持更接近程序语义来演示 SCM 程序执行模型所提供的优势。该实现利用传统的 Intel Skylake CPU 内核和缓存，同时保持异构性、流媒体和数据重新编码的开放路径。每个内核的最少硬件模块有效地减少了 PXM 运行时的开销，而不会消除系统上常规程序执行的可能性。我们将开销与 DARTS 进行比较，DARTS 是基本 Codelet 模型的软件实现，已被证明是细粒度执行的有效工具，并且开销减少了 20 倍。效率的提高使得更细粒度的程序能够在系统上发挥作用。

items.title: FROOM: A Framework of Operators for OTF2 Modification.
items.abstract: In recent years, High Performance Computing (HPC) has become increasingly important for many industries and research areas besides ‘classic’ applications. As new domains emerge, applications, implementations and frameworks become more diverse. Generic performance analysis tools often cannot keep up with the development speed of new approaches for workload distribution, offloading, and communication. Some of the new approaches employ their own performance monitoring, which is difficult to integrate into generic tools designed for traditional HPC. Performance measurements often result in a collection of separate performance logs that logically form a unit but cannot intuitively be investigated together with established performance tools. In this paper, we present a tool library that can be used to combine separate performance logs and separately recorded metrics into one single performance log, enabling investigation of such performance data as a unit. Use cases from Big Data processing and AI show the broad applicability of our approach.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，除了“经典”应用之外，高性能计算 (HPC) 对于许多行业和研究领域也变得越来越重要。随着新领域的出现，应用程序、实现和框架变得更加多样化。通用性能分析工具通常无法跟上工作负载分配、卸载和通信新方法的开发速度。一些新方法采用自己的性能监控，很难集成到为传统 HPC 设计的通用工具中。性能测量通常会产生一组单独的性能日志，这些日志在逻辑上形成一个单元，但无法与已建立的性能工具一起直观地进行调查。在本文中，我们提出了一个工具库，可用于将单独的性能日志和单独记录的指标合并为一个性能日志，从而能够将此类性能数据作为一个单元进行调查。大数据处理和人工智能的用例表明我们的方法具有广泛的适用性。

items.title: CXL Memory as Persistent Memory for Disaggregated HPC: A Practical Approach.
items.abstract: In the landscape of High-Performance Computing (HPC), the quest for efficient and scalable memory solutions remains paramount. The advent of Compute Express Link (CXL) introduces a promising avenue with its potential to function as a Persistent Memory (PMem) solution in the context of disaggregated HPC systems. This paper presents a comprehensive exploration of CXL memory’s viability as a candidate for PMem, supported by physical experiments conducted on cutting-edge multi-NUMA nodes equipped with CXL-attached memory prototypes. Our study not only benchmarks the performance of CXL memory but also illustrates the seamless transition from traditional PMem programming models to CXL, reinforcing its practicality.
items.abstract_zh: 在高性能计算 (HPC) 领域，寻求高效且可扩展的内存解决方案仍然至关重要。 Compute Express Link (CXL) 的出现引入了一条有前途的途径，它具有在分解 HPC 系统环境中充当持久内存 (PMem) 解决方案的潜力。本文对 CXL 内存作为 PMem 候选者的可行性进行了全面的探索，并得到了在配备 CXL 连接内存原型的尖端多 NUMA 节点上进行的物理实验的支持。我们的研究不仅对 CXL 内存的性能进行了基准测试，还说明了从传统 PMem 编程模型到 CXL 的无缝过渡，增强了其实用性。

items.title: CHARM-SYCL: New Unified Programming Environment for Multiple Accelerator Types.
items.abstract: Addressing performance portability across diverse accelerator architectures has emerged as a major challenge in the development of application and programming systems for high-performance computing environments. Although recent programming systems that focus on performance portability have significantly improved productivity in an effort to meet this challenge, the problem becomes notably more complex when compute nodes are equipped with multiple accelerator types—each with unique performance attributes, optimal data layout, and binary formats. To navigate the intricacies of multi-accelerator programming, we propose CHARM-SYCL as an extension of our CHARM multi-accelerator execution environment [27]. This environment will combine our SYCL-based performance-portability programming front end with a back end for extremely heterogeneous architectures as implemented with the IRIS runtime from Oak Ridge National Laboratory. Our preliminary evaluation indicates potential productivity boost and reasonable performance compared to vendor-specific programming system and runtimes.
items.abstract_zh: 解决不同加速器架构之间的性能可移植性已成为高性能计算环境的应用程序和编程系统开发中的主要挑战。尽管最近注重性能可移植性的编程系统已经显着提高了生产力，以应对这一挑战，但当计算节点配备多种加速器类型（每种加速器类型都具有独特的性能属性、最佳数据布局和二进制格式）时，问题变得更加复杂。为了解决多加速器编程的复杂性，我们建议 CHARM-SYCL 作为我们的 CHARM 多加速器执行环境的扩展 [27]。该环境将把我们基于 SYCL 的性能可移植性编程前端与极端异构架构的后端结合起来，如橡树岭国家实验室的 IRIS 运行时所实现的那样。我们的初步评估表明，与供应商特定的编程系统和运行时相比，潜在的生产力提升和合理的性能。

items.title: Value-Based Resource Management at SoC Scale.
items.abstract: Value-based resource management heuristics, which are traditionally deployed in heterogeneous HPC systems, maximize system productivity by assigning resources to each job based on its priority and estimated value gain relative to each job’s completion time. We investigate the utility of value-based resource management at heterogeneous SoC scale and demonstrate its ability to make effective scheduling decisions for time-constrained jobs in oversubscribed systems where system resources are shared by multiple users and applications arrive dynamically. The proposed value-based resource management approach drops tasks that are estimated to result with lower-value gain dynamically with the aim of completing more number of high-value jobs with a scheduling decision time at 120μ s scale. The value-based resource management treats scheduling as a global optimization problem, therefore this study sets a path forward for deploying a unified value-based resource management on a system composed of front-end SoC-based edge devices and a back-end HPC system.
items.abstract_zh: 基于价值的资源管理启发式传统上部署在异构 HPC 系统中，通过根据每个作业的优先级和相对于每个作业完成时间的估计价值增益向每个作业分配资源，从而最大限度地提高系统生产力。我们研究了异构 SoC 规模上基于价值的资源管理的实用性，并展示了其在超额订阅系统中为时间受限的作业做出有效调度决策的能力，其中系统资源由多个用户共享，并且应用程序动态到达。所提出的基于价值的资源管理方法动态地丢弃估计会产生较低价值增益的任务，目的是在 120μs 规模的调度决策时间下完成更多数量的高价值作业。基于价值的资源管理将调度视为全局优化问题，因此本研究为在由前端基于 SoC 的边缘设备和后端 HPC 系统组成的系统上部署统一的基于价值的资源管理指明了道路。

items.title: PoliMOR: A Policy Engine "Made-to-Order" for Automated and Scalable Data Management in Lustre.
items.abstract: Modern supercomputing systems are increasingly reliant on hierarchical, multi-tiered file and storage system architectures due to cost-performance-capacity trade-offs. Within such multi-tiered systems, data management services are required to maintain healthy utilization, performance, and capacity levels. We present PoliMOR, a pragmatic and reliable policy-driven data management framework. PoliMOR is composed of modular, single-purpose agents that gather file system metadata and enforce policies on storage systems. PoliMOR facilitates automated and scalable data management with customizable agents tailored to HPC facility-specific storage systems and policies. Our evaluations demonstrate the scalability and performance of PoliMOR both by its individual agents and as a collective entity. We believe PoliMOR is widely applicable across HPC facilities with large-scale data management challenges and will garner interest from the HPC community, given its flexible and open-source nature.
items.abstract_zh: 由于成本性能容量权衡，现代超级计算系统越来越依赖分层、多层文件和存储系统架构。在此类多层系统中，需要数据管理服务来维持健康的利用率、性能和容量水平。我们推出 PoliMOR，一个务实且可靠的策略驱动数据管理框架。 PoliMOR 由模块化、单一用途的代理组成，用于收集文件系统元数据并在存储系统上实施策略。 PoliMOR 通过针对 HPC 设施特定存储系统和策略量身定制的可定制代理，促进自动化和可扩展的数据管理。我们的评估证明了 PoliMOR 的个体代理和集体实体的可扩展性和性能。我们相信 PoliMOR 广泛适用于面临大规模数据管理挑战的 HPC 设施，并且由于其灵活和开源的性质，将引起 HPC 社区的兴趣。

items.title: Disk Failure Trends in Alpine Storage System.
items.abstract: Large-scale HPC systems demand extensive disk-based storage for data generated by HPC applications, necessitating scalable reliability, availability, and failure management. Extracted failure data from HPC storage offers valuable insights for preventing and managing failures, spanning understanding storage robustness, guiding system design and deployment, and creating durable data protection schemes. This paper introduces a failure dataset from OLCF’s Summit supercomputer’s file system, Alpine, encompassing 4000+ events over 2.75 years from 32000+ disks. Before analysis, we delve into Alpine’s components and introduce IBM Spectrum Scale technology, then assess collected data for failure distribution and burst correlations. We infer that, proximity to enclosure fan modules heightens disk failure rates. Also, burst failure analysis highlights 1/3rd of failures occurring in bursts, with 90% non-spatially correlated, impacting multiple racks.
items.abstract_zh: 大型 HPC 系统需要大量基于磁盘的存储来存储 HPC 应用程序生成的数据，因此需要可扩展的可靠性、可用性和故障管理。从 HPC 存储中提取的故障数据为预防和管理故障、了解存储稳健性、指导系统设计和部署以及创建持久的数据保护方案提供了宝贵的见解。本文介绍了来自 OLCF Summit 超级计算机的文件系统 Alpine 的故障数据集，其中包含 2.75 年来来自 32000 多个磁盘的 4000 多个事件。在分析之前，我们深入研究 Alpine 的组件并介绍 IBM Spectrum Scale 技术，然后评估收集的数据的故障分布和突发相关性。我们推断，靠近机柜风扇模块会增加磁盘故障率。此外，突发故障分析强调了 1/3 的突发故障，其中 90% 不具有空间相关性，影响多个机架。

items.title: Exploring Benchmarks for Self-Driving Labs using Color Matching.
items.abstract: Self Driving Labs (SDLs) that combine automation of experimental procedures with autonomous decision making are gaining popularity as a means of increasing the throughput of scientific workflows. The task of identifying quantities of supplied colored pigments that match a target color, the color matching problem, provides a simple and flexible SDL test case, as it requires experiment proposal, sample creation, and sample analysis, three common components in autonomous discovery applications. We present a robotic solution to the color matching problem that allows for fully autonomous execution of a color matching protocol. Our solution leverages the WEI science factory platform to enable portability across different robotic hardware, the use of alternative optimization methods for continuous refinement, and automated publication of results for experiment tracking and post-hoc analysis.
items.abstract_zh: 将实验程序自动化与自主决策相结合的自动驾驶实验室 (SDL) 作为提高科学工作流程吞吐量的一种手段越来越受欢迎。识别与目标颜色相匹配的供应有色颜料的数量（颜色匹配问题）的任务提供了一个简单且灵活的 SDL 测试用例，因为它需要实验建议、样本创建和样本分析，这是自主发现应用程序中的三个常见组件。我们提出了一种针对颜色匹配问题的机器人解决方案，允许完全自主地执行颜色匹配协议。我们的解决方案利用 WEI 科学工厂平台实现不同机器人硬件之间的可移植性、使用替代优化方法进行持续改进，以及自动发布实验跟踪和事后分析结果。

items.title: RDARuntime: An OS for AI Accelerators.
items.abstract: Today’s supercomputers are more heterogeneous than ever before. As the share of AI workloads in data centers continues to grow, the share of GPUs and AI-specific hardware grows with it. AI accelerators are different from traditional hardware, affecting all aspects of system design, from data-center scale to single-chip scale. AI accelerators are much more efficient than CPUs or GPUs for some HPC workloads, especially in AI for Science. They also add complexity to system architecture, management, and programming. Although runtime frameworks are critical to reducing system complexity, there is little literature describing AI accelerator runtimes. In this paper, we introduce RDARuntime - an AI-specific OS tailored for the development and operation of SambaNova’s reconfigurable dataflow architecture. We discuss the architecture, our design decisions, and some of the results we have achieved, along with some lessons we have learned while helping to deploy the Reconfigurable Dataflow Unit (RDU) to production environments.
items.abstract_zh: 今天的超级计算机比以往任何时候都更加异构。随着数据中心中人工智能工作负载的份额持续增长，GPU 和人工智能专用硬件的份额也随之增长。人工智能加速器不同于传统硬件，影响着系统设计的各个方面，从数据中心规模到单芯片规模。对于某些 HPC 工作负载，特别是在科学人工智能领域，人工智能加速器比 CPU 或 GPU 更高效。它们还增加了系统架构、管理和编程的复杂性。尽管运行时框架对于降低系统复杂性至关重要，但描述人工智能加速器运行时的文献却很少。在本文中，我们介绍 RDARuntime - 一款专为 SambaNova 可重构数据流架构的开发和操作而定制的 AI 专用操作系统。我们讨论了架构、我们的设计决策和我们取得的一些成果，以及我们在帮助将可重新配置数据流单元 (RDU) 部署到生产环境时学到的一些经验教训。

items.title: Julia as a unifying end-to-end workflow language on the Frontier exascale system.
items.abstract: We evaluate Julia as a single language and ecosystem paradigm powered by LLVM to develop workflow components for high-performance computing. We run a Gray-Scott, 2-variable diffusion-reaction application using a memory-bound, 7-point stencil kernel on Frontier, the US Department of Energy’s first exascale supercomputer. We evaluate the performance, scaling, and trade-offs of (i) the computational kernel on AMD’s MI250x GPUs, (ii) weak scaling up to 4,096 MPI processes/GPUs or 512 nodes, (iii) parallel I/O writes using the ADIOS2 library bindings, and (iv) Jupyter Notebooks for interactive analysis. Results suggest that although Julia generates a reasonable LLVM-IR, a nearly 50% performance difference exists vs. native AMD HIP stencil codes when running on the GPUs. As expected, we observed near-zero overhead when using MPI and parallel I/O bindings for system-wide installed implementations. Consequently, Julia emerges as a compelling high-performance and high-productivity workflow composition language, as measured on the fastest supercomputer in the world.
items.abstract_zh: 我们将 Julia 评估为由 LLVM 支持的单一语言和生态系统范式，用于开发高性能计算的工作流程组件。我们在美国能源部第一台百亿亿次超级计算机 Frontier 上使用内存限制的 7 点模板内核运行 Gray-Scott 2 变量扩散反应应用程序。我们评估了以下各项的性能、扩展和权衡：(i) AMD MI250x GPU 上的计算内核，(ii) 弱扩展至 4,096 个 MPI 进程/GPU 或 512 个节点，(iii) 使用 ADIOS2 库绑定的并行 I/O 写入，以及 (iv) 用于交互式分析的 Jupyter Notebook。结果表明，尽管 Julia 生成了合理的 LLVM-IR，但在 GPU 上运行时与本机 AMD HIP 模板代码相比，存在近 50% 的性能差异。正如预期的那样，当使用 MPI 和并行 I/O 绑定进行系统范围安装的实现时，我们发现开销接近于零。因此，根据世界上最快的超级计算机的测量，Julia 成为一种引人注目的高性能和高生产率的工作流组合语言。

items.title: JuliQAOA: Fast, Flexible QAOA Simulation.
items.abstract: We introduce JuliQAOA, a simulation package specifically built for the Quantum Alternating Operator Ansatz (QAOA). JuliQAOA does not require a circuit-level description of QAOA problems, or another package to simulate such circuits, instead relying on a more direct linear algebra implementation. This allows for increased QAOA-specific performance improvements, as well as improved flexibility and generality. JuliQAOA is the first QAOA package designed to aid in the study of both constrained and unconstrained combinatorial optimization problems, and can easily include novel cost functions, mixer Hamiltonians, and other variations. JuliQAOA also includes robust and extensible methods for learning optimal angles. Written in the Julia language, JuliQAOA outperforms existing QAOA software packages and scales well to HPC-level resources.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出 JuliQAOA，这是一个专门为量子交替算子 Ansatz (QAOA) 构建的模拟包。 JuliQAOA 不需要 QAOA 问题的电路级描述，也不需要另一个包来模拟此类电路，而是依赖于更直接的线性代数实现。这可以提高 QAOA 特定的性能改进，并提高灵活性和通用性。 JuliQAOA 是第一个 QAOA 包，旨在帮助研究约束和无约束组合优化问题，并且可以轻松包含新的成本函数、混合器哈密顿量和其他变体。 JuliQAOA 还包括用于学习最佳角度的稳健且可扩展的方法。 JuliQAOA 采用 Julia 语言编写，其性能优于现有的 QAOA 软件包，并且可以很好地扩展到 HPC 级资源。

items.title: Comparing Power Signatures of HPC Workloads: Machine Learning vs Simulation.
items.abstract: Power is a limiting factor for supercomputers limiting their scale and operation. Characterizing the power signatures of different application types can enable data centers to operate efficiently, even when power constrained. This paper investigates power profiles of diverse scientific applications, spanning both traditional simulations and modern machine learning (ML) running on the Perlmutter supercomputer at the National Energy Research Scientific Computing Center (NERSC). Our findings indicate that traditional simulations typically consume more power on average than ML workloads. Furthermore, ML applications exhibit periodic power fluctuations attributed to epoch transitions during training. Finally, we discuss the potential implications of the research insights toward automatic demand response (ADR) and considerations for designing future systems.
items.abstract_zh: 功率是超级计算机限制其规模和运行的限制因素。表征不同应用类型的功率特征可以使数据中心即使在功率受限的情况下也能高效运行。本文研究了不同科学应用的功率分布，涵盖传统模拟和在国家能源研究科学计算中心 (NERSC) 的 Perlmutter 超级计算机上运行的现代机器学习 (ML)。我们的研究结果表明，传统模拟通常比机器学习工作负载平均消耗更多电量。此外，机器学习应用程序会表现出由于训练期间历元转换而导致的周期性功率波动。最后，我们讨论了自动需求响应（ADR）研究见解的潜在影响以及设计未来系统的注意事项。

items.title: Recovering Detectable Uncorrectable Errors via Spatial Data Prediction.
items.abstract: High-performance computing applications are central to advancement in many fields of science and engineering. Central to this advancement is the supposed reliability of the HPC system. However, as system size grows and hardware components run with near-threshold voltages, transient upset events become more likely. Many works have explored the problem of correcting data corruption; however, recovery is often left to checkpoint-restart or application-specific techniques. Recovering from a checkpoint incurs overhead due to reading a checkpoint and recomputing lost work. Allowing the application to recover just the corrupted data enables faster and more efficient recovery. This paper explores using spatial similarities to recover detectable uncorrectable errors. We explore several reconstruction methods and evaluate their effectiveness at recovering corrupted entries in data arrays. Results show that the Lorenzo 1-Layer prediction method yields the best results, with over half of its reconstructions having less than 1% relative error across all applications.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能计算应用程序是许多科学和工程领域进步的核心。这一进步的核心是 HPC 系统的可靠性。然而，随着系统规模的增大和硬件组件以接近阈值的电压运行，瞬态扰乱事件变得更有可能。许多著作探讨了纠正数据损坏的问题；然而，恢复通常留给检查点重启或特定于应用程序的技术。由于读取检查点并重新计算丢失的工作，从检查点恢复会产生开销。允许应用程序仅恢复损坏的数据可以实现更快、更高效的恢复。本文探索使用空间相似性来恢复可检测的不可纠正的错误。我们探索了几种重建方法并评估了它们在恢复数据数组中损坏的条目方面的有效性。结果表明，Lorenzo 1 层预测方法产生了最佳结果，其一半以上的重建在所有应用中的相对误差均小于 1%。

items.title: Dask-Extended External Tasks for HPC/ML In transit Workflows.
items.abstract: In situ workflows are inescapable to fully leverage exascale architectures. They can be complex to build, however, because simulation and data analytics come from two different software ecosystems with their own paradigms and programming models. This work extends the deisa bridging model between MPI+X simulations and distributed task-based analytics; it introduces the concept of external tasks to support the description of analytics graphs spanning multiple timesteps ahead of time while improving scalability. This new approach leads to a straightforward support for contracts between the simulation and analytics graph to limit the data transferred to that actually analyzed in a given execution. We implement this approach using Dask and MPI and evaluate it using an end-to-end in-transit workflow that uses an unsupervised ML model for dimensionality reduction. We compare our work with plain Dask postprocessing and with the previous version of deisa. Our work performs better, up to × 7 for the simulation and × 3 for the analytics compared with deisa, and is × 18 less costly compared with plain Dask—all of these with similar development efforts.
items.abstract_zh: 现场工作流程是充分利用百亿亿级架构所不可避免的。然而，它们的构建可能很复杂，因为模拟和数据分析来自两个不同的软件生态系统，具有自己的范式和编程模型。这项工作扩展了 MPI+X 模拟和基于分布式任务的分析之间的 deisa 桥接模型；它引入了外部任务的概念，以支持提前跨越多个时间步的分析图的描述，同时提高可扩展性。这种新方法可以直接支持模拟和分析图之间的契约，以限制传输到给定执行中实际分析的数据。我们使用 Dask 和 MPI 实现此方法，并使用端到端在途工作流程对其进行评估，该工作流程使用无监督 ML 模型进行降维。我们将我们的工作与普通 Dask 后处理以及 deisa 的先前版本进行比较。与 deisa 相比，我们的工作表现更好，模拟最高可达 × 7，分析最高可达 × 3，并且与普通 Dask 相比成本低 × 18 — 所有这些都具有类似的开发工作。

items.title: Self-service Monitoring of HPC and Openstack Jobs for Users.
items.abstract: Using an HPC or OpenStack cluster is a challenge for all new users, and even for experienced users. This is especially true for non-traditional domains where a cluster is only a tool and not the subject of their research.
items.abstract_zh: 使用 HPC 或 OpenStack 集群对于所有新用户，甚至是经验丰富的用户来说都是一个挑战。对于非传统领域尤其如此，在这些领域中，集群只是一种工具，而不是研究的主题。

items.title: Challenges and Opportunities in the Co-design of Convolutions and RISC-V Vector Processors.
items.abstract: The RISC-V "V" extension introduces vector processing to the RISC-V architecture. Unlike most SIMD extensions, it supports long vectors which can result in significant improvement of multiple applications. In this paper, we present our ongoing research to implement and optimize a vectorized Winograd algorithm used in convolutional layers on RISC-V Vector(RISC-VV) processors. Our study identifies effective techniques for optimizing the kernels of Winograd on RISC-VV using intrinsic instructions, and showcases how certain instructions offer better performance. Our co-design findings suggest that the Winograd algorithm benefits from vector lengths up to 2048 bits and cache sizes up to 64MB.
items.abstract_zh: RISC-V“V”扩展将矢量处理引入了 RISC-V 架构。与大多数 SIMD 扩展不同，它支持长向量，这可以显着改进多个应用程序。在本文中，我们介绍了我们正在进行的研究，以实现和优化 RISC-V Vector (RISC-VV) 处理器上卷积层中使用的矢量化 Winograd 算法。我们的研究确定了使用内在指令优化 RISC-VV 上的 Winograd 内核的有效技术，并展示了某些指令如何提供更好的性能。我们的协同设计结果表明，Winograd 算法受益于高达 2048 位的向量长度和高达 64MB 的缓存大小。

items.title: Experiences Detecting Defective Hardware in Exascale Supercomputers.
items.abstract: In May 2022, the newest supercomputer to top the TOP 500 list was Frontier at Oak Ridge National Laboratory, demonstrating the capability of computing more than 1.1 quintillion (1018) floating-point calculations every second. Driving this ground-breaking rate of computing is Frontier’s more than 37,000 graphics processing units (GPUs) and 9,408 central processing units (CPUs). In total, Frontier contains more than 60 million parts. At this scale, the smallest margin of error may generate hundreds of hardware errors across the system. These errors are capable of directly hindering world-class science performed on Frontier if not found. In this work, we describe and evaluate two strategies for finding hardware-level faults in Frontier’s 9,408 compute nodes. There are two strategies developed: the first uses the Slurm scheduler to scavenge available compute time to run the node screen, the second builds upon the lessons learned in the first strategy and enforces a weekly screen of each node. Using June 2023 as a case study, we find that the first scheduling strategy consumed more than ten times the resources as the second scheduling strategy, but successfully detected five hardware defects in Frontier. We summarize the lessons learned while developing and running a node screen on the world’s first exascale supercomputer.
items.abstract_zh: 2022 年 5 月，橡树岭国家实验室的 Frontier 成为排名前 500 强的最新超级计算机，展示了每秒计算超过 1.1 百亿 (1018) 次浮点计算的能力。推动这一突破性计算速度的是 Frontier 超过 37,000 个图形处理单元 (GPU) 和 9,408 个中央处理单元 (CPU)。 Frontier 总共包含超过 6000 万个零件。在这种规模下，最小的误差范围可能会在整个系统中产生数百个硬件错误。如果没有发现这些错误，可能会直接阻碍 Frontier 上进行的世界级科学研究。在这项工作中，我们描述并评估了两种在 Frontier 的 9,408 个计算节点中查找硬件级故障的策略。开发了两种策略：第一种使用 Slurm 调度程序来清除可用的计算时间来运行节点屏幕，第二种基于第一种策略中吸取的经验教训，并强制每周对每个节点进行屏幕检查。以2023年6月为例，我们发现第一个调度策略消耗的资源是第二个调度策略的十倍以上，但成功检测到了Frontier中的五个硬件缺陷。我们总结了在世界上第一台百亿亿级超级计算机上开发和运行节点屏幕时吸取的经验教训。

items.title: An NSF REU Site Based on Trust and Reproducibility of Intelligent Computation: Experience Report.
items.abstract: This paper presents an overview of an NSF Research Experience for Undergraduate (REU) Site on Trust and Reproducibility of Intelligent Computation, delivered by faculty and graduate students in the Kahlert School of Computing at University of Utah. The chosen themes bring together several concerns for the future in producing computational results that can be trusted: secure, reproducible, based on sound algorithmic foundations, and developed in the context of ethical considerations. The research areas represented by student projects include machine learning, high-performance computing, algorithms and applications, computer security, data science, and human-centered computing. In the first four weeks of the program, the entire student cohort spent their mornings in lessons from experts in these crosscutting topics, and used one-of-a-kind research platforms operated by the University of Utah, namely NSF-funded CloudLab and POWDER facilities; reading assignments, quizzes, and hands-on exercises reinforced the lessons. In the subsequent five weeks, lectures were less frequent, as students branched into small groups to develop their research projects. The final week focused on a poster presentation and final report. Through describing our experiences, this program can serve as a model for preparing a future workforce to integrate machine learning into trustworthy and reproducible applications.
items.abstract_zh: 本文概述了由犹他大学卡勒特计算学院的教师和研究生提供的 NSF 本科生 (REU) 网站关于智能计算的信任和可重复性的研究体验。所选择的主题汇集了对未来产生可信赖的计算结果的几个关注点：安全、可重复、基于合理的算法基础，并在道德考虑的背景下开发。学生项目代表的研究领域包括机器学习、高性能计算、算法与应用、计算机安全、数据科学和以人为中心的计算。在该项目的前四个星期，整个学生群体早上都在听这些交叉主题的专家的课程，并使用了犹他大学运营的独一无二的研究平台，即 NSF 资助的 CloudLab 和 POWDER 设施；阅读作业、测验和实践练习强化了课程内容。在接下来的五周里，讲座的频率减少了，学生们分成小组来开展他们的研究项目。最后一周的重点是海报展示和最终报告。通过描述我们的经验，该计划可以作为未来劳动力准备将机器学习集成到值得信赖和可重复的应用程序中的模型。

items.title: Reducing HPC energy footprint for large scale GPU accelerated workloads.
items.abstract: As the energy cost continues to rise, High Performance Computing (HPC) centers may seek to reduce their energy footprint. This could be implemented as a temporary production shutdown or in a more scientific production friendly way where the machine is able to increase its viability through increased efficiency. In this document we examine the second approach using a French, production ready machine hosted at Centre Informatique National de l'Enseignement Supérieur (CINES) in Montpellier. This machine, Adastra, is based on the AMD MI250X GPU architecture and currently #3 in Green500. Adastra is used by hundreds of French researchers, representing dozens of different applications from different scientific fields. As a base for the study, we define a set of applications representative of our current HPC and AI production workload. In this parametric study, we characterize our very diverse workload by applying a range of frequency capping or power capping policies at the node level in order to build an efficiency profile of each application. Based on the collected results, we produce guidelines trading between pure energy savings (energy to solution) to pure performance (time to solution) for each applications and, more importantly, for the production workload as a whole. We hope the results of this study will be of help to accelerators enabled HPC centers seeking to reduce their energy footprint by applying policies on either accelerators frequency or power capping at the node level.
items.abstract_zh: 随着能源成本持续上升，高性能计算 (HPC) 中心可能会寻求减少能源足迹。这可以通过临时生产关闭或以更科学的生产友好方式来实现，其中机器能够通过提高效率来提高其生存能力。在本文档中，我们使用位于蒙彼利埃国家信息中心 (CINES) 的法国生产就绪机器来研究第二种方法。这台机器 Adastra 基于 AMD MI250X GPU 架构，目前在 Green500 中排名第三。 Adastra 被数百名法国研究人员使用，代表了来自不同科学领域的数十种不同应用。作为研究的基础，我们定义了一组代表我们当前 HPC 和 AI 生产工作负载的应用程序。在这项参数研究中，我们通过在节点级别应用一系列频率上限或功率上限策略来描述我们非常多样化的工作负载，以便构建每个应用程序的效率概况。根据收集的结果，我们为每个应用程序，更重要的是，为整个生产工作负载，制定在纯节能（解决方案的能源）与纯性能（解决方案的时间）之间进行权衡的指南。我们希望这项研究的结果将对启用加速器的 HPC 中心有所帮助，这些中心寻求通过在节点级别应用加速器频率或功率上限政策来减少能源足迹。

items.title: Accelerating In Situ Analysis using Non-volatile Memory.
items.abstract: The relatively slower data transfer speeds resulting in I/O bottlenecks in scientific simulations is one of the critical challenges in exascale computing. Simulations generate large data and analysis applications consume this data to provide time-critical insights. The limited size and high power consumption of Dynamic Random Access Memory (DRAM) capacity leaves slow storage devices as the primary option for large-scale data transfers. Non-volatile memory (NVM) devices such as Intel Optane bridges the gap between storage and volatile memory by providing DRAM-comparable performance and persistence. We present PQueue, a data transfer library for in situ analysis of simulation output using persistent memory. PQueue leverages NVM and provides an API that resembles high-level parallel I/O libraries such as PnetCDF to enable seamless transition for application developers. We achieved a maximum of 7 × improvement in write times and a maximum of 10 × improvement in read times as compared to PnetCDF.
items.abstract_zh: 相对较慢的数据传输速度导致科学模拟中的 I/O 瓶颈，这是百亿亿次计算的关键挑战之一。模拟生成大量数据，分析应用程序使用这些数据来提供时间关键的见解。动态随机存取存储器 (DRAM) 容量的有限尺寸和高功耗使得慢速存储设备成为大规模数据传输的主要选择。英特尔傲腾等非易失性内存 (NVM) 设备通过提供与 DRAM 相当的性能和持久性来弥补存储和易失性内存之间的差距。我们推出了 PQueue，这是一个使用持久内存对模拟输出进行原位分析的数据传输库。 PQueue 利用 NVM 并提供类似于 PnetCDF 等高级并行 I/O 库的 API，为应用程序开发人员提供无缝过渡。与 PnetCDF 相比，我们的写入时间最多缩短了 7 倍，读取时间最多缩短了 10 倍。

items.title: Many Cores, Many Models: GPU Programming Model vs. Vendor Compatibility Overview.
items.abstract: In recent history, GPUs became a key driver of compute performance in HPC. With the installation of the Frontier supercomputer, they became the enablers of the Exascale era; further largest-scale installations are in progress (Aurora, El Capitan, JUPITER). But the early-day dominance by NVIDIA and their CUDA programming model has changed: The current HPC GPU landscape features three vendors (AMD, Intel, NVIDIA), each with native and derived programming models. The choices are ample, but not all models are supported on all platforms, especially if support for Fortran is needed; in addition, some restrictions might apply. It is hard for scientific programmers to navigate this abundance of choices and limits. This paper gives a guide by matching the GPU platforms with supported programming models, presented in a concise table and further elaborated in detailed comments. An assessment is made regarding the level of support of a model on a platform.
items.abstract_zh: 在最近的历史中，GPU 成为 HPC 计算性能的关键驱动因素。随着Frontier超级计算机的安装，他们成为了Exascale时代的推动者；更大规模的安装正在进行中（Aurora、El Capitan、JUPITER）。但 NVIDIA 及其 CUDA 编程模型的早期主导地位已经发生了变化：当前 HPC GPU 领域由三个供应商（AMD、Intel、NVIDIA）组成，每个供应商都有本机和派生编程模型。选择很充足，但并非所有平台都支持所有模型，特别是需要支持 Fortran 时；此外，可能还存在一些限制。对于科学程序员来说，要驾驭如此丰富的选择和限制是很困难的。本文通过将 GPU 平台与支持的编程模型相匹配来提供指导，以简洁的表格形式呈现，并以详细的注释进一步阐述。对平台上模型的支持级别进行评估。

items.title: Machine Learning Applied to Single-Molecule Activity Prediction.
items.abstract: Catalytic processes are used in about 1/3 of US manufacturing, from the field of chemical engineering to renewable energy. Assessing the activity of single-molecules, or individual molecules, is necessary to the development of efficient catalysts. Their heterogeneity structure leads to particle-specific catalytic activity. Experimentation with single-molecules can be time consuming and difficult. We purpose a Machine learning (ML) model that allows chemical researchers to run shorter single-molecule experiments to obtain the same level of results. We use common and widely understood ML methods to reduce complexity and enable accessibility to the chemical engineering community. We reduce the experiment time by up to 83%. Our evaluation shows that a small data set is sufficient to train an acceptable model. 300 experiments are needed, including the validation set. We use a well understood multilayer perceptron (MLP) model. We show that more complex models are not necessary and simpler methods are not sufficient.
items.abstract_zh: 美国约 1/3 的制造业使用催化工艺，从化学工程领域到可再生能源领域。评估单分子或单个分子的活性对于开发高效催化剂是必要的。它们的异质结构导致颗粒特异性催化活性。单分子实验可能既耗时又困难。我们的目的是建立一种机器学习 (ML) 模型，使化学研究人员能够运行更短的单分子实验以获得相同水平的结果。我们使用常见且广泛理解的机器学习方法来降低复杂性并方便化学工程社区的使用。我们将实验时间缩短了 83%。我们的评估表明，小数据集足以训练可接受的模型。需要 300 个实验，包括验证集。我们使用众所周知的多层感知器（MLP）模型。我们表明，更复杂的模型是不必要的，更简单的方法也是不够的。

items.title: Demonstration of Portable Performance of Scientific Machine Learning on High Performance Computing Systems.
items.abstract: With the largest datasets to date and a diverse set of discoveries to be made, the current generation of scientific analyses are well poised to utilize artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) on high performance computing (HPC) resources. Like never before, these workflows can be written in one portable language, python, which thanks to highly-optimized ML libraries achieves excellent cross-platform performance with little to no intervention by the user. In this demonstration, we explore the performance of several scientific AI/ML applications across leading HPC resources and highlight best practices for portable performance.
items.abstract_zh: 凭借迄今为止最大的数据集和一系列多样化的发现，当前一代的科学分析已准备好在高性能计算 (HPC) 资源上利用人工智能 (AI) 和机器学习 (ML)。这些工作流程前所未有地可以用一种可移植语言 Python 编写，得益于高度优化的 ML 库，它可以在几乎不需要用户干预的情况下实现出色的跨平台性能。在此演示中，我们跨领先的 HPC 资源探索了多个科学 AI/ML 应用程序的性能，并重点介绍了便携式性能的最佳实践。

items.title: Localization of Gamma-ray Bursts in a Balloon-Borne Telescope.
items.abstract: Multi-messenger astrophysics combines observations from multiple instruments to study transient astrophysical phenomena, many occurring at seconds-level timescales. To identify and precisely localize these events in the sky, current systems often search through extensive sensor data, requiring resource-intensive computation to achieve results on the timescale of the events themselves. We seek to reduce computational requirements so as to perform real-time event localization with limited computational resources suitable for an orbital platform.
items.abstract_zh: 多信使天体物理学结合了多种仪器的观测来研究瞬态天体物理现象，其中许多现象发生在秒级的时间尺度上。为了识别并精确定位天空中的这些事件，当前的系统通常会搜索大量传感器数据，需要资源密集型计算才能在事件本身的时间尺度上获得结果。我们寻求减少计算需求，以便利用适合轨道平台的有限计算资源来执行实时事件定位。

items.title: QASMTrans: A QASM Quantum Transpiler Framework for NISQ Devices.
items.abstract: The success of a quantum algorithm hinges on the ability to orchestrate a successful application induction. Detrimental overheads in mapping general quantum circuits to physically implementable routines can be the deciding factor between a successful and erroneous circuit induction. In QASMTrans, we focus on the problem of rapid circuit transpilation. Transpilation plays a crucial role in converting high-level, machine-agnostic circuits into machine-specific circuits constrained by physical topology and supported gate sets. The efficiency of transpilation continues to be a substantial bottleneck, especially when dealing with larger circuits requiring high degrees of inter-qubit interaction. QASMTrans is a high-performance C++ quantum transpiler framework that demonstrates 3-1111 × speedups compared to the commonly used Qiskit transpiler. We observe speedups on large dense circuits such as ‘uccsd_n24’ which require gates. QASMTrans successfully transpiles the aforementioned circuits in 7.9s, whilst Qiskit needs 502 seconds with optimization 1 and exceeds an hour of transpilation time with optimization 3. With QASMTrans providing transpiled circuits in a fraction of the time of prior transpilers, potential design space exploration, and heuristic-based transpiler design becomes substantially more tractable. QASMTrans is released at http://github.com/pnnl/qasmtrans.
items.abstract_zh: 量子算法的成功取决于协调成功的应用归纳的能力。将通用量子电路映射到物理上可实现的例程的有害开销可能是成功和错误的电路归纳之间的决定因素。在 QASMTrans 中，我们关注快速电路转译的问题。转换在将高级、与机器无关的电路转换为受物理拓扑和支持的门集约束的机器特定电路方面发挥着至关重要的作用。转译的效率仍然是一个重大瓶颈，特别是在处理需要高度量子位间交互的较大电路时。 QASMTrans 是一种高性能 C++ 量子转译器框架，与常用的 Qiskit 转译器相比，速度提升了 3-1111 倍。我们观察到需要门的大型密集电路（例如“uccsd_n24”）的加速。 QASMTrans 在 7.9 秒内成功转译了上述电路，而 Qiskit 优化 1 需要 502 秒，优化 3 则超过一小时的转译时间。 QASMTrans 提供转译电路的时间仅为先前转译器的一小部分，潜在的设计空间探索和基于启发式的转译器设计变得更加容易处理。 QASMTrans 发布于 http://github.com/pnnl/qasmtrans。

items.title: Fast 2D Bicephalous Convolutional Autoencoder for Compressing 3D Time Projection Chamber Data.
items.abstract: High-energy large-scale particle colliders produce data at high speed in the order of 1 terabytes per second in nuclear physics and petabytes per second in high energy physics. Developing real-time data compression algorithms to reduce such data at high throughput to fit permanent storage has drawn increasing attention. Specifically, at the newly constructed sPHENIX experiment at the Relativistic Heavy Ion Collider (RHIC), a time projection chamber is used as the main tracking detector, which records particle trajectories in a volume of three-dimensional (3D) cylinder. The resulting data are usually very sparse with occupancy around . Such sparsity presents a challenge to conventional learning-free lossy compression algorithms, such as SZ, ZFP, and MGARD. The 3D convolutional neural network (CNN)-based approach, Bicephalous Convolutional Autoencoder (BCAE), outperforms traditional methods both in compression rate and reconstruction accuracy. BCAE can also utilize the computation power of graphical processing units suitable for deployment in a modern heterogeneous high-performance computing environment. This work introduces two BCAE variants: BCAE++ and BCAE-2D. BCAE++ achieves a better compression ratio and a better reconstruction accuracy measured in mean absolute error compared with BCAE. BCAE-2D treats the radial direction as the channel dimension of an image, resulting in a 3 × speedup in compression throughput. In addition, we demonstrate an unbalanced autoencoder with a larger decoder can improve reconstruction accuracy without significantly sacrificing throughput. Lastly, we observe both the BCAE++ and BCAE-2D can benefit more from using half-precision mode in throughput ( increase) without loss in reconstruction accuracy. The source code and links to data and pretrained models can be found at https://github.com/BNL-DAQ-LDRD/NeuralCompression_v2.
items.abstract_zh: 高能大型粒子对撞机在核物理中以每秒 1 TB 的速度高速产生数据，在高能物理中以每秒 PB 的速度产生数据。开发实时数据压缩算法以高吞吐量减少此类数据以适应永久存储已引起越来越多的关注。具体来说，在相对论重离子对撞机 (RHIC) 新建的 sPHENIX 实验中，时间投影室被用作主要跟踪探测器，记录三维 (3D) 圆柱体中的粒子轨迹。生成的数据通常非常稀疏，占用率约为 。这种稀疏性对传统的免学习有损压缩算法（例如 SZ、ZFP 和 MGARD）提出了挑战。基于 3D 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的方法双头卷积自动编码器 (BCAE) 在压缩率和重建精度方面均优于传统方法。 BCAE 还可以利用适合部署在现代异构高性能计算环境中的图形处理单元的计算能力。这项工作引入了两个 BCAE 变体：BCAE++ 和 BCAE-2D。与 BCAE 相比，BCAE++ 实现了更好的压缩比和更好的以平均绝对误差衡量的重建精度。 BCAE-2D 将径向方向视为图像的通道维度，从而使压缩吞吐量提高 3 倍。此外，我们证明了具有更大解码器的不平衡自动编码器可以提高重建精度，而不会显着牺牲吞吐量。最后，我们观察到 BCAE++ 和 BCAE-2D 都可以从使用半精度模式中获得更多吞吐量（增加），而不会损失重建精度。源代码以及数据和预训练模型的链接可以在 https://github.com/BNL-DAQ-LDRD/NeuralCompression_v2 找到。

items.title: Investigating the Real-World Applicability of MPI Correctness Benchmarks.
items.abstract: The MPI correctness benchmarks MPI-Corrbench and the MPI Bugs Initiative contain standardized test cases of correct and erroneous use of MPI, allowing MPI correctness tool developers to assess their tools’ performance and guide further development of their checking capabilities. Hence, the correctness benchmarks should encompass representative MPI (mis-)usage that mirrors real-world codes. To that end, we analyze the MPI usage of these correctness benchmarks at argument granularity and compare it to a previously collected data set of 96 HPC codes. This assessment measures the benchmarks’ proximity to real-world MPI usage patterns and offers insights for enhancing their coverage.
items.abstract_zh: MPI 正确性基准 MPI-Corrbench 和 MPI Bugs Initiative 包含正确和错误使用 MPI 的标准化测试用例，允许 MPI 正确性工具开发人员评估其工具的性能并指导其检查功能的进一步开发。因此，正确性基准应该包含反映现实世界代码的代表性 MPI（错误）使用。为此，我们在参数粒度上分析了这些正确性基准的 MPI 使用情况，并将其与之前收集的 96 个 HPC 代码的数据集进行比较。该评估衡量基准与现实世界 MPI 使用模式的接近程度，并提供增强其覆盖范围的见解。

items.title: ZeroSum: User Space Monitoring of Resource Utilization and Contention on Heterogeneous HPC Systems.
items.abstract: Heterogeneous High Performance Computing (HPC) systems are highly specialized, complex, powerful, and expensive systems. Efficient utilization of these systems requires monitoring tools to confirm that users have configured their jobs, workflows, and applications correctly to consume the limited allocations they have been awarded. Historically system monitoring tools are designed for – and only available to – system administrators and facilities personnel to ensure that the system is healthy, utilized, and operating within acceptable parameters. However, there is a demand for user space monitoring capabilities to address the configuration validation and optimization problem. In this paper, we describe a prototype tool, ZeroSum, designed to provide user space monitoring of application processes, lightweight processes (threads), and hardware resources on heterogeneous, distributed HPC systems. ZeroSum is designed to be used either as a limited-use porting tool or as an always-on monitoring library.
items.abstract_zh: 异构高性能计算 (HPC) 系统是高度专业化、复杂、强大且昂贵的系统。要有效利用这些系统，需要监控工具来确认用户已正确配置其作业、工作流程和应用程序，以消耗他们获得的有限分配。从历史上看，系统监控工具是为系统管理员和设施人员设计的，并且仅适用于系统管理员和设施人员，以确保系统健康、可用并在可接受的参数范围内运行。然而，需要用户空间监控功能来解决配置验证和优化问题。在本文中，我们描述了一个原型工具 ZeroSum，旨在提供异构分布式 HPC 系统上的应用程序进程、轻量级进程（线程）和硬件资源的用户空间监控。 ZeroSum 旨在用作有限用途的移植工具或始终在线的监控库。

items.title: Verifying Performance Guidelines for MPI Collectives at Scale.
items.abstract: MPI collective communication operations are crucial for high-performance computing, making the efficient implementation of collective algorithms essential for optimal application performance. While most MPI libraries provide several algorithms for a specific collective operation, each may work better in a specific scenario. Therefore, selecting the most suitable algorithm for each use case is important. However, even the best algorithm in a given MPI library’s set may deliver suboptimal performance.
items.abstract_zh: MPI 集体通信操作对于高性能计算至关重要，因此集体算法的高效实施对于优化应用程序性能至关重要。虽然大多数 MPI 库为特定的集体操作提供了多种算法，但每种算法在特定场景中可能效果更好。因此，为每个用例选择最合适的算法非常重要。然而，即使给定 MPI 库集中最好的算法也可能提供次优的性能。

items.title: Automatic Generation of Micro-kernels for Performance Portability of Matrix Multiplication on RISC-V Vector Processors.
items.abstract: In this paper, we propose and evaluate several optimized implementations of the general matrix multiplication (gemm) on two different RISC-V architecture cores implementing the RISC-V vector extension (RVV): C906 and C910 from T-HEAD. Specifically, we address the performance portability problem across these processor cores by means of an automatic assembly code generator, written in Python, capable of emitting RVV code for high performance computing (HPC), with a variety of combinations of specific and general optimizations.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出并评估了在实现 RISC-V 向量扩展 (RVV) 的两个不同 RISC-V 架构核心上通用矩阵乘法 (gemm) 的几种优化实现：来自 T-HEAD 的 C906 和 C910。具体来说，我们通过使用 Python 编写的自动汇编代码生成器来解决这些处理器内核之间的性能可移植性问题，该生成器能够生成用于高性能计算 (HPC) 的 RVV 代码，并具有各种特定和通用优化的组合。

items.title: Porting and optimizing Meso-NH to AMD MI250X GPUs.
items.abstract: This paper presents the results of our efforts to port Meso-NH, an atmospheric non-hydrostatic research model, to AMD MI250X GPUs using OpenACC on the ADASTRA Machine, a technology similar to the Frontier system [1]. Meso-NH is a versatile model that covers a wide range of resolutions from synoptic to turbulent scales, and is designed for studies of physics and chemistry. It can be used in 3D for storms and thunderstorms simulation, 2D or 1D for the simulation of academic studies.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们在 ADASTRA 机器上使用 OpenACC（一种类似于 Frontier 系统的技术）将 Meso-NH（一种大气非静水力研究模型）移植到 AMD MI250X GPU 的努力成果 [1]。 Meso-NH 是一种多功能模型，涵盖从天气尺度到湍流尺度的广泛分辨率，专为物理和化学研究而设计。它可以用于风暴和雷暴的 3D 模拟，也可以用于学术研究的 2D 或 1D 模拟。

items.title: Towards A Massive-scale Distributed Neighborhood Graph Construction.
items.abstract: Graph-based approximate nearest neighbor algorithms have shown high performance and quality. However, such approaches require a large amount of memory and still take a long time to construct high-quality nearest neighbor graphs (NNGs). Using distributed memory systems is important when data is large or a shorter indexing time is desired.
items.abstract_zh: 基于图的近似最近邻算法已显示出高性能和质量。然而，此类方法需要大量内存，并且仍然需要很长时间才能构建高质量的最近邻图（NNG）。当数据很大或需要更短的索引时间时，使用分布式内存系统非常重要。

items.title: An Analysis of Graph Neural Network Memory Access Patterns.
items.abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are becoming increasingly popular for applying neural networks to graph data. However, as the size of the input graph increases, the GPU memory wall problem becomes an important issue. Since both current solutions to reduce the memory footprint, such as mini-batch approaches and the use of memory-efficient tensor manipulations, have drawbacks, we attempt to solve the problem by expanding the memory size using a virtual memory technology. To overcome the data transfer overhead of virtual memory technology, in this paper we focus on analyzing the memory access pattern of GNNs with the goal of reducing the data transfer latency perceived by the user. A preliminary result of applying optimization techniques guided by our analysis results shows a 40% reduction in the execution time of a combination of training and testing.
items.abstract_zh: 图神经网络 (GNN) 将神经网络应用于图数据变得越来越流行。然而，随着输入图尺寸的增加，GPU内存墙问题成为一个重要问题。由于当前减少内存占用的两种解决方案（例如小批量方法和使用内存高效张量操作）都有缺点，因此我们尝试通过使用虚拟内存技术扩展内存大小来解决问题。为了克服虚拟内存技术的数据传输开销，本文重点分析 GNN 的内存访问模式，以减少用户感知的数据传输延迟。在我们的分析结果指导下应用优化技术的初步结果显示，训练和测试组合的执行时间减少了 40%。

items.title: Evaluating Total Environmental Impact for a Computing Infrastructure.
items.abstract: In this paper we outline the results of a project to evaluate the total climate/carbon impact of a digital research infrastructure for a defined snapshot period. We outline the carbon model used to calculate the impact and the data collected to quantify that impact for a defined set of resources. We discuss the variation in potential impact across both the active and embodied carbon for computing hardware and produce a range of estimates on the amount of carbon equivalent climate impact for the snapshot period.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们概述了一个项目的结果，该项目旨在评估数字研究基础设施在特定快照期内对气候/碳的总体影响。我们概述了用于计算影响的碳模型以及为量化一组已定义资源的影响而收集的数据。我们讨论了计算硬件的活性碳和隐含碳的潜在影响的变化，并对快照期间碳当量的气候影响进行了一系列估计。

items.title: Emissions and energy efficiency on large-scale high performance computing facilities: ARCHER2 UK national supercomputing service case study.
items.abstract: Large supercomputing facilities are critical to research in many areas that impact on decisions such as how to address the current climate emergency. For example, climate modelling, renewable energy facility design and new battery technologies. However, these systems themselves are a source of large amounts of emissions due to the embodied emissions associated with their construction, transport, and decommissioning; and the power consumption associated with running the facility. Recently, the UK National Supercomputing Service, ARCHER2, has been analysing the impact of the facility in terms of energy and emissions. Based on this work, we have made changes to the operation of the service that give a cumulative saving of more than 20% in power draw of the computational resources with all application benchmarks showing reduced power to solution. In this paper, we describe our analysis and the changes made to the operation of the service to improve its energy efficiency, and thereby reduce its climate impacts.
items.abstract_zh: 大型超级计算设施对于许多影响决策的领域的研究至关重要，例如如何应对当前的气候紧急情况。例如，气候建模、可再生能源设施设计和新电池技术。然而，由于与其建造、运输和退役相关的隐含排放，这些系统本身就是大量排放的来源；以及与运行设施相关的功耗。最近，英国国家超级计算服务机构 ARCHER2 一直在分析该设施在能源和排放方面的影响。基于这项工作，我们对服务的操作进行了更改，使计算资源的功耗累计节省了 20% 以上，所有应用程序基准测试都显示解决方案的功耗降低。在本文中，我们描述了我们的分析以及对服务运营所做的改变，以提高其能源效率，从而减少其对气候的影响。

items.title: Ramble: A flexible, extensible, and composable experimentation framework.
items.abstract: Reproducibility and replicability are extremely important components of scientific computing, and any computational research. The ability to replicate a set of experiments aids many other computational use cases, such as systems acceptance where a compute center requires the ability to create and execute the same experiment as a hardware vendor. Several test harnesses and frameworks currently exist, with the aim of improving experiment replicability.
items.abstract_zh: 再现性和可复制性是科学计算和任何计算研究极其重要的组成部分。复制一组实验的能力有助于许多其他计算用例，例如计算中心需要能够创建和执行与硬件供应商相同的实验的系统验收。目前存在多种测试工具和框架，旨在提高实验的可重复性。

items.title: Throughput Optimization with a NUMA-Aware Runtime System for Efficient Scientific Data Streaming.
items.abstract: With the surge in data generation rates from advanced scientific instruments, there is an urgent need for effective network management and resource utilization strategies for data streaming. Present strategies often lag behind hardware advancements, leading to resource underutilization. Modern servers typically employ non-uniform memory access (NUMA) multiprocessors, which, despite their benefits, can pose performance challenges. This paper presents a novel runtime system tailored for efficient multi-stream data management, optimizing both its compression and decompression phases, and enhancing network I/O based on the server’s unique hardware design. Our system coordinates parallel tasks for data compression, decompression, and transfer, aiming to reduce network data influx. Empirical tests show that aligning streaming tasks with the right NUMA domain results in a 1.48X throughput boost compared to cutting-edge methods and a 2.6X improvement over standard techniques.
items.abstract_zh: 随着先进科学仪器的数据生成率激增，迫切需要有效的数据流网络管理和资源利用策略。目前的策略往往落后于硬件进步，导致资源利用不足。现代服务器通常采用非均匀内存访问 (NUMA) 多处理器，尽管有其优点，但可能会带来性能挑战。本文提出了一种专为高效多流数据管理而定制的新型运行时系统，优化其压缩和解压缩阶段，并基于服务器独特的硬件设计增强网络 I/O。我们的系统协调数据压缩、解压缩和传输的并行任务，旨在减少网络数据流入。实证测试表明，将流任务与正确的 NUMA 域结合起来，与尖端方法相比，吞吐量提高了 1.48 倍，与标准技术相比，吞吐量提高了 2.6 倍。

items.title: Adding Microbenchmarks with SIMD Data Races to DataRaceBench.
items.abstract: Data race detection tools should find data races not only in development builds of applications, but also in optimized production builds. An architecture-dependent optimization includes vectorization of the code. At the moment, DataRaceBench does not contain microkernels that test for data races in vectorized code. The few codes with SIMD directives are too simple, so that compilers tend to refuse vectorizing the loop. We carefully created new microkernels with and without data race that a tool will only detect if vector instructions are considered in the analysis. The new microkernels cover different vectorized memory access instructions. We used the new microkernels to verify the support for vectorized memory accesses in Intel Inspector and LLVM ThreadSanitizer. While Intel Inspector could detect all data races in the new microkernels, ThreadSanitizer could not find the data races when the code is vectorized.
items.abstract_zh: 数据竞争检测工具不仅应该在应用程序的开发版本中发现数据竞争，而且还应该在优化的生产版本中发现数据竞争。依赖于体系结构的优化包括代码的矢量化。目前，DataRaceBench 不包含用于测试矢量化代码中的数据竞争的微内核。少数带有 SIMD 指令的代码过于简单，因此编译器往往会拒绝对循环进行矢量化。我们精心创建了带有或不带有数据竞争的新微内核，工具只会检测分析中是否考虑向量指令。新的微内核涵盖了不同的向量化内存访问指令。我们使用新的微内核来验证 Intel Inspector 和 LLVM ThreadSanitizer 对矢量化内存访问的支持。虽然英特尔 Inspector 可以检测新微内核中的所有数据争用，但 ThreadSanitizer 在代码矢量化时无法找到数据争用。

items.title: Improve and Stabilize the Classification Results of DataRaceBench.
items.abstract: DataRaceBench is a benchmark using small kernel applications to classify the detection capabilities of data race detection tools. During our experiments of applying Archer to the benchmark suite we observed different short-comings. With recently added kernels, the turn-around time of a basic benchmark run increased from several minutes to more than an hour. Furthermore, we observed non-deterministic and unexpected results. In this paper, we propose several changes to existing kernels to address these short-comings. In addition, we propose to use variants of the kernels with non-deterministic runtime schedules that explicitly enforce these different schedules. Finally, we provide an evaluation of the updated benchmark with Archer running in thread-centric and task-centric mode.
items.abstract_zh: DataRaceBench 是一个使用小型内核应用程序对数据竞争检测工具的检测能力进行分类的基准测试。在我们将 Archer 应用于基准测试套件的实验中，我们观察到了不同的缺点。通过最近添加的内核，基本基准测试运行的周转时间从几分钟增加到一个多小时。此外，我们观察到非确定性和意外的结果。在本文中，我们建议对现有内核进行一些更改，以解决这些缺点。此外，我们建议使用具有非确定性运行时计划的内核变体，以显式强制执行这些不同的计划。最后，我们提供了对以线程为中心和以任务为中心模式运行的 Archer 的更新基准的评估。

items.title: Mapping High-Level Concurrency from OpenMP and MPI to ThreadSanitizer Fibers.
items.abstract: High-level parallel programming paradigms like MPI and OpenMP allow expressing concurrency independent from the execution unit finally executing the code. Most general-purpose data race detection tools perform thread-centric analyses with the operating system thread as the execution unit. ThreadSanitizer introduced the concept of software fibers as more fine-grained execution units. We use ThreadSanitizer fibers to model the concurrency semantics of OpenMP tasks, MPI non-blocking communication, and MPI one-sided communication. We propose different optimizations regarding handling ThreadSanitizer fibers, resulting in less runtime and memory overhead. In our experiment, we demonstrate how this augmented tool set can be applied to a highly asynchronous application using OpenMP tasking in combination with MPI non-blocking communication. For task-centric data race detection, we observe a moderate runtime overhead of up to 12%. Handling MPI non-blocking communication results in up to 3x runtime overhead. The holistic analysis of the code yields up to 10x runtime overhead. Experiments with existing classification quality benchmarks show that the fiber-based analysis does not introduce unexpected false positive reports but is able to detect more data races.
items.abstract_zh: MPI 和 OpenMP 等高级并行编程范例允许独立于最终执行代码的执行单元来表达并发性。大多数通用数据竞争检测工具以操作系统线程作为执行单元来执行以线程为中心的分析。 ThreadSanitizer 引入了软件纤维的概念作为更细粒度的执行单元。我们使用 ThreadSanitizer 纤维对 OpenMP 任务、MPI 非阻塞通信和 MPI 单向通信的并发语义进行建模。我们提出了关于处理 ThreadSanitizer 纤维的不同优化，从而减少运行时间和内存开销。在我们的实验中，我们演示了如何使用 OpenMP 任务处理与 MPI 非阻塞通信相结合，将此增强工具集应用于高度异步应用程序。对于以任务为中心的数据竞争检测，我们观察到中等的运行时开销高达 12%。处理 MPI 非阻塞通信会导致高达 3 倍的运行时开销。对代码的整体分析会产生高达 10 倍的运行时开销。对现有分类质量基准的实验表明，基于光纤的分析不会引入意外的误报报告，但能够检测更多的数据竞争。

items.title: Overcoming Active Directory Woes with Plain Text Caches and Replacing Passwords.
items.abstract: Reliable authentication is a key component of all HPC systems. This paper discusses an approach that bypasses systemic authentication problems experienced by the authors to provide a simple and reliable manner of managing service accounts and user groups for HPC centers using plain text caches and alternatives to passwords.
items.abstract_zh: 可靠的身份验证是所有 HPC 系统的关键组件。本文讨论了一种绕过作者遇到的系统身份验证问题的方法，使用纯文本缓存和密码替代方案，提供一种简单可靠的方式来管理 HPC 中心的服务帐户和用户组。

items.title: RISA: Round-Robin Intra-Rack Friendly Scheduling Algorithm for Disaggregated Datacenters.
items.abstract: Recent trends see a move away from a fixed-resource server-centric datacenter model to a more adaptable “disaggregated” datacenter model. These disaggregated datacenters can then dynamically group resources to the specific requirements of an incoming workload, thereby improving efficiency. To properly utilize these disaggregated datacenters, workload allocation techniques must examine the current state of the datacenter and choose resources that not only optimize the current workload request, but future ones. Since disaggregated datacenters are severely bottlenecked by the available network resources, our work proposes a heuristic-based approach called RISA, which significantly reduces the network usage of workload allocations in disaggregated datacenters. Compared to the state-of-the-art, RISA reduces the power consumption for optical components by and reduces the average CPU-RAM round-trip latency by . Additionally, RISA significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art in terms of execution time.
items.abstract_zh: 最近的趋势是从以固定资源服务器为中心的数据中心模型转向适应性更强的“分解”数据中心模型。然后，这些分解的数据中心可以根据传入工作负载的特定要求动态地将资源分组，从而提高效率。为了正确利用这些分解的数据中心，工作负载分配技术必须检查数据中心的当前状态，并选择不仅优化当前工作负载请求而且优化未来工作负载请求的资源。由于分类数据中心受到可用网络资源的严重瓶颈，我们的工作提出了一种名为 RISA 的基于启发式的方法，该方法显着减少了分类数据中心中工作负载分配的网络使用量。与最先进的技术相比，RISA 将光学组件的功耗降低了 ，并将平均 CPU-RAM 往返延迟降低了 。此外，RISA 在执行时间方面显着优于最先进的技术。

items.title: Uncertainty Quantification of Reduced-Precision Time Series in Turbulent Channel Flow.
items.abstract: With increased computational power through the use of arithmetic in low-precision, a relevant question is how lower precision affects simulation results, especially for chaotic systems where analytical round-off estimates are non-trivial to obtain. In this work, we consider how the uncertainty of the time series of a direct numerical simulation of turbulent channel flow at Reτ = 180 is affected when restricted to a reduced-precision representation. We utilize a non-overlapping batch means estimator and find that the mean statistics can, in this case, be obtained with significantly fewer mantissa bits than conventional IEEE-754 double precision, but that the mean values are observed to be more sensitive in the middle of the channel than in the near-wall region. This indicates that using lower precision in the near-wall region, where the majority of the computational efforts are required, may benefit from low-precision floating point units found in upcoming computer hardware.
items.abstract_zh: 随着通过使用低精度算术来提高计算能力，一个相关的问题是较低的精度如何影响模拟结果，特别是对于获得分析舍入估计并不容易的混沌系统。在这项工作中，我们考虑了当限制于降低精度的表示时，Reτ = 180 时湍流通道流的直接数值模拟的时间序列的不确定性如何受到影响。我们利用非重叠批量均值估计器，发现在这种情况下，可以用比传统 IEEE-754 双精度少得多的尾数位来获得均值统计数据，但观察到平均值在通道中间比在近壁区域更敏感。这表明，在需要大部分计算工作的近壁区域使用较低精度可能会受益于即将推出的计算机硬件中的低精度浮点单元。

items.title: Tencoder: tensor-product encoder-decoder architecture for predicting solutions of PDEs with variable boundary data.
items.abstract: It is widely hoped that artificial intelligence will boost data-driven surrogate models in science and engineering. However, fundamental spatial aspects of AI surrogate models remain under-studied. We investigate the ability of neural-network surrogate models to predict solutions to PDEs under variable boundary values. We do not wish to retrain the model when the boundary values change but to make them inputs to the model and infer the solution of the PDE under those boundary conditions. Such a capability is essential to making AI-based surrogate models practically useful. While simple feedforward networks are used for one-dimensional (1D) Poisson equation, an encoder-decoder architecture with a tensor-product layer is developed for the two-dimensional Poisson equation posed on a rectangular domain. We show that it is indeed possible to infer solutions to PDEs from variable boundary data using neural networks in this relatively simple setting, and point to future directions. 1
items.abstract_zh: 人们普遍希望人工智能将推动科学和工程领域数据驱动的替代模型。然而，人工智能替代模型的基本空间方面仍未得到充分研究。我们研究了神经网络代理模型在可变边界值下预测偏微分方程解的能力。我们不希望在边界值发生变化时重新训练模型，而是希望将它们输入到模型中并推断出这些边界条件下偏微分方程的解。这种能力对于使基于人工智能的替代模型发挥实际作用至关重要。虽然简单的前馈网络用于一维 (1D) 泊松方程，但针对矩形域上提出的二维泊松方程，开发了具有张量积层的编码器-解码器架构。我们证明，确实可以在这种相对简单的设置中使用神经网络从可变边界数据中推断出偏微分方程的解，并指出未来的方向。 1

items.title: A Parallel Algorithm for Updating a Multi-objective Shortest Path in Large Dynamic Networks.
items.abstract: In dynamic networks, where continuous topological changes are prevalent, it becomes paramount to find and update different graph properties without the computational burden of recalculating from the ground up.
