However finding or updating a multi-objective shortest path (MOSP) in such a network is challenging, as it involves simultaneously optimizing multiple (conflicting) objectives. In light of this, our paper focuses on shortest path search and proposes parallel algorithms tailored specifically for large incremental graphs. We first present an efficient algorithm that updates the single-objective shortest path (SOSP) whenever a new set of edges are introduced. Leveraging this SOSP update algorithm, we also devise a novel heuristic approach to adaptively update a MOSP in large networks. Empirical evaluations on both real and synthetic incremental networks with shared memory implementations attest to the scalability and efficacy of the proposed algorithms.
items.abstract_zh: 在连续拓扑变化普遍存在的动态网络中，查找和更新不同的图属性而无需从头开始重新计算的计算负担变得至关重要。然而，在这样的网络中查找或更新多目标最短路径（MOSP）具有挑战性，因为它涉及同时优化多个（冲突）目标。有鉴于此，我们的论文重点关注最短路径搜索，并提出专门针对大型增量图定制的并行算法。我们首先提出一种有效的算法，每当引入一组新的边时，该算法都会更新单目标最短路径（SOSP）。利用这种 SOSP 更新算法，我们还设计了一种新颖的启发式方法来自适应更新大型网络中的 MOSP。对具有共享内存实现的真实增量网络和合成增量网络的实证评估证明了所提出算法的可扩展性和有效性。

items.title: BaRRT: Buildtime and Runtime Reproducibility Tool for Software Development and Testing.
items.abstract: During software development, many aspects of the system and user state can change. Significant time can be spent tracking down the causes of these differences, rather than focusing on the main task of software development. This paper describes a tool to record the state at build-time and at runtime of an application to more easily investigate the cause(s) of differences in behavior. The added logging enables better software quality assurance by tracking code changes and their effects on runtime behavior. At a minimum, this tool only requires prepending one command at build-time and another at runtime. Project-level configurations can be set to enable the collection of additional information.
items.abstract_zh: 在软件开发过程中，系统和用户状态的许多方面都可能发生变化。可以花费大量时间来追踪这些差异的原因，而不是专注于软件开发的主要任务。本文介绍了一种记录应用程序构建时和运行时状态的工具，以便更轻松地调查行为差异的原因。添加的日志记录可以通过跟踪代码更改及其对运行时行为的影响来实现更好的软件质量保证。至少，该工具只需要在构建时添加一个命令，并在运行时添加另一个命令。可以设置项目级配置来收集附加信息。

items.title: A Reinforcement Learning Based Backfilling Strategy for HPC Batch Jobs.
items.abstract: High Performance Computing (HPC) systems are used across a wide range of disciplines for both large and complex computations. HPC systems often receive many thousands of computational tasks at a time, colloquially referred to as “jobs”. These jobs must then be scheduled as optimally as possible so they can be completed within a reasonable timeframe. HPC scheduling systems often employ a technique called “backfilling”, wherein low-priority jobs are scheduled earlier to use the available resources that are waiting for the pending high-priority jobs. To make it work, backfilling largely relies on job runtime to calculate the start time of the ready-to-schedule jobs and avoid delaying them. It is a common belief that better estimations of job runtime will lead to better backfilling and more effective scheduling. However, our experiments show a different conclusion: there is a missing trade-off between prediction accuracy and backfilling opportunities. To learn how to achieve the best trade-off, we believe reinforcement learning (RL) can be effectively leveraged. Reinforcement Learning relies on an “agent” which makes decisions from observing the environment, and gains rewards or punishments based on the quality of its decision-making. Based on this idea, we designed RLBackfilling, a reinforcement learning-based backfilling algorithm. We show how RLBackfilling can learn effective backfilling strategies via trial-and-error on existing job traces. Our evaluation results show up to 17x better scheduling performance (based on average bounded job slowdown) compared to EASY backfilling using user-provided job runtime and 4.7x better performance compared with EASY using the ideal predicted job runtime (the actual job runtime).
items.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 系统广泛用于大型和复杂的计算领域。 HPC 系统通常一次接收数千个计算任务，通俗地称为“作业”。然后必须尽可能优化地安排这些作业，以便它们能够在合理的时间范围内完成。 HPC 调度系统通常采用一种称为“回填”的技术，其中低优先级作业会提前调度，以使用等待挂起的高优先级作业的可用资源。为了使其发挥作用，回填在很大程度上依赖于作业运行时来计算准备安排作业的开始时间并避免延迟它们。人们普遍认为，更好地估计作业运行时间将带来更好的回填和更有效的调度。然而，我们的实验显示了不同的结论：预测准确性和回填机会之间缺少权衡。为了了解如何实现最佳权衡，我们相信可以有效地利用强化学习（RL）。强化学习依赖于一个“代理”，它通过观察环境做出决策，并根据决策的质量获得奖励或惩罚。基于这个思想，我们设计了RLBackfilling，一种基于强化学习的回填算法。我们展示了 RLBackfilling 如何通过对现有作业跟踪的试错来学习有效的回填策略。我们的评估结果显示，与使用用户提供的作业运行时间的 EASY 回填相比，调度性能提高了 17 倍（基于平均有界作业减速），与使用理想预测作业运行时间（实际作业运行时间）的 EASY 相比，性能提高了 4.7 倍。

items.title: Principles for Automated and Reproducible Benchmarking.
items.abstract: The diversity in processor technology used by High Performance Computing (HPC) facilities is growing, and so applications must be written in such a way that they can attain high levels of performance across a range of different CPUs, GPUs, and other accelerators. Measuring application performance across this wide range of platforms becomes crucial, but there are significant challenges to do this rigorously, in a time efficient way, whilst assuring results are scientifically meaningful, reproducible, and actionable. This paper presents a methodology for measuring and analysing the performance portability of a parallel application and shares a software framework which combines and extends adopted technologies to provide a usable benchmarking tool. We demonstrate the flexibility and effectiveness of the methodology and benchmarking framework by showcasing a variety of benchmarking case studies which utilise a stable of supercomputing resources at a national scale.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 设施使用的处理器技术的多样性正在不断增长，因此应用程序的编写方式必须能够在各种不同的 CPU、GPU 和其他加速器上获得高水平的性能。在如此广泛的平台上测量应用程序性能变得至关重要，但要以省时的方式严格执行此操作，同时确保结果具有科学意义、可重复性和可操作性，存在重大挑战。本文提出了一种测量和分析并行应用程序性能可移植性的方法，并共享了一个软件框架，该框架结合并扩展了所采用的技术以提供可用的基准测试工具。我们通过展示各种在国家范围内利用稳定的超级计算资源的基准案例研究，展示了方法和基准框架的灵活性和有效性。

items.title: Democratizing HPC Access and Use with Knowledge Graphs.
items.abstract: The field of High-Performance Computing (HPC) is undergoing rapid evolution, with an expanding and diverse user base harnessing its unparalleled computational capabilities. As the range of HPC applications grows, newcomers to the field are faced with the daunting task of optimizing their applications for efficient execution on HPC systems. Traditional documentation, often spanning dozens of pages, is cumbersome for finding answers and ill-suited for integration with emerging conversational AI-powered user interfaces like chatbots. Addressing this challenge, we propose a novel HPC ontology crafted to encapsulate HPC runtime relations in a scalable fashion. Our proposed ontology not only facilitates the transfer and querying of this knowledge but also serves as a foundational pillar for our AI-powered Speech Assistant Interface (SAI)[13]. This ensures reproducibility, reliability, and optimal performance when executing tasks. In this paper, we elucidate the relationships and properties underpinning our ontology and showcase how users can interact with knowledge graphs based on our proposed ontology to derive insights.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 领域正在快速发展，不断扩大且多样化的用户群利用其无与伦比的计算能力。随着 HPC 应用程序范围的扩大，该领域的新手面临着优化其应用程序以在 HPC 系统上高效执行的艰巨任务。传统文档通常长达数十页，对于寻找答案来说很麻烦，并且不适合与聊天机器人等新兴的对话式人工智能用户界面集成。为了解决这一挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的 HPC 本体，旨在以可扩展的方式封装 HPC 运行时关系。我们提出的本体不仅促进了这些知识的传输和查询，而且还作为我们人工智能驱动的语音助手界面（SAI）的基础支柱[13]。这确保了执行任务时的可重复性、可靠性和最佳性能。在本文中，我们阐明了支撑我们本体的关系和属性，并展示了用户如何根据我们提出的本体与知识图进行交互以获取见解。

items.title: A Statistical Analysis of HPC Network Tuning.
items.abstract: Distributed scientific applications run on a complex stack of software and network technologies. Each layer has configuration options for tuning performance. These can range from protocol thresholds to algorithmic changes for collectives. Micro-benchmarks are a common methodology to evaluate the communication stack and are relatively easy to tune. However they aren’t representative of application behavior. Proxy applications, however, offer a simplified, but realistic, representation of the main computational and communicative methods in scientific programs. Since these proxy applications contain realistic message passing patterns, the correlation between micro-benchmarks and proxy application performance is not obvious. In this paper we present a study of statistically analysing the impacts of tuning. Our results show how tuned micro-benchmark performance correlates with tuned proxy application performance.
items.abstract_zh: 分布式科学应用程序运行在复杂的软件和网络技术堆栈上。每层都有用于调整性​​能的配置选项。这些范围可以从协议阈值到集体的算法更改。微基准是评估通信堆栈的常用方法，并且相对容易调整。然而它们并不代表应用程序行为。然而，代理应用程序提供了科学程序中主要计算和通信方法的简化但现实的表示。由于这些代理应用程序包含实际的消息传递模式，因此微基准测试和代理应用程序性能之间的相关性并不明显。在本文中，我们提出了一项统计分析调整影响的研究。我们的结果显示了调整后的微基准性能与调整后的代理应用程序性能之间的关系。

items.title: QArchSearch: A Scalable Quantum Architecture Search Package.
items.abstract: The current era of quantum computing has yielded several algorithms that promise high computational efficiency. While the algorithms are sound in theory and can provide potentially exponential speedup, there is little guidance on how to design proper quantum circuits to realize the appropriate unitary transformation to be applied to the input quantum state. In this paper, we present QArchSearch, an AI based quantum architecture search package with the QTensor library as a backend that provides a principled and automated approach to finding the best model given a task and input quantum state. We show that the search package is able to efficiently scale the search to large quantum circuits and enables the exploration of more complex models for different quantum applications. QArchSearch runs at scale and high efficiency on high-performance computing systems using a two-level parallelization scheme on both CPUs and GPUs, which has been demonstrated on the Polaris supercomputer.
items.abstract_zh: 当前的量子计算时代已经产生了多种有望实现高计算效率的算法。虽然这些算法在理论上是合理的并且可以提供潜在的指数加速，但对于如何设计适当的量子电路以实现应用于输入量子态的适当的酉变换几乎没有指导。在本文中，我们提出了 QArchSearch，这是一种基于 AI 的量子架构搜索包，以 QTensor 库作为后端，它提供了一种有原则的自动化方法来寻找给定任务和输入量子状态的最佳模型。我们表明，该搜索包能够有效地将搜索扩展到大型量子电路，并能够为不同的量子应用探索更复杂的模型。 QArchSearch 在高性能计算系统上大规模且高效地运行，在 CPU 和 GPU 上使用两级并行化方案，这已在 Polaris 超级计算机上得到了演示。

items.title: Accelerating Particle and Fluid Simulations with Differentiable Graph Networks for Solving Forward and Inverse Problems.
items.abstract: We leverage physics-embedded differentiable graph network simulators (GNS) to accelerate particulate and fluid simulations to solve forward and inverse problems. GNS represents the domain as a graph with particles as nodes and learned interactions as edges. Compared to modeling global dynamics, GNS enables learning local interaction laws through edge messages, improving its generalization to new environments. GNS achieves over 165x speedup for granular flow prediction compared to parallel CPU numerical simulations. We propose a novel hybrid GNS/Material Point Method (MPM) to accelerate forward simulations by minimizing error on a pure surrogate model by interleaving MPM in GNS rollouts to satisfy conservation laws and minimize errors achieving 24x speedup compared to pure numerical simulations. The differentiable GNS enables solving inverse problems through automatic differentiation, identifying material parameters that result in target runout distances. We demonstrate the ability of GNS to solve inverse problems by iteratively updating the friction angle (a material property) by computing the gradient of a loss function based on the final and target runouts, thereby identifying the friction angle that best matches the observed runout. The physics-embedded and differentiable simulators open an exciting new paradigm for AI-accelerated design, control, and optimization.
items.abstract_zh: 我们利用物理嵌入式可微图网络模拟器 (GNS) 来加速颗粒和流体模拟，以解决正向和逆向问题。 GNS 将域表示为一个图，其中粒子为节点，学习到的相互作用为边。与建模全局动态相比，GNS 能够通过边缘消息学习局部交互规律，从而提高其对新环境的泛化能力。与并行 CPU 数值模拟相比，GNS 在颗粒流预测方面实现了超过 165 倍的加速。我们提出了一种新颖的混合 GNS/物质点方法 (MPM)，通过在 GNS 推出中交错 MPM 来最小化纯代理模型上的误差来加速正向模拟，以满足守恒定律并最小化误差，与纯数值模拟相比，实现了 24 倍的加速。可微分 GNS 能够通过自动微分解决反演问题，识别导致目标跳动距离的材料参数。我们通过基于最终跳动和目标跳动计算损失函数的梯度来迭代更新摩擦角（材料属性），从而识别与观察到的跳动最匹配的摩擦角，从而证明了 GNS 解决反演问题的能力。物理嵌入式可微分模拟器为人工智能加速设计、控制和优化开辟了令人兴奋的新范式。

items.title: Scale Composite BaaS Services With AFCL Workflows.
items.abstract: Due to various restrictions in serverless computing, developers face significant challenges to pipeline multiple Backend-as-a-Service (BaaS) services, which is restricted by the maximum size of the serverless function’s deployment package, or by throughput and concurrency restrictions for functions and BaaS services.
items.abstract_zh: 由于无服务器计算的各种限制，开发人员在管道化多个后端即服务（BaaS）服务时面临着巨大的挑战，这受到无服务器功能部署包的最大大小的限制，或者受到功能和BaaS服务的吞吐量和并发限制的限制。

items.title: TISCC: A Surface Code Compiler and Resource Estimator for Trapped-Ion Processors.
items.abstract: We introduce the Trapped-Ion Surface Code Compiler (TISCC), a software tool that generates circuits for a universal set of surface code patch operations in terms of a native trapped-ion gate set. To accomplish this, TISCC manages an internal representation of a trapped-ion system where a repeating pattern of trapping zones and junctions is arranged in an arbitrarily large rectangular grid. Surface code operations are compiled by instantiating surface code patches on the grid and using methods to generate transversal operations over data qubits, rounds of error correction over stabilizer plaquettes, and/or lattice surgery operations between neighboring patches. Beyond the implementation of a basic surface code instruction set, TISCC contains corner movement functionality and a patch translation that is implemented using ion movement alone. Except in the latter case, all TISCC functionality is extensible to alternative grid-like hardware architectures. TISCC output has been verified using the Oak Ridge Quasi-Clifford Simulator (ORQCS).
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出了捕获离子表面代码编译器 (TISCC)，这是一种软件工具，可根据本机捕获离子门集生成用于通用表面代码修补操作集的电路。为了实现这一目标，TISCC 管理捕获离子系统的内部表示，其中捕获区域和连接点的重复图案排列在任意大的矩形网格中。表面代码操作是通过在网格上实例化表面代码补丁并使用生成数据量子位上的横向操作、稳定器斑块上的多轮纠错和/或相邻补丁之间的晶格手术操作的方法来编译的。除了基本表面代码指令集的实现之外，TISCC 还包含角运动功能和仅使用离子运动实现的补丁转换。除了后一种情况之外，所有 TISCC 功能都可以扩展到替代的类似网格的硬件架构。 TISCC 输出已使用 Oak Ridge Quasi-Clifford Simulator (ORQCS) 进行验证。

items.title: Towards Foundation Models for Materials Science: The Open MatSci ML Toolkit.
items.abstract: Artificial intelligence and machine learning have shown great promise in their ability to accelerate novel materials discovery. As researchers and domain scientists seek to unify and consolidate chemical knowledge, the case for models with potential to generalize across different tasks within materials science—so-called “foundation models”—grows with ambitions. This manuscript reviews our recent progress with development of Open MatSci ML Toolkit, and details experiments that lay the groundwork for foundation model research and development with our framework. First, we describe and characterize a new pretraining task that uses synthetic data generated from symmetry operations, and reveal complex training dynamics at large scales. Using the pretrained model, we discuss a number of use cases relevant to foundation model development: semantic architecture of datasets, and fine-tuning for property prediction and classification. Our key results show that for simple applications, pretraining appears to provide worse modeling performance than training models from random initialization. However, for more complex instances, such as when a model is required to learn across multiple datasets and types of targets simultaneously, the inductive bias from pretraining provides significantly better performance. This insight will hopefully inform subsequent efforts into creating foundation models for materials science applications.
items.abstract_zh: 人工智能和机器学习在加速新材料发现方面表现出了巨大的潜力。随着研究人员和领域科学家寻求统一和巩固化学知识，具有泛化材料科学中不同任务潜力的模型（所谓的“基础模型”）的需求与日俱增。本手稿回顾了我们最近在 Open MatSci ML Toolkit 开发方面取得的进展，并详细介绍了为使用我们的框架进行基础模型研究和开发奠定基础的实验。首先，我们描述并表征了一种新的预训练任务，该任务使用对称操作生成的合成数据，并揭示了大规模的复杂训练动态。使用预训练模型，我们讨论了与基础模型开发相关的许多用例：数据集的语义架构以及属性预测和分类的微调。我们的主要结果表明，对于简单的应用程序，预训练似乎提供比随机初始化训练模型更差的建模性能。然而，对于更复杂的实例，例如当模型需要同时学习多个数据集和目标类型时，预训练的归纳偏差可提供明显更好的性能。这一见解有望为后续为材料科学应用创建基础模型的努力提供信息。

items.title: Report on Adaptable Open-Source Disaster Recovery Solution for Multi-Petabyte Storage Systems.
items.abstract: The current generation of Research Data Store (RDS) at The University of Sydney comprises a pair of peta-scale data storage systems. We implemented a disaster recovery (DR) solution on both systems for data protection against catastrophic failure. To handle large amount of data transactions into RDS, we took an open-source approach to design an adaptable DR solution that enables parallelized data replication capability between the pair of storage systems. In the last three years of operations, the DR solution has gone through a few iterations which saw improvement in efficiency. In this paper, we present the findings and outcomes from our DR implementation.
items.abstract_zh: 悉尼大学最新一代的研究数据存储 (RDS) 包括一对千万亿级数据存储系统。我们在两个系统上实施了灾难恢复 (DR) 解决方案，以保护数据免受灾难性故障的影响。为了处理 RDS 中的大量数据事务，我们采用开源方法来设计适应性强的 DR 解决方案，该解决方案可在存储系统对之间实现并行数据复制功能。在过去三年的运营中，灾难恢复解决方案经历了几次迭代，效率得到了提升。在本文中，我们介绍了灾难恢复实施的发现和结果。

items.title: Automated Whole-Body Tumor Segmentation and Prognosis of Cancer on PET/CT.
items.abstract: Automatic characterization of malignant disease is an important clinical need to facilitate early detection and treatment of cancer. A deep semi-supervised transfer learning approach was developed for automated whole-body tumor segmentation and prognosis on positron emission tomography (PET)/computed tomography (CT) scans using limited annotations. This study analyzed five datasets consisting of 408 prostate-specific membrane antigen (PSMA) PET/CT scans of prostate cancer patients and 611 18F-fluorodeoxyglucose (18F-FDG) PET/CT scans of lung, melanoma, lymphoma, head and neck, and breast cancer patients. Transfer learning generalized the segmentation task across PSMA and 18F-FDG PET/CT. Imaging measures quantifying molecular tumor burden were extracted from the predicted segmentations. Prognostic risk models were developed and evaluated on follow-up clinical measures, Kaplan-Meier survival analysis, and response assessment for patients with prostate, head and neck, and breast cancers, respectively. The proposed approach demonstrated accurate tumor segmentation and prognosis on PET/CT of patients across six cancer types.
items.abstract_zh: 恶性疾病的自动表征是促进癌症早期检测和治疗的重要临床需求。开发了一种深度半监督迁移学习方法，用于使用有限注释在正电子发射断层扫描（PET）/计算机断层扫描（CT）扫描上进行自动化全身肿瘤分割和预后。这项研究分析了五个数据集，其中包括 408 例前列腺癌患者的前列腺特异性膜抗原 (PSMA) PET/CT 扫描和 611 例肺癌、黑色素瘤、淋巴瘤、头颈癌和乳腺癌患者的 18F-氟脱氧葡萄糖 (18F-FDG) PET/CT 扫描。迁移学习概括了 PSMA 和 18F-FDG PET/CT 的分割任务。从预测的分割中提取量化分子肿瘤负荷的成像测量值。分别针对前列腺癌、头颈癌和乳腺癌患者的后续临床测量、Kaplan-Meier 生存分析和反应评估开发和评估了预后风险模型。所提出的方法证明了六种癌症类型患者在 PET/CT 上的准确肿瘤分割和预后。

items.title: Elastic deep learning through resilient collective operations.
items.abstract: A robust solution that incorporates fault tolerance and elastic scaling capabilities for distributed deep learning. Taking advantage of MPI resilient capabilities, aka. User-Level Failure Mitigation (ULFM), this novel approach promotes efficient and lightweight failure management and encourages smooth scaling in volatile computational settings. The proposed ULFM MPI-centered mechanism outperforms the only officially supported elastic learning framework, Elastic Horovod (using Gloo and NCCL), by a significant factor. These results reinforce the capability of MPI extension to deal with resiliency, and promote ULFM as an effective technique for fault management, minimizing downtime, and thereby enhancing the overall performance of distributed applications, in particular elastic training in high-performance computing (HPC) environments and machine learning applications.
items.abstract_zh: 一个强大的解决方案，结合了分布式深度学习的容错和弹性扩展功能。又名，利用 MPI 弹性功能。用户级故障缓解（ULFM），这种新颖的方法促进高效和轻量级的故障管理，并鼓励在不稳定的计算环境中平滑扩展。所提出的以 ULFM MPI 为中心的机制明显优于唯一官方支持的弹性学习框架 Elastic Horovod（使用 Gloo 和 NCCL）。这些结果增强了 MPI 扩展处理弹性的能力，并促进 ULFM 成为一种有效的故障管理技术，最大限度地减少停机时间，从而提高分布式应用程序的整体性能，特别是高性能计算 (HPC) 环境和机器学习应用程序中的弹性训练。

items.title: Pareto Optimization of CNN Models via Hardware-Aware Neural Architecture Search for Drainage Crossing Classification on Resource-Limited Devices.
items.abstract: Embedded devices, constrained by limited memory and processors, require deep learning models to be tailored to their specifications. This research explores customized model architectures for classifying drainage crossing images. Building on the foundational ResNet-18, this paper aims to maximize prediction accuracy, reduce memory size, and minimize inference latency. Various configurations were systematically probed by leveraging hardware-aware neural architecture search, accumulating 1,717 experimental results over six benchmarking variants. The experimental data analysis, enhanced by nn-Meter, provided a comprehensive understanding of inference latency across four different predictors. Significantly, a Pareto front analysis with three objectives of accuracy, latency, and memory resulted in five non-dominated solutions. These standout models showcased efficiency while retaining accuracy, offering a compelling alternative to the conventional ResNet-18 when deployed in resource-constrained environments. The paper concludes by highlighting insights drawn from the results and suggesting avenues for future exploration.
items.abstract_zh: 嵌入式设备受到有限内存和处理器的限制，需要根据其规格定制深度学习模型。本研究探索了用于对排水交叉图像进行分类的定制模型架构。本文以基础 ResNet-18 为基础，旨在最大限度地提高预测精度、减少内存大小并最大限度地减少推理延迟。通过利用硬件感知神经架构搜索系统地探索了各种配置，在六个基准测试变体中积累了 1,717 个实验结果。由 nn-Meter 增强的实验数据分析提供了对四种不同预测变量的推理延迟的全面理解。值得注意的是，具有准确性、延迟和内存三个目标的帕累托前沿分析产生了五个非支配解决方案。这些出色的模型在保持准确性的同时展示了效率，在资源受限的环境中部署时为传统 ResNet-18 提供了令人信服的替代方案。本文最后强调了从结果中得出的见解，并提出了未来探索的途径。

items.title: Optimization towards Efficiency and Stateful of dispel4py.
items.abstract: Scientific workflows bridge scientific challenges with computational resources. While dispel4py, a stream-based workflow system, offers mappings to parallel enactment engines like MPI or Multiprocessing, its optimization primarily focuses on dynamic process-to-task allocation for improved performance. An efficiency gap persists, particularly with the growing emphasis on conserving computing resources. Moreover, the existing dynamic optimization lacks support for stateful applications and grouping operations.
items.abstract_zh: 科学工作流程将科学挑战与计算资源联系起来。虽然 dispel4py 是一种基于流的工作流系统，提供了到 MPI 或多处理等并行执行引擎的映射，但其优化主要侧重于动态进程到任务分配，以提高性能。效率差距仍然存在，尤其是在人们越来越重视节约计算资源的情况下。而且，现有的动态优化缺乏对有状态应用和分组操作的支持。

items.title: TANGO: A GPU optimized traceback approach for sequence alignment algorithms.
items.abstract: Sequence alignment algorithms play a central role in most bioinformatics software. However, porting these algorithms to GPUs can be challenging due to their reliance on irregular memory access patterns and integer-heavy operations. Here we present TANGO, an optimized GPU implementation of the Smith-Waterman (SW) algorithm with a focus on the traceback phase. We leverage stacked diagonal-major indexing and compressed binary representation for efficient adaptation of the traceback phase to GPUs. Our proposed implementation achieves speedups of 12.6 × and 9.9 × compared to state-of-the-art CPU libraries for DNA and protein alignments, respectively. It is the fastest SW library for protein alignments on GPU while providing comparable performance to other GPU libraries for DNA. Finally, we integrate TANGO into a large-scale metagenome assembly software to speed up a production workflow.
items.abstract_zh: 序列比对算法在大多数生物信息学软件中发挥着核心作用。然而，将这些算法移植到 GPU 可能具有挑战性，因为它们依赖于不规则的内存访问模式和整数密集型操作。在这里，我们介绍 TANGO，这是 Smith-Waterman (SW) 算法的优化 GPU 实现，重点关注回溯阶段。我们利用堆叠对角主索引和压缩二进制表示来有效地将回溯阶段适应 GPU。与最先进的 DNA 和蛋白质比对 CPU 库相比，我们提出的实现分别实现了 12.6 倍和 9.9 倍的加速。它是 GPU 上最快的蛋白质比对软件库，同时提供与其他 DNA GPU 库相当的性能。最后，我们将 TANGO 集成到大规模宏基因组组装软件中，以加快生产工作流程。

items.title: Accelerator integration in a tile-based SoC: lessons learned with a hardware floating point compression engine.
items.abstract: Heterogeneous Intellectual Property (IP) hardware acceleration engines have emerged as a viable path forward to improving performance in the waning of Moore’s Law and Dennard scaling. In this study, we design, prototype, and evaluate the HPC-specialized ZHW floating point compression accelerator as a resource on a System on Chip (SoC). Our full hardware/software implementation and evaluation reveal inefficiencies at the system level that significantly throttle the potential speedup of the ZHW accelerator. By optimizing data movement between CPU, memory, and accelerator, 6.9X is possible compared to a RISC-V64 core, and 2.9X over a Mac M1 ARM core.
items.abstract_zh: 异构知识产权 (IP) 硬件加速引擎已成为在摩尔定律和登纳德缩放定律衰落的情况下提高性能的可行途径。在本研究中，我们设计、原型化并评估 HPC 专用 ZHW 浮点压缩加速器作为片上系统 (SoC) 上的资源。我们完整的硬件/软件实施和评估揭示了系统级别的低效率，这极大地限制了 ZHW 加速器的潜在加速。通过优化 CPU、内存和加速器之间的数据移动，与 RISC-V64 内核相比，速度可提高 6.9 倍，与 Mac M1 ARM 内核相比，速度可提高 2.9 倍。

items.title: Extensions to the SENSEI In situ Framework for Heterogeneous Architectures.
items.abstract: The proliferation of GPUs and accelerators in recent supercomputing systems, so called heterogeneous architectures, has led to increased complexity in execution environments and programming models as well as to deeper memory hierarchies on these systems. In this work, we discuss challenges that arise in in situ code coupling on these heterogeneous architectures. In particular, we present data and execution model extensions to the SENSEI in situ framework that are targeted at the effective use of systems with heterogeneous architectures. We then use these new data and execution model extensions to investigate several in situ placement and execution configurations and to analyze the impact these choices have on overall performance.
items.abstract_zh: 最近的超级计算系统（即所谓的异构架构）中 GPU 和加速器的激增导致执行环境和编程模型的复杂性增加，以及这些系统上更深的内存层次结构。在这项工作中，我们讨论了这些异构架构上的原位代码耦合所出现的挑战。特别是，我们为 SENSEI in situ 框架提供了数据和执行模型扩展，旨在有效利用异构架构的系统。然后，我们使用这些新的数据和执行模型扩展来研究几种原位放置和执行配置，并分析这些选择对整体性能的影响。

items.title: REMORA Resource Monitor: Usability, Performance and User Interface Improvements.
items.abstract: As modern HPC systems grow in complexity, assessing the performance of an application in a user’s job may require collecting metrics about various system components, such as processors, memory, file systems, and the network. Although monitoring tools exist for system administrators and managers to collect such information, end users often have limited access to the system monitor of choice, or the user may be overloaded with interface access and performance metric selection. For novices and non-HPC experts, Remora (REsource Monitoring for Remote Applications) provides simple tools that allow quick diagnostic assessments of their jobs, and flexible tools that are adaptable to various types of workflow.
items.abstract_zh: 随着现代 HPC 系统变得越来越复杂，评估用户工作中应用程序的性能可能需要收集有关各种系统组件（例如处理器、内存、文件系统和网络）的指标。尽管系统管理员和管理者可以使用监控工具来收集此类信息，但最终用户通常对所选系统监控器的访问权限有限，或者用户可能因界面访问和性能指标选择而不堪重负。对于新手和非 HPC 专家，Remora（远程应用程序资源监控）提供了允许对其作业进行快速诊断评估的简单工具，以及适用于各种类型工作流程的灵活工具。

items.title: Enabling Agile Analysis of I/O Performance Data with PyDarshan.
items.abstract: Modern scientific applications utilize numerous software and hardware layers to efficiently access data. This approach poses a challenge for I/O optimization because of the need to instrument and correlate information across those layers. The Darshan characterization tool seeks to address this challenge by providing efficient, transparent, and compact runtime instrumentation of many common I/O interfaces. It also includes command-line tools to generate actionable insights and summary reports. However, the extreme diversity of today’s scientific applications means that not all applications are well served by one-size-fits-all analysis tools.
items.abstract_zh: 现代科学应用程序利用大量的软件和硬件层来有效地访问数据。这种方法对 I/O 优化提出了挑战，因为需要跨这些层检测和关联信息。 Darshan 表征工具旨在通过为许多常见 I/O 接口提供高效、透明且紧凑的运行时检测来应对这一挑战。它还包括用于生成可操作的见解和摘要报告的命令行工具。然而，当今科学应用的极端多样性意味着并非所有应用都能通过一刀切的分析工具得到很好的服务。

items.title: Fast Simulation of High-Depth QAOA Circuits.
items.abstract: Until high-fidelity quantum computers with a large number of qubits become widely available, classical simulation remains a vital tool for algorithm design, tuning, and validation. We present a simulator for the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA). Our simulator is designed with the goal of reducing the computational cost of QAOA parameter optimization and supports both CPU and GPU execution. Our central observation is that the computational cost of both simulating the QAOA state and computing the QAOA objective to be optimized can be reduced by precomputing the diagonal Hamiltonian encoding the problem. We reduce the time for a typical QAOA parameter optimization by eleven times for n = 26 qubits compared to a state-of-the-art GPU quantum circuit simulator based on cuQuantum. Our simulator is available on GitHub: https://github.com/jpmorganchase/QOKit
items.abstract_zh: 在具有大量量子位的高保真量子计算机得到广泛应用之前，经典模拟仍然是算法设计、调整和验证的重要工具。我们提出了量子近似优化算法（QAOA）的模拟器。我们的模拟器的设计目标是降低 QAOA 参数优化的计算成本，并支持 CPU 和 GPU 执行。我们的中心观察是，通过预先计算对问题进行编码的对角哈密顿量，可以降低模拟 QAOA 状态和计算要优化的 QAOA 目标的计算成本。与基于 cuQuantum 的最先进的 GPU 量子电路模拟器相比，我们将 n = 26 量子位的典型 QAOA 参数优化时间减少了 11 倍。我们的模拟器可在 GitHub 上找到：https://github.com/jpmorganchase/QOKit

items.title: Elephants Sharing the Highway: Studying TCP Fairness in Large Transfers over High Throughput Links.
items.abstract: Escalating bandwidth demand strains high-performance data networks, posing potential performance risks. TCP congestion control algorithms enhance reliability and optimize bandwidth usage. Network performance is influenced by factors such as AQM algorithms and router buffer size. In the context of constrained network resources, understanding how TCP flows share networks and the resulting performance impact is essential.
items.abstract_zh: 不断增长的带宽需求给高性能数据网络带来压力，带来潜在的性能风险。 TCP 拥塞控制算法可增强可靠性并优化带宽使用。网络性能受到 AQM 算法和路由器缓冲区大小等因素的影响。在网络资源受限的情况下，了解 TCP 流如何共享网络以及由此产生的性能影响至关重要。

items.title: Delivering Rules-Based Workflows for Science.
items.abstract: Rules-based workflow scheduling is a recently developed method for constructing an analysis structure, in a far more dynamic manner than traditional graph based systems. However, rules-based workflows are still in their relative infancy and lack the breadth of features available in traditional scientific workflow systems. This paper will address some of these missing features by introducing the new meow_base library for generic construction of rules-based systems while meeting the requirements of a scientific workflow management system. It will also present two example workflows, showing how rules-based systems can better enable analysis loops or human-in-the-loop interactions than more traditional workflow systems.
items.abstract_zh: 基于规则的工作流调度是最近开发的一种用于构建分析结构的方法，其方式比传统的基于图形的系统更加动态。然而，基于规则的工作流程仍处于相对初级阶段，缺乏传统科学工作流程系统中可用的广泛功能。本文将通过引入新的 meow_base 库来解决其中一些缺失的功能，该库用于基于规则的系统的通用构建，同时满足科学工作流程管理系统的要求。它还将展示两个示例工作流程，展示基于规则的系统如何比更传统的工作流程系统更好地实现分析循环或人机交互。

items.title: Enabling Quantum Computer Simulations on AMD GPUs: a HIP Backend for Google's qsim.
items.abstract: Quantum computer simulators play a critical role in supporting the development and validation of quantum algorithms and hardware. This study focuses on porting Google’s qsim, a quantum computer simulator, to AMD Graphics Processing Units (GPUs). We leverage the existing qsim CUDA backend and harness the HIPIFY tool to provide a qsim HIP backend tailored for AMD GPUs. Our performance analysis centers on evaluating the HIP backend’s capabilities, executed on a computing node equipped with the AMD MI250X GPU and the AMD EPYC Trento CPU. We use the Random Quantum Circuit (RQC) sampling benchmark, employing a circuit featuring 30 qubits. The qsim HIP backend on AMD GPU outperforms the CPU version by a remarkable margin, achieving seven to nine times faster speeds. Our investigation also compares qsim’s performance on the Nvidia A100 and AMD MI250X GPUs. The Nvidia A100 consistently outperforms the AMD MI250x counterpart, and this performance gap further widens with optimal gate fusion configurations. For instance, a two-gate fusion configuration exhibits a 5% difference, whereas a four-gate fusion setup reveals a large 44% performance gap. Our work highlights the substantial performance advantage of GPU-based quantum simulation over traditional CPU approaches. Despite a performance lag compared to the qsim CUDA backend, the AMD HIP qsim backend emerges as a competitive alternative poised for further optimization.
items.abstract_zh: 量子计算机模拟器在支持量子算法和硬件的开发和验证方面发挥着关键作用。这项研究的重点是将 Google 的 qsim（一种量子计算机模拟器）移植到 AMD 图形处理单元 (GPU)。我们利用现有的 qsim CUDA 后端并利用 HIPIFY 工具来提供专为 AMD GPU 定制的 qsim HIP 后端。我们的性能分析重点是评估 HIP 后端的功能，在配备 AMD MI250X GPU 和 AMD EPYC Trento CPU 的计算节点上执行。我们使用随机量子电路 (RQC) 采样基准，采用具有 30 个量子位的电路。 AMD GPU 上的 qsim HIP 后端的性能明显优于 CPU 版本，速度提高了七到九倍。我们的调查还比较了 qsim 在 Nvidia A100 和 AMD MI250X GPU 上的性能。 Nvidia A100 的性能始终优于 AMD MI250x 同类产品，并且随着最佳栅极融合配置，这种性能差距进一步扩大。例如，两门融合配置表现出 5% 的差异，而四门融合设置则表现出 44% 的巨大性能差距。我们的工作强调了基于 GPU 的量子模拟相对于传统 CPU 方法的显着性能优势。尽管性能落后于 qsim CUDA 后端，但 AMD HIP qsim 后端已成为一种有竞争力的替代方案，有望进一步优化。

items.title: Distributed Data Locality-Aware Job Allocation.
items.abstract: Scheduling tasks close to their associated data is crucial in distributed systems to minimize network traffic and latency. Some Big Data frameworks like Apache Spark employ locality functions and job allocation algorithms to minimize network traffic and execution times. However, these frameworks rely on centralized mechanisms, where the master node determines data locality by allocating tasks to available workers with minimal data transfer time, ignoring variances in worker configurations and availability. To address these limitations, we propose a decentralized approach to locality-driven scheduling that grants workers autonomy in the job allocation process while factoring in workers’ configurations, such as network and CPU speed differences. Our approach is developed and evaluated on Crossflow, a distributed stream processing platform with data-aware independent worker nodes. Preliminary evaluation experiments indicate that our approach can yield up to 3.57x faster execution times when compared to the baseline centralized approach where the master controls data locality.
items.abstract_zh: 在分布式系统中，将任务安排在靠近其关联数据的位置对于最大限度地减少网络流量和延迟至关重要。 Apache Spark 等一些大数据框架采用局部函数和作业分配算法来最大限度地减少网络流量和执行时间。然而，这些框架依赖于集中式机制，其中主节点通过以最少的数据传输时间将任务分配给可用的工作节点来确定数据局部性，忽略工作节点配置和可用性的差异。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种局部驱动调度的去中心化方法，该方法赋予工人在作业分配过程中的自主权，同时考虑工人的配置，例如网络和 CPU 速度差异。我们的方法是在 Crossflow 上开发和评估的，Crossflow 是一个具有数据感知独立工作节点的分布式流处理平台。初步评估实验表明，与主设备控制数据局部性的基线集中式方法相比，我们的方法可以将执行时间提高 3.57 倍。

items.title: Efficient data redistribution for malleable applications.
items.abstract: Process malleability can be defined as the ability of a distributed MPI parallel job to change the number of processes on–the–fly without stopping its execution, reallocating the compute resources originally assigned to the job, and without storing application data to disk. MPI malleability consists of four stages: resource reallocation, process management, data redistribution and execution resuming. Among them, data redistribution is the most time-consuming and determines the reconfiguration time. In this paper, we compare different implementations of this stage using point-to-point and collective MPI operations, and discuss the impact of overlapping computation-communication. We then combine these strategies with different methods to expand/shrink jobs, using a synthetic application to emulate MPI-based codes and their malleable counterparts, in order to evaluate the effect of different malleability methods in parallel distributed applications. The results show that the use of asynchronous techniques speeds up execution by 1.14 and 1.21, depending on the network used.
items.abstract_zh: 进程延展性可以定义为分布式 MPI 并行作业在不停止其执行、重新分配最初分配给作业的计算资源且不将应用程序数据存储到磁盘的情况下动态更改进程数量的能力。 MPI可延展性由四个阶段组成：资源重新分配、进程管理、数据重新分配和执行恢复。其中，数据重新分配是最耗时的，决定了重新配置的时间。在本文中，我们使用点对点和集体 MPI 操作来比较此阶段的不同实现，并讨论重叠计算通信的影响。然后，我们将这些策略与不同的方法相结合来扩展/收缩作业，使用综合应用程序来模拟基于 MPI 的代码及其可延展性对应项，以便评估不同可延展性方法在并行分布式应用程序中的效果。结果表明，使用异步技术可将执行速度提高 1.14 和 1.21，具体取决于所使用的网络。

items.title: Performance Evaluation of Heterogeneous GPU Programming Frameworks for Hemodynamic Simulations.
items.abstract: Preparing for the deployment of large scientific and engineering codes on upcoming exascale systems with GPU-dense nodes is made challenging by the unprecedented diversity of device architectures and heterogeneous programming models. In this work, we evaluate the process of porting a massively parallel, fluid dynamics code written in CUDA to SYCL, HIP, and Kokkos with a range of backends, using a combination of automated tools and manual tuning. We use a proxy application along with a custom performance model to inform the results and identify additional optimization strategies. At scale performance of the programming model implementations are evaluated on pre-production GPU node architectures for Frontier and Aurora, as well as on current NVIDIA device-based systems Summit and Polaris. Real-world workloads representing 3D blood flow calculations in complex vasculature are assessed. Our analysis highlights critical trade-offs between code performance, portability, and development time.
items.abstract_zh: 由于设备架构和异构编程模型前所未有的多样性，在即将推出的具有 GPU 密集节点的百亿亿次系统上准备部署大型科学和工程代码变得充满挑战。在这项工作中，我们结合使用自动化工具和手动调整，评估了将 CUDA 编写的大规模并行流体动力学代码移植到具有一系列后端的 SYCL、HIP 和 Kokkos 的过程。我们使用代理应用程序和自定义性能模型来告知结果并确定其他优化策略。在 Frontier 和 Aurora 的预生产 GPU 节点架构以及当前基于 NVIDIA 设备的系统 Summit 和 Polaris 上评估了编程模型实现的规模性能。评估代表复杂脉管系统中 3D 血流计算的真实工作负载。我们的分析强调了代码性能、可移植性和开发时间之间的关键权衡。

items.title: Scaling Computational Fluid Dynamics: In Situ Visualization of NekRS using SENSEI.
items.abstract: In the realm of Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD), the demand for memory and computation resources is extreme, necessitating the use of leadership-scale computing platforms for practical domain sizes. This intensive requirement renders traditional checkpointing methods ineffective due to the significant slowdown in simulations while saving state data to disk. As we progress towards exascale and GPU-driven High-Performance Computing (HPC) and confront larger problem sizes, the choice becomes increasingly stark: to compromise data fidelity or to reduce resolution. To navigate this challenge, this study advocates for the use of in situ analysis and visualization techniques. These allow more frequent data "snapshots" to be taken directly from memory, thus avoiding the need for disruptive checkpointing. We detail our approach of instrumenting NekRS, a GPU-focused thermal-fluid simulation code employing the spectral element method (SEM), and describe varied in situ and in transit strategies for data rendering. Additionally, we provide concrete scientific use-cases and report on runs performed on Polaris, Argonne Leadership Computing Facility’s (ALCF) 44 Petaflop supercomputer and Jülich Wizard for European Leadership Science (JUWELS) Booster, Jülich Supercomputing Centre’s (JSC) 71 Petaflop High Performance Computing (HPC) system, offering practical insight into the implications of our methodology.
items.abstract_zh: 在计算流体动力学 (CFD) 领域，对内存和计算资源的需求非常大，因此需要针对实际领域大小使用领先规模的计算平台。这种密集的要求使得传统的检查点方法变得无效，因为在将状态数据保存到磁盘时模拟速度显着减慢。随着我们向百亿亿级和 GPU 驱动的高性能计算 (HPC) 迈进，并面临更大的问题规模，选择变得越来越严峻：妥协数据保真度或降低分辨率。为了应对这一挑战，本研究提倡使用原位分析和可视化技术。这些允许直接从内存中获取更频繁的数据“快照”，从而避免了破坏性检查点的需要。我们详细介绍了 NekRS 的检测方法，NekRS 是一种采用谱元方法 (SEM) 的以 GPU 为中心的热流体模拟代码，并描述了各种数据渲染的原位和传输策略。此外，我们还提供了在 Polaris、阿贡领导计算设施 (ALCF) 44 Petaflop 超级计算机、Jülich Wizard for European Leadership Science (JUWELS) Booster、Jülich 超级计算中心 (JSC) 71 Petaflop 高性能计算 (HPC) 系统上执行的具体科学用例和报告，为我们的方法论的含义提供了实用的见解。

items.title: Enhancing perfSONAR Measurement Capabilities using P4 Programmable Data Planes.
items.abstract: As a key element in the Science Demilitarized Zone (Science DMZ) framework, perfSONAR is a crucial tool for monitoring and troubleshooting network performance. This paper presents a system that leverages the flexibility and granularity of P4 programmable data planes to enhance perfSONAR measurements. P4 is a programming language used to define how network packets are processed in the data plane. The proposed system employs a P4 programmable data plane that operates passively on real traffic. This approach ensures real-time per-flow monitoring and detailed insights, assisting administrators in understanding network traffic patterns. Moreover, the system detects microbursts and seamlessly integrates with a regular perfSONAR node. Experimental evaluations show that the proposed system provides full visibility of the real traffic, reports undetectable problems by a regular perfSONAR node, and notifies administrators if the endpoints of the connection cause low performance.
items.abstract_zh: 作为科学非军事区 (Science DMZ) 框架中的关键要素，perfSONAR 是网络性能监控和故障排除的重要工具。本文提出了一种利用 P4 可编程数据平面的灵活性和粒度来增强 perfSONAR 测量的系统。 P4 是一种编程语言，用于定义网络数据包在数据平面中的处理方式。所提出的系统采用 P4 可编程数据平面，在实际流量上被动运行。这种方法可确保实时每个流监控和详细洞察，帮助管理员了解网络流量模式。此外，该系统还可以检测微突发并与常规 perfSONAR 节点无缝集成。实验评估表明，所提出的系统提供了真实流量的完整可见性，通过常规 perfSONAR 节点报告无法检测到的问题，并在连接端点导致性能低下时通知管理员。

items.title: Data-Driven Discovery of Anchor Points for PDC Content.
items.abstract: The Parallel and Distributed Computing community has been interested in integrating PDC content into early CS curriculum to prime the students for more advanced materials and build a workforce able to leverage advanced computing infrastructure. To deploy this strategy at scale, it is important to identify anchor points in early CS courses where we can insert PDC content.
items.abstract_zh: 并行和分布式计算社区一直有兴趣将 PDC 内容整合到早期的计算机科学课程中，以便为学生提供更先进的材料并建立一支能够利用先进计算基础设施的劳动力队伍。为了大规模部署此策略，重要的是在早期 CS 课程中确定我们可以插入 PDC 内容的锚点。

items.title: Accelerating Deep Neural Network guided MCTS using Adaptive Parallelism.
items.abstract: Deep Neural Network guided Monte-Carlo Tree Search (DNN-MCTS) is a powerful class of AI algorithms. In DNN-MCTS, a Deep Neural Network model is trained collaboratively with a dynamic Monte-Carlo search tree to guide the agent towards actions that yields the highest returns. While the DNN operations are highly parallelizable, the search tree operations involved in MCTS are sequential and often become the system bottleneck. Existing MCTS parallel schemes on shared-memory multi-core CPU platforms either exploit data parallelism but sacrifice memory access latency, or take advantage of local cache for low-latency memory accesses but constrain the tree search to a single thread. In this work, we analyze the tradeoff of these parallel schemes and develop performance models for both parallel schemes based on the application and hardware parameters. We propose a novel implementation that addresses the tradeoff by adaptively choosing the optimal parallel scheme for the MCTS component on the CPU. Furthermore, we propose an efficient method for searching the optimal communication batch size as the MCTS component on the CPU interfaces with DNN operations offloaded to an accelerator (GPU). Using a representative DNN-MCTS algorithm - Alphazero on board game benchmarks, we show that the parallel framework is able to adaptively generate the best-performing parallel implementation, leading to a range of $1.5\times - 3\times$ speedup compared with the baseline methods on CPU and CPU-GPU platforms.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络引导蒙特卡罗树搜索 (DNN-MCTS) 是一类功能强大的 AI 算法。在 DNN-MCTS 中，深度神经网络模型与动态蒙特卡洛搜索树协同训练，以指导代理采取产生最高回报的行动。虽然 DNN 操作具有高度并行性，但 MCTS 中涉及的搜索树操作是顺序的，常常成为系统瓶颈。共享内存多核CPU平台上现有的MCTS并行方案要么利用数据并行性但牺牲内存访问延迟，要么利用本地缓存实现低延迟内存访问但将树搜索限制为单个线程。在这项工作中，我们分析了这些并行方案的权衡，并根据应用程序和硬件参数为这两种并行方案开发了性能模型。我们提出了一种新颖的实现方式，通过自适应地为 CPU 上的 MCTS 组件选择最佳并行方案来解决这一问题。此外，我们提出了一种有效的方法来搜索最佳通信批量大小，作为 CPU 接口上的 MCTS 组件，并将 DNN 操作卸载到加速器 (GPU)。在棋盘游戏基准测试中使用代表性的 DNN-MCTS 算法 - Alphazero，我们表明并行框架能够自适应地生成性能最佳的并行实现，与 CPU 和 CPU-GPU 平台上的基准方法相比，可实现 1.5 倍 - 3 倍的加速。

items.title: Filtering Wasteful Vertex Visits in Breadth-First Search.
items.abstract: Breadth-First Search (BFS) is a common building block for several graph processing algorithms today. In this work, we highlight that a large fraction of vertex visits across the network in distributed BFS results in wasteful work. We investigate methods to identify and filter such wasteful cross-network vertex visits to save network bandwidth for energy and performance improvements. We analyze the metadata requirements to perform such filtering in modern hierarchical distributed architectures and identify the tradeoffs between storage and filtering rate. We perform our experiments using the graph500 benchmark and provide a model to scale results to larger graphs. Finally, we propose heuristics to reduce the storage for a BFS message filter and explore the design space for implementing such filtering logic in software, hardware, or a combination.
items.abstract_zh: 广度优先搜索（BFS）是当今多种图处理算法的常见构建块。在这项工作中，我们强调分布式 BFS 中跨网络的大部分顶点访问会导致工作浪费。我们研究了识别和过滤此类浪费的跨网络顶点访问的方法，以节省网络带宽，从而提高能源和性能。我们分析了在现代分层分布式架构中执行此类过滤的元数据要求，并确定存储和过滤率之间的权衡。我们使用 graph500 基准进行实验，并提供一个模型将结果扩展到更大的图表。最后，我们提出启发式方法来减少 BFS 消息过滤器的存储，并探索在软件、硬件或组合中实现此类过滤逻辑的设计空间。

items.title: Adaptive Stopping Rule for Performance Measurements.
items.abstract: Performance variability in complex computer systems is a major challenge for accurate benchmarking and performance characterization, especially for tightly-coupled large-scale high-performance computing systems. Point summaries of performance may be both uninformative, if they do not capture the full richness of its behavior, and inaccurate, if they are derived from an inadequate sample set of measurements. Determining the correct sample set—and in particular, its size—requires balancing tradeoffs of computation, methodology, and statistical power.
items.abstract_zh: 复杂计算机系统中的性能变化是精确基准测试和性能表征的主要挑战，特别是对于紧密耦合的大规模高性能计算系统。如果性能的点总结不能全面反映其行为的丰富性，则它们可能缺乏信息；如果它们是从不充分的测量样本集得出的，则可能是不准确的。确定正确的样本集（特别是其大小）需要平衡计算、方法和统计功效的权衡。

items.title: Analyzing the Performance Impact of HPC Workloads with Gramine+SGX on 3rd Generation Xeon Scalable Processors.
items.abstract: Intel SGX, which provides a strongly isolated execution environment for running applications to protect their code and data from privileged adversaries, is hopeful for increased integrity and confidentiality in multi-user systems. However, SGX is rarely used in the field of HPC despite the increasing importance of data protection. This is because SGX had limited memory resources and required supercomputing users to modify their code for execution. Lately, both 3rd generation Xeon scalable processors, which have many advanced data protection features including increased SGX memory, and Gramine 1.0, which is the first production-ready version of a library OS for the execution of unmodified applications on SGX, were released. However, the impact of these state-of-the-art technologies on HPC workloads is not well investigated.
items.abstract_zh: 英特尔 SGX 为运行的应用程序提供了一个高度隔离的执行环境，以保护其代码和数据免受特权对手的侵害，有望提高多用户系统的完整性和机密性。然而，尽管数据保护的重要性日益增加，但 SGX 在 HPC 领域却很少使用。这是因为 SGX 的内存资源有限，并且需要超级计算用户修改其代码才能执行。最近，发布了第三代 Xeon 可扩展处理器和 Gramine 1.0，前者具有许多先进的数据保护功能，包括增加的 SGX 内存，后者是库操作系统的第一个生产就绪版本，用于在 SGX 上执行未经修改的应用程序。然而，这些最先进的技术对 HPC 工作负载的影响尚未得到充分研究。

items.title: Filtering and Ranking of Code Regions for Parallelization via Hotspot Detection and OpenMP Overhead Analysis.
items.abstract: Many high-performance computing applications reach millions of code lines and hundreds of code regions. Analyzing all code regions for parallelization with OpenMP is neither efficient nor necessary. To facilitate this task and minimize the effort by the user, the code regions of the application need to be filtered and ranked. We provide a simple filtering method to detect the critical code regions by clearly defining a hotspot. Afterward, we identify parallelizable loops by analyzing their data dependencies using an automatic tool. As the number of parallel opportunities can be high and the users must verify these parallel suggestions, we suggest a ranking strategy based on parallelization overhead to help them prioritize their endeavors and present a set of OpenMP microbenchmarks for overhead analysis. We calculate optimistic expected benefits using overhead estimations as ranking metrics and show how our ranking provides an improvement on the ranking based on serial runtime.
items.abstract_zh: 许多高性能计算应用程序达到数百万个代码行和数百个代码区域。使用 OpenMP 分析所有代码区域以实现并行化既不高效也没有必要。为了促进此任务并最大限度地减少用户的工作量，需要对应用程序的代码区域进行过滤和排名。我们提供了一种简单的过滤方法，通过明确定义热点来检测关键代码区域。之后，我们通过使用自动工具分析循环的数据依赖性来识别可并行循环。由于并行机会的数量可能很高，并且用户必须验证这些并行建议，因此我们建议采用基于并行化开销的排名策略，以帮助他们确定工作的优先级，并提供一组用于开销分析的 OpenMP 微基准。我们使用开销估计作为排名指标来计算乐观的预期收益，并展示我们的排名如何改进基于串行运行时间的排名。

items.title: MatRIS: Multi-level Math Library Abstraction for Heterogeneity and Performance Portability using IRIS Runtime.
items.abstract: Vendor libraries are tuned for a specific architecture and are not portable to others. Moreover, they lack support for heterogeneity and multi-device orchestration, which is required for efficient use of contemporary HPC and cloud resources. To address these challenges, we introduce MatRIS—a multilevel math library abstraction for scalable and performance-portable sparse/dense BLAS/LAPACK operations using IRIS runtime. The MatRIS-IRIS co-design introduces three levels of abstraction to make the implementation completely architecture agnostic and provide highly productive programming. We demonstrate that MatRIS is portable without any change in source code and can fully utilize multi-device heterogeneous systems by achieving high performance and scalability on Summit, Frontier, and a CADES cloud node equipped with four NVIDIA A100 GPUs and four AMD MI100 GPUs. A detailed performance study is presented in which MatRIS demonstrates multi-device scalability. When compared, MatRIS provides competitive and even better performance than libraries from vendors and other third parties.
items.abstract_zh: 供应商库针对特定架构进行了调整，并且不可移植到其他架构。此外，它们缺乏对异构性和多设备编排的支持，而这是高效利用当代 HPC 和云资源所必需的。为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了 MatRIS——一个多级数学库抽象，用于使用 IRIS 运行时进行可扩展和性能可移植的稀疏/密集 BLAS/LAPACK 操作。 MatRIS-IRIS 协同设计引入了三个抽象级别，使实现完全与架构无关，并提供高效的编程。我们证明MatRIS是可移植的，无需更改源代码，并且可以通过在Summit、Frontier和配备四个NVIDIA A100 GPU和四个AMD MI100 GPU的CADES云节点上实现高性能和可扩展性来充分利用多设备异构系统。详细的性能研究中，MatRIS 展示了多设备可扩展性。相比之下，MatRIS 提供的性能比供应商和其他第三方的库具有竞争力，甚至更好。

items.title: Energy consumption comparison of parallel linear systems solver algorithms on HPC infrastructure.
items.abstract: High-Performance Computing (HPC) systems today are gradually increasing in size and complexity due to the correspondent demand for ever-increasing computing needs, requiring more complicated tasks and higher accuracy. The growing energy needs of HPC systems require the urgent adoption of green HPC approaches to mitigate environmental impact and promote energy-efficient computing.
items.abstract_zh: 由于计算需求不断增加，需要更复杂的任务和更高的精度，当今的高性能计算 (HPC) 系统的规模和复杂性逐渐增加。 HPC 系统不断增长的能源需求要求迫切采用绿色 HPC 方法来减轻对环境的影响并促进节能计算。

items.title: AutoLearn: Learning in the Edge to Cloud Continuum.
items.abstract: Technological advancements have led to an increase in teaching the fundamentals of cloud computing, robotics and autonomous systems and their importance, relying on strong hands-on practical experimentation. The National Science Foundation (NSF)-supported testbeds have opened the doors for experimentation and support in the next era of computing platforms and large-scale cloud research. In this paper, we present an educational module that conveys accessibility to education, aiming to prepare learners for technological career paths with the motivation to bring hands-on sessions, and on the idea of building a freely available set of artifacts that can serve the educational community. Specifically, we present AutoLearn: Learning in the Edge to Cloud Continuum, an educational module that integrates a collection of artifacts, based on a small scale open-source self-driving platform that leverages the Chameleon Cloud testbed to teach cloud computing concepts, edge devices technology, and artificial intelligence driven applications.
items.abstract_zh: 技术进步导致云计算、机器人和自主系统的基础知识及其重要性的教学有所增加，这依赖于强有力的实践实验。美国国家科学基金会 (NSF) 支持的测试平台为下一代计算平台和大规模云研究的实验和支持打开了大门。在本文中，我们提出了一个传达教育可及性的教育模块，旨在让学习者为技术职业道路做好准备，并有动力进行实践课程，并基于构建一套可以为教育社区服务的免费工件的想法。具体来说，我们推出了 AutoLearn：从边缘到云连续体中的学习，这是一个集成了一系列工件的教育模块，基于小型开源自动驾驶平台，利用 Chameleon Cloud 测试床来教授云计算概念、边缘设备技术和人工智能驱动的应用程序。

items.title: The I/O Trace Initiative: Building a Collaborative I/O Archive to Advance HPC.
items.abstract: HPC application developers and administrators need to understand the complex interplay between compute clusters and storage systems to make effective optimization decisions. Ad hoc investigations of this interplay based on isolated case studies can lead to conclusions that are incorrect or difficult to generalize. The I/O Trace Initiative aims to improve the scientific community’s understanding of I/O operations by building a searchable collaborative archive of I/O traces from a wide range of applications and machines, with a focus on high-performance computing and scalable AI/ML. This initiative advances the accessibility of I/O trace data by enabling users to locate and compare traces based on user-specified criteria. It also provides a visual analytics platform for in-depth analysis, paving the way for the development of advanced performance optimization techniques. By acting as a hub for trace data, the initiative fosters collaborative research by encouraging data sharing and collective learning.
items.abstract_zh: HPC 应用程序开发人员和管理员需要了解计算集群和存储系统之间复杂的相互作用，才能做出有效的优化决策。基于孤立案例研究对这种相互作用进行的特别调查可能会得出不正确或难以概括的结论。 I/O 跟踪计划旨在通过构建来自各种应用程序和机器的 I/O 跟踪的可搜索协作档案，提高科学界对 I/O 操作的理解，重点关注高性能计算和可扩展的 AI/ML。该举措使用户能够根据用户指定的标准定位和比较跟踪，从而提高了 I/O 跟踪数据的可访问性。它还提供了一个用于深入分析的可视化分析平台，为高级性能优化技术的开发铺平了道路。通过充当追踪数据的中心，该计划通过鼓励数据共享和集体学习来促进协作研究。

items.title: Survey of adaptive containerization architectures for HPC.
items.abstract: Containers offer an array of advantages that benefit research reproducibility and portability. As container tools mature, container security improves, and high-performance computing (HPC) and cloud system tools converge, supercomputing centers are increasingly integrating containers into their workflows. Despite this, most research into containers remains focused on cloud environments.
items.abstract_zh: 容器具有一系列优势，有利于研究的可重复性和可移植性。随着容器工具的成熟、容器安全性的提高以及高性能计算（HPC）和云系统工具的融合，超级计算中心越来越多地将容器集成到其工作流程中。尽管如此，大多数对容器的研究仍然集中在云环境上。

items.title: Introducing Open OnDemand to Supercomputer Fugaku.
items.abstract: One of the issues with high-performance computing (HPC) clusters is that the prerequisite knowledge required to use them is large, making the learning cost high for novice users. Moreover, it is desirable to run graphical user interface applications with interactive operations on the compute nodes, but the procedure is complicated. This paper describes how we introduced Open OnDemand, a web portal that enables easy use of the computing resources of an HPC cluster, to Fugaku, a Japanese flagship supercomputer. To introduce the resources to new users, we developed an adapter that enables the job scheduler used in Fugaku to be used from Open OnDemand. In addition, to further improve user convenience, we developed applications that enable data sharing between Open OnDemand and external storage, HPC infrastructure shared storage, and GakuNin Research Data Management. This paper describes the various features we have given to Open OnDemand for Fugaku and the development of the data sharing applications.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能计算（HPC）集群的问题之一是使用它们所需的必备知识较多，使得新手用户的学习成本较高。此外，希望在计算节点上运行具有交互操作的图形用户界面应用程序，但过程复杂。本文介绍了我们如何向日本旗舰超级计算机 Fugaku 引入 Open OnDemand（一个可以轻松使用 HPC 集群计算资源的门户网站）。为了向新用户介绍资源，我们开发了一个适配器，使 Fugaku 中使用的作业调度程序能够从 Open OnDemand 中使用。此外，为了进一步提高用户便利性，我们开发了支持 Open OnDemand 与外部存储、HPC 基础设施共享存储和 GakuNin Research Data Management 之间数据共享的应用程序。本文描述了我们为 Fugaku 提供的 Open OnDemand 的各种功能以及数据共享应用程序的开发。

items.title: Entropy-Based Regularization on Deep Learning Models for Anti-Cancer Drug Response Prediction.
items.abstract: This work studies a particular setting for regression problems – tasks with complex combinatorial data space where samples can be divided into distinct groups. Anti-cancer drug response prediction is a perfect example of this setting, in which each sample includes cancer biological features and drug chemical information. Many existing works of pan-drug and pan-cancer response modeling treat different combinations of drugs and cancers as individual samples. A potential problem in these works is that a model may be heavily influenced and biased toward overrepresented drugs and cancers. Our work develops a method to solve this issue by adjusting the model training process in a deep learning framework.
items.abstract_zh: 这项工作研究了回归问题的特定设置 - 具有复杂组合数据空间的任务，其中样本可以分为不同的组。抗癌药物反应预测是这种设置的一个完美例子，其中每个样本都包含癌症生物学特征和药物化学信息。许多现有的泛药物和泛癌症反应模型工作将药物和癌症的不同组合视为单独的样本。这些工作中的一个潜在问题是模型可能会受到严重影响并偏向代表性过高的药物和癌症。我们的工作开发了一种通过调整深度学习框架中的模型训练过程来解决这个问题的方法。

items.title: A Comparison of Mesh-Free Differentiable Programming and Data-Driven Strategies for Optimal Control under PDE Constraints.
items.abstract: The field of Optimal Control under Partial Differential Equations (PDE) constraints is rapidly changing under the influence of Deep Learning and the accompanying automatic differentiation libraries. Novel techniques like Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) and Differentiable Programming (DP) are to be contrasted with established numerical schemes like Direct-Adjoint Looping (DAL). We present a comprehensive comparison of DAL, PINN, and DP using a general-purpose mesh-free differentiable PDE solver based on Radial Basis Functions. Under Laplace and Navier-Stokes equations, we found DP to be extremely effective as it produces the most accurate gradients; thriving even when DAL fails and PINNs struggle. Additionally, we provide a detailed benchmark highlighting the limited conditions under which any of those methods can be efficiently used. Our work provides a guide to Optimal Control practitioners and connects them further to the Deep Learning community.
items.abstract_zh: 在深度学习和相关自动微分库的影响下，偏微分方程 (PDE) 约束下的最优控制领域正在迅速发生变化。物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 和可微分编程 (DP) 等新技术将与直接伴随循环 (DAL) 等已建立的数值方案进行对比。我们使用基于径向基函数的通用无网格可微 PDE 求解器对 DAL、PINN 和 DP 进行了全面比较。在拉普拉斯和纳维-斯托克斯方程下，我们发现 DP 非常有效，因为它可以产生最准确的梯度；即使 DAL 失败且 PINN 陷入困境，仍能蓬勃发展。此外，我们还提供了详细的基准，强调了可以有效使用这些方法的有限条件。我们的工作为最优控制从业者提供了指南，并将他们进一步与深度学习社区联系起来。

items.title: Porting Batched Iterative Solvers onto Intel GPUs with SYCL.
items.abstract: Batched linear solvers play a vital role in computational sciences, especially in the fields of plasma physics and combustion simulations. With the imminent deployment of the Aurora Supercomputer and other upcoming systems equipped with Intel GPUs, there is a compelling demand to expand the capabilities of these solvers for Intel GPU architectures.
items.abstract_zh: 批处理线性求解器在计算科学中发挥着至关重要的作用，特别是在等离子体物理和燃烧模拟领域。随着 Aurora 超级计算机和其他即将推出的配备英特尔 GPU 的系统即将部署，迫切需要扩展这些求解器针对英特尔 GPU 架构的功能。

items.title: Enhancing Heterogeneous Federated Learning with Knowledge Extraction and Multi-Model Fusion.
items.abstract: Concerned with user data privacy, this paper presents a new federated learning (FL) method that trains machine learning models on edge devices without accessing sensitive data. Traditional FL methods, although privacy-protective, fail to manage model heterogeneity and incur high communication costs due to their reliance on aggregation methods. To address this limitation, we propose a resource-aware FL method that aggregates local knowledge from edge models and distills it into robust global knowledge through knowledge distillation. This method allows efficient multi-model knowledge fusion and the deployment of resource-aware models while preserving model heterogeneity. Our method improves communication cost and performance in heterogeneous data and models compared to existing FL algorithms. Notably, it reduces the communication cost of ResNet-32 by up to 50% and VGG-11 by up to 10 × while delivering superior performance.
items.abstract_zh: 考虑到用户数据隐私，本文提出了一种新的联邦学习（FL）方法，该方法可以在边缘设备上训练机器学习模型，而无需访问敏感数据。传统的 FL 方法虽然能够保护隐私，但由于依赖聚合方法，无法管理模型异构性，并且会产生高昂的通信成本。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种资源感知的 FL 方法，该方法聚合来自边缘模型的局部知识，并通过知识蒸馏将其提炼为强大的全局知识。该方法允许有效的多模型知识融合和资源感知模型的部署，同时保留模型异构性。 Our method improves communication cost and performance in heterogeneous data and models compared to existing FL algorithms.值得注意的是，它可将 ResNet-32 的通信成本降低高达 50%，将 VGG-11 的通信成本降低高达 10 倍，同时提供卓越的性能。

items.title: GrIOt: Graph-based Modeling of HPC Application I/O Call Stacks for Predictive Prefetch.
items.abstract: International audience
items.abstract_zh: 国际观众

items.title: Empowering Scientific Discovery Through Computing at the Advanced Photon Source.
items.abstract: This paper explores the challenges and solutions for managing and processing the vast amount of data generated by the Advanced Photon Source (APS), a synchrotron light source facility producing ultra-bright x-rays for diverse scientific domains. With 68 experimental beamlines covering materials research, biology, and more, the APS serves a wide user base across academia, government, and industry. The ongoing upgrade of the APS storage ring and installation of new instruments will amplify data generation and processing demands. This paper discusses the approach to address these demands through automated data processing using standardized workflows that produce faster scientific insights. The APS Data Management System coordinates various data related tasks to manage storage, data transfer, metadata cataloging, data processing, and interfaces with tools provided by Globus. Through integration with the Argonne Leadership Computing Facility (ALCF), APS users can efficiently access high-performance computing resources. Standardized workflows have led to reduced computational burdens on scientists and greater accessibility of high performance computing resources. We demonstrate how standardization and collaboration enable scientists to rapidly convert raw data into meaningful scientific results, establishing a streamlined path from data collection to analysis and ultimately to publication.
items.abstract_zh: 本文探讨了管理和处理高级光子源 (APS) 生成的大量数据所面临的挑战和解决方案，高级光子源是一种同步加速器光源设施，可为不同科学领域产生超亮 X 射线。 APS 拥有涵盖材料研究、生物学等领域的 68 条实验光束线，为学术界、政府和工业界的广泛用户群提供服务。 APS 存储环的持续升级和新仪器的安装将扩大数据生成和处理需求。本文讨论了通过使用标准化工作流程进行自动化数据处理来满足这些需求的方法，从而产生更快的科学见解。 APS 数据管理系统协调各种数据相关任务，以管理存储、数据传输、元数据编目、数据处理以及与 Globus 提供的工具的接口。通过与阿贡领导计算设施（ALCF）的集成，APS用户可以高效地访问高性能计算资源。标准化工作流程减轻了科学家的计算负担，并提高了高性能计算资源的可访问性。我们展示标准化和协作如何使科学家能够快速将原始数据转化为有意义的科学结果，建立从数据收集到分析并最终到出版的简化路径。

items.title: Fluxion: A Scalable Graph-Based Resource Model for HPC Scheduling Challenges.
items.abstract: The current era of exascale supercomputing and the emergence of a computing continuum present several significant resource management challenges. These include, but are not limited to, management of complex and high-throughput scientific workflows, diverse resources such as power and network bandwidth, extremely heterogenous and dynamic systems, elasticity in user jobs, and disaggregated and converged environments. The resource models that underpin today’s job scheduling frameworks reflect the node- (or core-) centric system architectures prevalent when the frameworks were designed. Consequently, they are not suited to capturing resource relationships or dynamism. The inability to express relationships or dynamism limits their applicability to the emerging multifaceted challenges in high-performance computing (HPC) and Cloud, as well as other converged environments. In this paper, we propose a scalable graph-based resource model to overcome these challenges, which allows for representation of complex, changing resource relationships and multiple containment hierarchies. We implement this model, Fluxion, in a production-quality scheduling framework, and evaluate its performance. Additionally, we present emerging and advanced scheduling use cases that are enabled by our model.
items.abstract_zh: 当前的亿亿级超级计算时代和计算连续体的出现提出了一些重大的资源管理挑战。这些包括但不限于复杂和高通量科学工作流程的管理、电源和网络带宽等多样化资源、极其异构和动态的系统、用户作业的弹性以及分散和融合的环境。支持当今作业调度框架的资源模型反映了设计框架时流行的以节点（或核心）为中心的系统架构。因此，它们不适合捕获资源关系或动态。无法表达关系或动态限制了它们对高性能计算 (HPC) 和云以及其他融合环境中新兴的多方面挑战的适用性。在本文中，我们提出了一种可扩展的基于图的资源模型来克服这些挑战，该模型允许表示复杂的、不断变化的资源关系和多个包含层次结构。我们在生产质量调度框架中实现了这个模型 Fluxion，并评估其性能。此外，我们还介绍了我们的模型支持的新兴和高级调度用例。

items.title: Optimized Uncertainty Estimation for Vision Transformers: Enhancing Adversarial Robustness and Performance Using Selective Classification.
items.abstract: Deep Learning models often exhibit undue confidence when encountering out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs, misclassifying with high confidence. The ideal outcome, in these cases, would be an "I do not know" verdict. We enhance the trustworthiness of our models through selective classification, allowing the model to abstain from making predictions when facing uncertainty. Rather than a singular prediction, the model offers a prediction distribution, enabling users to gauge the model’s trustworthiness and determine the need for human intervention. We assess uncertainty in two baseline models: a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and a Vision Transformer (ViT). By leveraging these uncertainty values, we minimize errors by refraining from predictions during high uncertainty. Additionally, we evaluate these models across various distributed architectures, including new AI architectures, Cerebras CS-2, and SambaNova SN30.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习模型在遇到分布外（OOD）输入时通常会表现出过度的置信度，从而导致高置信度的错误分类。在这些情况下，理想的结果是“我不知道”的判决。我们通过选择性分类来增强模型的可信度，使模型在面临不确定性时避免做出预测。该模型提供的不是单一预测，而是预测分布，使用户能够衡量模型的可信度并确定是否需要人工干预。我们评估两个基线模型的不确定性：卷积神经网络（CNN）和视觉变换器（ViT）。通过利用这些不确定性值，我们可以在高度不确定性期间避免进行预测，从而最大限度地减少错误。此外，我们还跨各种分布式架构评估这些模型，包括新的 AI 架构、Cerebras CS-2 和 SambaNova SN30。

items.title: Towards Collaborative Continuous Benchmarking for HPC.
items.abstract: Benchmarking is integral to procurement of HPC systems, communicating HPC center workloads to HPC vendors, and verifying performance of the delivered HPC systems. Currently, HPC benchmarking is manual and challenging at every step, posing a high barrier to entry, and hampering reproducibility of the benchmarks across different HPC systems. In this paper, we propose collaborative continuous benchmarking to enable functional reproducibility, automation, and community collaboration in HPC benchmarking. Recent progress in HPC automation allows us to consider previously unimaginable large-scale improvements to the HPC ecosystem. We define the minimal requirements for collaborative continuous benchmarking and develop a common language to streamline the interactions between HPC centers, vendors, and researchers. We demonstrate the initial implementation of collaborative continuous benchmarking, and introduce an open source continuous benchmarking repository, Benchpark, for community collaboration. We believe collaborative continuous benchmarking will help overcome the human bottleneck in HPC benchmarking, enabling better evaluation of our systems and enabling a more productive collaboration within the HPC community.
items.abstract_zh: 基准测试对于 HPC 系统的采购、向 HPC 供应商传达 HPC 中心工作负载以及验证所交付的 HPC 系统的性能至关重要。目前，HPC 基准测试是手动的，每一步都具有挑战性，构成了很高的进入壁垒，并阻碍了不同 HPC 系统之间基准测试的可重复性。在本文中，我们提出协作式连续基准测试，以实现 HPC 基准测试中的功能可重复性、自动化和社区协作。 HPC 自动化的最新进展使我们能够考虑对 HPC 生态系统进行以前难以想象的大规模改进。我们定义了协作持续基准测试的最低要求，并开发了一种通用语言来简化 HPC 中心、供应商和研究人员之间的交互。我们演示了协作式连续基准测试的初步实施，并引入了一个开源连续基准测试存储库 Benchpark，用于社区协作。我们相信协作式连续基准测试将有助于克服 HPC 基准测试中的人力瓶颈，从而更好地评估我们的系统并在 HPC 社区内实现更高效的协作。

items.title: Memory Transfer Decomposition: Exploring Smart Data Movement Through Architecture-Aware Strategies.
items.abstract: Modern high-performance computing systems feature myriad compute units connected via a complex network of nonuniform links. While extensive connectivity can improve communication latency and bandwidth between components, it requires careful orchestration. However, heterogeneous programming models generally expose a flat view of the hardware where all components are connected in a star topology through a uniform, non-descriptive link to the central processing unit. This discrepancy between actual architecture and the simplified abstraction most often employed by programmers results in suboptimal utilization of the complex system interconnects.
items.abstract_zh: 现代高性能计算系统具有通过复杂的非均匀链接网络连接的无数计算单元。虽然广泛的连接可以改善组件之间的通信延迟和带宽，但它需要仔细的编排。然而，异构编程模型通常公开硬件的平面视图，其中所有组件通过统一的、非描述性的链接以星形拓扑连接到中央处理单元。实际架构与程序员最常使用的简化抽象之间的差异导致复杂系统互连的利用率不高。

items.title: Risk-Aware Scheduling Algorithms for Variable Capacity Resources.
items.abstract: The drive to decarbonize the power grid to slow the pace of climate change has caused dramatic variation in the cost, availability, and carbon-intensity of power. This has begun to shape the planning and operation of datacenters. This paper focuses on the design of scheduling algorithms for independent jobs that are submitted to a platform whose resource capacity varies over time. Jobs are submitted online and assigned on a target machine by the scheduler, which is agnostic to the rate and amount of resource variation. The optimization objective is the goodput, defined as the fraction of time devoted to effective computations (re-execution does not count). We introduce several novel algorithms that: (i) decide which fraction of the resources can be used safely; (ii) maintain a risk index associated to each machine; and (iii) achieves a global load balance while mapping longer jobs to safer machines. We assess the performance of these algorithms using one set of actual workflow traces together with three sets of synthetic traces. The goodput achieved by our algorithms increases up to 10% compared to standard first-fit approaches, while we never experience any loss in complementary metrics such as the maximum or average stretch.
items.abstract_zh: 为了减缓气候变化的步伐而对电网进行脱碳的努力导致了电力成本、可用性和碳强度的巨大变化。这已经开始影响数据中心的规划和运营。本文重点关注提交到资源容量随时间变化的平台的独立作业的调度算法的设计。作业由调度程序在线提交并分配到目标计算机上，这与资源变化的速率和数量无关。优化目标是有效吞吐量，定义为用于有效计算的时间比例（重新执行不算在内）。我们引入了几种新颖的算法：（i）决定哪一部分资源可以安全使用； (ii) 维护与每台机器相关的风险指数； (iii) 实现全局负载平衡，同时将较长的工作映射到更安全的机器上。我们使用一组实际工作流程跟踪和三组合成跟踪来评估这些算法的性能。与标准的首次拟合方法相比，我们的算法实现的吞吐量提高了 10%，而我们从未经历过最大或平均拉伸等补充指标的任何损失。

items.title: Maximizing Data Utility for HPC Python Workflow Execution.
items.abstract: Large-scale HPC workflows are increasingly implemented in dynamic languages such as Python, which allow for more rapid development than traditional techniques. However, the cost of executing Python applications at scale is often dominated by the distribution of common datasets and complex software dependencies. As the application scales up, data distribution becomes a limiting factor that prevents scaling beyond a few hundred nodes. To address this problem, we present the integration of Parsl (a Python-native parallel programming library) with TaskVine (a data-intensive workflow execution engine). Instead of relying on a shared filesystem to provide data to tasks on demand, Parsl is able to express advance data needs to TaskVine, which then performs efficient data distribution at runtime. This combination provides a performance speedup of 1.48x over the typical method of on-demand paging from the shared filesystem, while also providing an average task speedup of 1.79x with 2048 tasks and 256 nodes.
items.abstract_zh: 大规模 HPC 工作流程越来越多地使用 Python 等动态语言实现，这使得开发速度比传统技术更快。然而，大规模执行 Python 应用程序的成本通常主要由公共数据集的分布和复杂的软件依赖项决定。随着应用程序的扩展，数据分布成为阻止扩展超过数百个节点的限制因素。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Parsl（Python 原生并行编程库）与 TaskVine（数据密集型工作流执行引擎）的集成。 Parsl 不依赖共享文件系统按需向任务提供数据，而是能够向 TaskVine 表达预先的数据需求，然后 TaskVine 在运行时执行高效的数据分发。与从共享文件系统按需分页的典型方法相比，这种组合的性能加速了 1.48 倍，同时还为 2048 个任务和 256 个节点提供了 1.79 倍的平均任务加速。

items.title: Enabling Performant Thermal Conductivity Modeling with DeePMD and LAMMPS on CPUs.
items.abstract: The limiting factor in the application of high-accuracy ab-initio molecular dynamics (AIMD) simulations for large systems has been the associated high computational costs. The ability to retain DFT-level accuracy while alleviating these computational costs has been made possible by the use of machine learning potentials, known as Deep Potential (DP) models, which allow accurate prediction of interatomic force and energy distributions for a system based on AIMD input data. DeePMD-kit is a Python/C++ package which implements this DP series model. It is interfaced with TensorFlow for model training and with LAMMPS when using the model for inference. In this paper, we extend DeePMD to accurately predict the thermal conductivity for crystalline Au and Ag systems of up to 2 million atoms. We demonstrate that both DeePMD training and DeePMD inference with LAMMPS can be run efficiently on CPU-based systems. On a single node of 4th generation Intel® Xeon® Scalable 9480 processors, we are able to train the model in less than 5 minutes1. Using this trained model with LAMMPS on 128 dual-socket nodes with Intel® Xeon® Scalable 8480+ processors, we are able to accurately determine the thermal conductivity of crystalline Au and Ag systems, within 5% of experimental results, in under one hour. 2.
items.abstract_zh: 在大型系统中应用高精度从头算分子动力学 (AIMD) 模拟的限制因素是相关的高计算成本。通过使用机器学习势（称为深势 (DP) 模型），可以在保持 DFT 级精度的同时降低这些计算成本，该模型允许基于 AIMD 输入数据准确预测系统的原子间力和能量分布。 DeePMD-kit 是实现该 DP 系列模型的 Python/C++ 包。它与 TensorFlow 接口进行模型训练，并在使用模型进行推理时与 LAMMPS 接口。在本文中，我们扩展了 DeePMD，以准确预测最多 200 万个原子的晶体金和银系统的热导率。我们证明，使用 LAMMPS 进行的 DeePMD 训练和 DeePMD 推理都可以在基于 CPU 的系统上高效运行。在第四代 Intel® Xeon® 可扩展 9480 处理器的单节点上，我们能够在不到 5 分钟的时间内训练模型1。在配备英特尔® 至强® 可扩展 8480+ 处理器的 128 个双路节点上使用经过 LAMMPS 训练的模型，我们能够在一小时内准确确定晶体金和银系统的热导率，实验结果误差在 5% 以内。 2.

items.title: AI/ML-Derived Whole-Genome Predictor Prospectively and Clinically Predicts Survival and Response to Treatment in Brain Cancer.
items.abstract: No abstract available.
items.abstract_zh: 没有可用的摘要。

items.title: Charliecloud's layer-free, Git-based container build cache.
items.abstract: A popular approach to deploying scientific applications in high performance computing (HPC) is Linux containers, which package an application and all its dependencies as a single unit. This image is built by interpreting instructions in a machine-readable recipe, which is faster with a build cache that stores instruction results for re-use. The standard approach (used e.g. by Docker and Podman) is a many-layered union filesystem, encoding differences between layers as tar archives. Our experiments show this performs similarly to layered caches on both build time and disk usage, with a considerable advantage for many-instruction recipes. Our approach also has structural advantages: better diff format, lower cache overhead, and better file de-duplication. These results show that a Git-based cache for layer-free container implementations is not only possible but may outperform the layered approach on important dimensions.
items.abstract_zh: 在高性能计算 (HPC) 中部署科学应用程序的一种流行方法是 Linux 容器，它将应用程序及其所有依赖项打包为一个单元。该映像是通过解释机器可读配方中的指令来构建的，通过存储指令结果以供重用的构建缓存，速度更快。标准方法（例如由 Docker 和 Podman 使用）是一个多层联合文件系统，将层之间的差异编码为 tar 存档。我们的实验表明，这在构建时间和磁盘使用方面与分层缓存的性能相似，对于多指令配方具有相当大的优势。我们的方法还具有结构优势：更好的 diff 格式、更低的缓存开销和更好的文件去重。这些结果表明，用于无层容器实现的基于 Git 的缓存不仅是可能的，而且在重要维度上可能优于分层方法。

items.title: Demonstrating Cross-Facility Data Processing at Scale With Laue Microdiffraction.
items.abstract: In February and April 2023 live, at-scale data processing demonstrations were conducted between the Advanced Photon Source (APS), a synchrotron light source, and the Argonne Leadership Computing Facility (ALCF). These tests were run as part of a novel beamline technique: coded aperture laue micro-diffraction. This technique requires a significant amount of compute to decode appeture patterns embedded in the detector stream. An autonomous system was able to send data to ALCF during an experiment, utilize 50 nodes of the Polaris supercomputer to process 6-12 hour scans, and return the data back to the APS within 12-15 minutes behind the detector. With scan points arriving every 72 seconds, the system kept up with the beamline, potentially enabling in-experiment analysis. The data processing system utilizes Globus infrastructure and an on-demand queue to dynamically acquire nodes on Polaris. The underlying reconstruction algorithms were parallelized via MPI and accelerated with custom CUDA kernels.
items.abstract_zh: 2023 年 2 月和 4 月，先进光子源 (APS)、同步加速器光源和阿贡领导计算设施 (ALCF) 之间进行了现场大规模数据处理演示。这些测试是作为新型光束线技术的一部分进行的：编码孔径劳埃微衍射。该技术需要大量的计算来解码嵌入在检测器流中的孔径图案。自主系统能够在实验期间向 ALCF 发送数据，利用 Polaris 超级计算机的 50 个节点处理 6-12 小时的扫描，并在探测器后面 12-15 分钟内将数据返回到 APS。扫描点每 72 秒到达一次，系统可以跟上光束线，从而有可能实现实验中的分析。数据处理系统利用 Globus 基础设施和按需队列动态获取 Polaris 上的节点。底层重建算法通过 MPI 并行化，并通过自定义 CUDA 内核进行加速。

items.title: Heterogeneous Syslog Analysis: There Is Hope.
items.abstract: Identifying system hardware failures and anomalies is a unique challenge in heterogeneous testbed clusters because of variation in the ways that the system log reports errors and warnings. We present a novel approach for the real-time classification of syslog messages generated by a heterogeneous testbed cluster to proactively identify potential hardware issues and security events. By integrating machine learning models with high-performance computing systems, our system facilitates continuous system health monitoring. The paper introduces a taxonomy for classifying system issues into actionable categories of problems, while filtering out groups of messages that the system administrators would consider unimportant "noise". Finally, we experiment with using large language models as a message classifier, and share our results and experience with doing so. Results demonstrate promising performance, and more explainable results compared to currently available techniques, but the computational costs may offset the benefits.
items.abstract_zh: 由于系统日志报告错误和警告的方式各不相同，因此识别系统硬件故障和异常是异构测试床集群中的一个独特挑战。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，用于对异构测试床集群生成的系统日志消息进行实时分类，以主动识别潜在的硬件问题和安全事件。通过将机器学习模型与高性能计算系统集成，我们的系统有助于持续的系统健康状况监控。本文介绍了一种分类法，用于将系统问题分类为可操作的问题类别，同时过滤掉系统管理员认为不重要的“噪音”的消息组。最后，我们尝试使用大型语言模型作为消息分类器，并分享我们的结果和经验。结果表明，与当前可用的技术相比，性能有希望，并且结果更容易解释，但计算成本可能会抵消收益。

items.title: Dragon Proxy Runtimes and Multi-system Workflows.
items.abstract: We present a new method for obtaining proxy access to remote instances of the Dragon distributed runtime. Dragon is a composable distributed runtime for managing dynamic processes, high-performance communication objects, memory, and data at scale that is based on an abstraction of a distributed system. Proxy access to a remote instance of the Dragon runtime makes it possible for the client program to expand and contract its compute resources by extending into a remote instance of Dragon as needed. Compute to be run on a remote Dragon runtime is mediated by a Python object that acts as a proxy, which we call a proxy runtime. These proxy runtimes, combined with the ability to start and tear down remote Dragon runtimes both programmatically and via the command line interface, make a number of challenging workflows simple to program. Such workflows include edge-to-cloud scientific workflows, batch services, and scientific applications based on Python multiprocessing. The ability to program complex workflows on systems that span clusters, scientific instruments, and cloud resources is critical to the development of post-exascale applications, infrastructures and frameworks.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新方法来获取对 Dragon 分布式运行时远程实例的代理访问。 Dragon 是一个可组合的分布式运行时，用于基于分布式系统的抽象来大规模管理动态进程、高性能通信对象、内存和数据。对 Dragon 运行时的远程实例的代理访问使客户端程序可以根据需要扩展到 Dragon 的远程实例来扩展和收缩其计算资源。在远程 Dragon 运行时上运行的计算是通过充当代理的 Python 对象来协调的，我们将其称为代理运行时。这些代理运行时，与以编程方式和通过命令行界面启动和拆除远程 Dragon 运行时的能力相结合，使许多具有挑战性的工作流程变得易于编程。此类工作流程包括边缘到云的科学工作流程、批处理服务以及基于 Python 多处理的科学应用程序。在跨越集群、科学仪器和云资源的系统上对复杂工作流程进行编程的能力对于后百亿亿次应用程序、基础设施和框架的开发至关重要。

items.title: A Performance-Portable SYCL Implementation of CRK-HACC for Exascale.
items.abstract: The first generation of exascale systems will include a variety of machine architectures, featuring GPUs from multiple vendors. As a result, many developers are interested in adopting portable programming models to avoid maintaining multiple versions of their code.
