It is necessary to document experiences with such programming models to assist developers in understanding the advantages and disadvantages of different approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 第一代百亿亿次系统将包括多种机器架构，采用来自多个供应商的 GPU。因此，许多开发人员有兴趣采用可移植编程模型，以避免维护其代码的多个版本。有必要记录此类编程模型的经验，以帮助开发人员了解不同方法的优点和缺点。

items.title: Experimental Study of TCP Throughput Profiles and Dynamics Over Dedicated Connections.
items.abstract: A throughput profile expressed as a function of the round-trip times of a data transport infrastructure is a critical indicator of its level of optimization, particularly, over dedicated connections. We study the throughput profiles of eleven TCP versions using measurements collected over dedicated hardware-emulated connections with distances spanning round the earth. Among them, BBR has overall higher temporal variations and lower throughput profiles compared to five loss-based TCP versions, and the comparison with other TCP versions is mixed. Using the Poincare map regions of throughput time traces, we show that the richer dynamics of BBR are correlated with its lower throughput profiles. We present basic analytical results that indicate that higher temporal variations of TCP methods lead to lower throughput profiles, thereby establishing the underlying causality. Under external losses, BBR achieves sustained high throughput compared to others as the loss rate is increased. Overall, our results provide insights into the relationship between time dynamics and throughput profiles of TCP versions, in particular, show that limited time traces can be indicative of global properties of throughput profiles.
items.abstract_zh: 表示为数据传输基础设施往返时间函数的吞吐量分布是其优化水平的关键指标，特别是在专用连接上。我们使用通过跨越地球的距离的专用硬件模拟连接收集的测量结果来研究 11 个 TCP 版本的吞吐量概况。其中，与五个基于丢失的 TCP 版本相比，BBR 总体上具有更高的时间变化和更低的吞吐量配置文件，并且与其他 TCP 版本的比较好坏参半。使用吞吐量时间轨迹的庞加莱图区域，我们表明 BBR 更丰富的动态与其较低的吞吐量曲线相关。我们提出的基本分析结果表明 TCP 方法的较高时间变化会导致较低的吞吐量曲线，从而建立潜在的因果关系。在外部丢失情况下，随着丢失率的增加，BBR 与其他设备相比能够实现持续的高吞吐量。总的来说，我们的结果提供了对 TCP 版本的时间动态和吞吐量曲线之间关系的见解，特别是表明有限时间跟踪可以指示吞吐量曲线的全局属性。

items.title: FFTX-IRIS: Towards Performance Portability and Heterogeneity for SPIRAL Generated Code.
items.abstract: FFTX-IRIS is a dynamic system to efficiently utilize novel heterogeneous platforms. This system links two next-generation frameworks, FFTX and IRIS, to navigate the complexity of different hardware architectures. FFTX provides a runtime code generation framework for high-performance Fast Fourier Transform kernels. IRIS runtime provides portability and multi-device heterogeneity, allowing computation on any available compute resource. Together, FFTX-IRIS enables code generation, seamless portability, and performance without user involvement. We show the design of the FFTX-IRIS system along with an evaluation of various small FFT benchmarks. We also demonstrate multi-device heterogeneity of FFTX-IRIS with a larger stencil application.
items.abstract_zh: FFTX-IRIS 是一个有效利用新型异构平台的动态系统。该系统链接了两个下一代框架 FFTX 和 IRIS，以应对不同硬件架构的复杂性。 FFTX 为高性能快速傅里叶变换内核提供运行时代码生成框架。 IRIS 运行时提供可移植性和多设备异构性，允许在任何可用的计算资源上进行计算。 FFTX-IRIS 共同实现了代码生成、无缝可移植性和性能，无需用户参与。我们展示了 FFTX-IRIS 系统的设计以及对各种小型 FFT 基准的评估。我们还通过更大的模板应用展示了 FFTX-IRIS 的多设备异构性。

items.title: Evaluating the performance portability of SYCL across CPUs and GPUs on bandwidth-bound applications.
items.abstract: In this paper, we evaluate the portability of the SYCL programming model on some of the latest CPUs and GPUs from a wide range of vendors, utilizing the two main compilers: DPC++ and hipSYCL/OpenSYCL. Both compilers currently support GPUs from all three major vendors; we evaluate performance on the Intel(R) Data Center GPU Max 1100, the NVIDIA A100 GPU, and the AMD MI250X GPU. Support on CPUs currently is less established, with DPC++ only supporting x86 CPUs through OpenCL, however, OpenSYCL does have an OpenMP backend capable of targeting all modern CPUs; we benchmark the Intel Xeon Platinum 8360Y Processor (Ice Lake), the AMD EPYC 9V33X (Genoa-X), and the Ampere Altra platforms. We study a range of primarily bandwidth-bound applications implemented using the OPS and OP2 DSLs, evaluate different formulations in SYCL, and contrast their performance to “native” programming approaches where available (CUDA/HIP/OpenMP). On GPU architectures SCYL on average even slightly outperforms native approaches, while on CPUs it falls behind - highlighting a continued need for improving CPU performance. While SYCL does not solve all the challenges of performance portability (e.g. needing different algorithms on different hardware), it does provide a single programming model and ecosystem to target most current HPC architectures productively.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们利用两个主要编译器：DPC++ 和 hipSYCL/OpenSYCL，评估了 SYCL 编程模型在来自众多供应商的一些最新 CPU 和 GPU 上的可移植性。两种编译器目前都支持所有三大供应商的 GPU；我们评估了 Intel(R) Data Center GPU Max 1100、NVIDIA A100 GPU 和 AMD MI250X GPU 的性能。目前对 CPU 的支持还不太成熟，DPC++ 仅通过 OpenCL 支持 x86 CPU，但是 OpenSYCL 确实有一个能够针对所有现代 CPU 的 OpenMP 后端；我们对 Intel Xeon Platinum 8360Y 处理器 (Ice Lake)、AMD EPYC 9V33X (Genoa-X) 和 Ampere Altra 平台进行了基准测试。我们研究了一系列使用 OPS 和 OP2 DSL 实现的主要受带宽限制的应用程序，评估 SYCL 中的不同公式，并将它们的性能与可用的“本机”编程方法（CUDA/HIP/OpenMP）进行比较。在 GPU 架构上，SCYL 的平均性能甚至略微优于本机方法，而在 CPU 上则落后 - 凸显了提高 CPU 性能的持续需求。虽然 SYCL 并不能解决性能可移植性的所有挑战（例如，在不同的硬件上需要不同的算法），但它确实提供了单一的编程模型和生态系统来高效地针对当前大多数 HPC 架构。

items.title: Comparative evaluation of bandwidth-bound applications on the Intel Xeon CPU MAX Series.
items.abstract: In this paper we explore the performance of Intel® Xeon® MAX CPU Series, representing the most significant new variation upon the classical CPU architecture since the Intel® Xeon Phi™ Processor. Given the availability of a large on-package high-bandwidth memory, the bandwidth-to-compute ratio has significantly shifted compared to other CPUs on the market. Since a large fraction of HPC workloads are sensitive to the available bandwidth, we explore how this architecture performs on a selection of HPC proxies and applications that are mostly sensitive to bandwidth, and how it compares to the previous 3rd generation Intel® Xeon® Scalable processors (codenamed Ice Lake) and an AMD EPYC™ 7003 Series Processor with 3D V-Cache Technology (codenamed Milan-X). We explore performance with different parallel implementations (MPI, MPI+OpenMP, MPI+SYCL), compiled with different compilers and flags, and executed with or without hyperthreading. We show how performance bottlenecks are shifted from bandwidth to communication latencies for some applications, and demonstrate speedups compared to the previous generation between 2.0x-4.3x.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们探讨了英特尔® 至强® MAX CPU 系列的性能，该系列代表了自英特尔® 至强融核™ 处理器以来经典 CPU 架构最重要的新变种。考虑到大容量封装高带宽内存的可用性，与市场上的其他 CPU 相比，带宽与计算之比发生了显着变化。由于大部分 HPC 工作负载对可用带宽都很敏感，因此我们探讨了该架构在对带宽最敏感的 HPC 代理和应用程序上的执行情况，以及它与之前的第三代 Intel® Xeon® 可扩展处理器（代号为 Ice Lake）和采用 3D V 缓存技术的 AMD EPYC™ 7003 系列处理器（代号为 Milan-X）的比较。我们探索不同并行实现（MPI、MPI+OpenMP、MPI+SYCL）的性能，使用不同的编译器和标志进行编译，并使用或不使用超线程执行。我们展示了某些应用程序的性能瓶颈如何从带宽转移到通信延迟，并展示了与上一代相比在 2.0 倍到 4.3 倍之间的加速速度。

items.title: Parallel Symbolic Cholesky Factorization.
items.abstract: We present a hybrid sequential/parallel symbolic Cholesky factorization algorithm that computes the sparsity pattern of the symbolic factors in parallel. We evaluate the performance on a large subset of the SuiteSparse matrix collection and multicore CPUs as well as flagship GPUs by AMD and NVIDIA, achieving speedups of an order of magnitude compared to a state-of-the-art sequential symbolic Cholesky factorization.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种混合顺序/并行符号 Cholesky 分解算法，该算法并行计算符号因子的稀疏模式。我们评估了 SuiteSparse 矩阵集合的一个大子集和多核 CPU 以及 AMD 和 NVIDIA 的旗舰 GPU 的性能，与最先进的顺序符号 Cholesky 分解相比，实现了一个数量级的加速。

items.title: Extra-Deep: Automated Empirical Performance Modeling for Distributed Deep Learning.
items.abstract: With the rapidly increasing size and complexity of DNNs, equally sophisticated methods are needed to train them efficiently, including distributed training and various model/hybrid parallelism approaches. Even though developers heavily rely on state-of-the-art frameworks such as PyTorch and TensorFlow, these provide little insight into an application’s training behavior at scale, leading to latent performance bottlenecks and inefficient training configurations. We propose Extra-Deep, an automated empirical performance modeling approach for distributed deep learning to model performance metrics, such as the training time, as a function of the applications’ configuration parameters. We leverage the created models to analyze a training task’s performance, scalability, efficiency, and cost. Gathering empirical measurements of full training runs is very laborious and costly. Therefore, we employ an efficient sampling strategy that reduces the profiling time for the required empirical measurements by, on average, about 94.9%. Using our sampling strategy, we can analyze the performance behavior and identify cost-effective training configurations even for large-scale and long-running applications. We evaluated our approach on three parallelization strategies, with four DNN models and five datasets. The results show that Extra-Deep has an average prediction accuracy of 93.6% when compared to empirical results.
items.abstract_zh: 随着 DNN 的规模和复杂性迅速增加，需要同样复杂的方法来有效地训练它们，包括分布式训练和各种模型/混合并行方法。尽管开发人员严重依赖 PyTorch 和 TensorFlow 等最先进的框架，但这些框架无法深入了解应用程序的大规模训练行为，从而导致潜在的性能瓶颈和低效的训练配置。我们提出了 Extra-Deep，这是一种用于分布式深度学习的自动化经验性能建模方法，用于对性能指标（例如训练时间）进行建模，作为应用程序配置参数的函数。我们利用创建的模型来分析训练任务的性能、可扩展性、效率和成本。收集完整训练运行的经验测量结果非常费力且成本高昂。因此，我们采用有效的采样策略，平均将所需经验测量的分析时间减少约 94.9%。使用我们的采样策略，我们可以分析性能行为并识别具有成本效益的训练配置，即使对于大规模和长期运行的应用程序也是如此。我们使用四个 DNN 模型和五个数据集在三种并行化策略上评估了我们的方法。结果表明，与经验结果相比，Extra-Deep 的平均预测准确率为 93.6%。

items.title: Stencil-HMLS: A multi-layered approach to the automatic optimisation of stencil codes on FPGA.
items.abstract: The challenges associated with effectively programming FPGAs have been a major blocker in popularising reconfigurable architectures for HPC workloads. However new compiler technologies, such as MLIR, are providing new capabilities which potentially deliver the ability to extract domain specific information and drive automatic structuring of codes for FPGAs.
items.abstract_zh: 与有效编程 FPGA 相关的挑战一直是 HPC 工作负载可重构架构普及的主要障碍。然而，新的编译器技术（例如 MLIR）正在提供新功能，有可能提供提取领域特定信息并驱动 FPGA 代码自动构建的能力。

items.title: shmem4py: High-Performance One-Sided Communication for Python Applications.
items.abstract: This paper describes shmem4py, a Python wrapper for the OpenSHMEM application programming interface (API) which follows a design similar to that of the well-known mpi4py package. OpenSHMEM is a descendant of the one-sided communication library for the Cray T3D and it is known for its uncompromising performance for low-latency and high-throughput use cases involving one-sided and collective communication. OpenSHMEM is arguably one of the most efficient and portable abstractions for modern network architectures. Thanks to tight interoperability with NumPy, shmem4py provides a convenient parallel programming framework leveraging both the high-productivity NumPy feature set and the high-performance networking capabilities of OpenSHMEM. This paper discusses the design and performance characteristics of shmem4py in a variety of communication patterns relative to lower-level languages (C) as well as MPI and mpi4py.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 shmem4py，它是 OpenSHMEM 应用程序编程接口 (API) 的 Python 包装器，它遵循与著名的 mpi4py 包类似的设计。 OpenSHMEM 是 Cray T3D 的单侧通信库的后代，它以其在涉及单侧和集体通信的低延迟和高吞吐量用例方面的不折不扣的性能而闻名。 OpenSHMEM 可以说是现代网络架构最高效、最可移植的抽象之一。由于与 NumPy 的紧密互操作性，shmem4py 提供了一个方便的并行编程框架，利用了高生产力的 NumPy 功能集和 OpenSHMEM 的高性能网络功能。本文讨论了 shmem4py 在各种通信模式中相对于低级语言 (C) 以及 MPI 和 mpi4py 的设计和性能特征。

items.title: Precision and Performance Analysis of C Standard Math Library Functions on GPUs.
items.abstract: With the advent of GPU computing, executing large program sections on accelerators has become increasingly important. Efforts are being made to support the C standard library, LIBC, on GPUs via LLVM machinery. Therefore, the C standard math library, LIBM, must be supported on GPUs. So far, LLVM frontends, such as Clang, have relied on GPU vendor implementations of LIBM functionality wrapped into (mostly) LIBM-compatible forwarding functions.
items.abstract_zh: 随着 GPU 计算的出现，在加速器上执行大型程序部分变得越来越重要。人们正在努力通过 LLVM 机制在 GPU 上支持 C 标准库 LIBC。因此，GPU 必须支持 C 标准数学库 LIBM。到目前为止，LLVM 前端（例如 Clang）依赖于 GPU 供应商将 LIBM 功能实现封装到（大部分）与 LIBM 兼容的转发函数中。

items.title: Massively Distributed Finite-Volume Flux Computation.
items.abstract: Designing large-scale geological carbon capture and storage projects and ensuring safe long-term CO2 containment – as a climate change mitigation strategy – requires fast and accurate numerical simulations. These simulations involve solving complex PDEs governing subsurface fluid flow using implicit finite-volume schemes widely based on Two-Point Flux Approximation (TPFA). This task is computationally and memory expensive, especially when performed on highly detailed geomodels. In most current HPC architectures, memory hierarchy and data management mechanisms are insufficient to overcome the challenges of large scale numerical simulations. Therefore, it is crucial to design algorithms that can exploit alternative and more balanced paradigms, such as dataflow and in-memory computing. This work introduces an algorithm for TPFA computations that exploits a dataflow architecture, such as Cerebras CS-2, which helps to significantly minimize memory bottlenecks. Our implementation achieves two orders of magnitude speedup compared to multiple reference implementations running on latest generations of NVIDIA GPUs.
items.abstract_zh: 设计大规模地质碳捕获和封存项目并确保安全的长期二氧化碳遏制（作为气候变化缓解策略）需要快速而准确的数值模拟。这些模拟涉及使用广泛基于两点通量近似 (TPFA) 的隐式有限体积方案求解控制地下流体流动的复杂偏微分方程。此任务的计算量和内存消耗很大，尤其是在高度详细的地理模型上执行时。在大多数当前的 HPC 架构中，内存层次结构和数据管理机制不足以克服大规模数值模拟的挑战。因此，设计能够利用替代且更平衡的范式（例如数据流和内存计算）的算法至关重要。这项工作引入了一种利用数据流架构的 TPFA 计算算法，例如 Cerebras CS-2，有助于显着减少内存瓶颈。与在最新一代 NVIDIA GPU 上运行的多个参考实现相比，我们的实现实现了两个数量级的加速。

items.title: A data science pipeline synchronisation method for edge-fog-cloud continuum.
items.abstract: This paper presents an adaptive data delivery method for data science pipelines. While this method is feasible for processes communicating over any network, in this work we focus on edge-fog-cloud infrastructures. In a diagnostic phase, a model based on the Bernoulli principle is used to create a representation of bottlenecks in a pipeline. In a supervision phase, a watchman/sentinel cooperative system monitors the throughput of the pipeline stages to create a bottleneck-stage scheme. In a rectification phase, this system produces replicas of bottlenecks stages, mitigating the workload congestion using implicit parallelism and load balancing algorithms. This method is automatically and transparently invoked to produce a steady continuum dataflow. To test our proposal, we conducted a case study about the processing of medical and satellite data. The evaluation revealed that this method creates continuum dataflows, without neither characterising workloads nor knowing infrastructure details, which yields a competitive performance with state-of-the-art solutions.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于数据科学管道的自适应数据交付方法。虽然这种方法对于通过任何网络进行通信的进程都是可行的，但在这项工作中，我们重点关注边缘-雾-云基础设施。在诊断阶段，基于伯努利原理的模型用于创建管道中瓶颈的表示。在监督阶段，看守人/哨兵协作系统监视管道阶段的吞吐量以创建瓶颈阶段方案。在纠正阶段，该系统生成瓶颈阶段的副本，使用隐式并行性和负载平衡算法缓解工作负载拥塞。该方法被自动且透明地调用以产生稳定的连续数据流。为了测试我们的建议，我们进行了有关医疗和卫星数据处理的案例研究。评估表明，这种方法创建了连续数据流，既不描述工作负载也不了解基础设施细节，从而产生了与最先进的解决方案竞争的性能。

items.title: GPU Graph Processing on CXL-Based Microsecond-Latency External Memory.
items.abstract: In GPU graph analytics, the use of external memory such as the host DRAM and solid-state drives is a cost-effective approach to processing large graphs beyond the capacity of the GPU onboard memory. This paper studies the use of Compute Express Link (CXL) memory as alternative external memory for GPU graph processing in order to see if this emerging memory expansion technology enables graph processing that is as fast as using the host DRAM. Through analysis and evaluation using FPGA prototypes, we show that representative GPU graph traversal algorithms involving fine-grained random access can tolerate an external memory latency of up to a few microseconds introduced by the CXL interface as well as by the underlying memory devices. This insight indicates that microsecond-latency flash memory may be used as CXL memory devices to realize even more cost-effective GPU graph processing while still achieving performance close to using the host DRAM.
items.abstract_zh: 在 GPU 图形分析中，使用主机 DRAM 和固态硬盘等外部存储器是一种经济高效的方法，可以处理超出 GPU 板载内存容量的大型图形。本文研究了使用 Compute Express Link (CXL) 内存作为 GPU 图形处理的替代外部内存，以了解这种新兴内存扩展技术是否能够实现与使用主机 DRAM 一样快的图形处理。通过使用 FPGA 原型进行分析和评估，我们表明，涉及细粒度随机访问的代表性 GPU 图形遍历算法可以容忍由 CXL 接口以及底层内存设备引入的高达几微秒的外部内存延迟。这一见解表明，微秒延迟闪存可以用作 CXL 存储设备，以实现更具成本效益的 GPU 图形处理，同时仍然实现接近使用主机 DRAM 的性能。

items.title: Towards Rapid Autonomous Electron Microscopy with Active Meta-Learning.
items.abstract: We introduce a novel approach, Active Meta-learning, to improve computational control across various scientific experiments. It's particularly valuable for spectral reconstruction in STEM EELS nanoparticle plasmonic images. Traditionally, separate AI models were trained for each experiment via active learning, but this approach could face scalability issues with high-resolution data and the need for complex AI models due to intricate structure-property relationships. In this work we demonstrate the feasibility of learning AI structural representations across multiple experiments. We train a meta model from 10 prior experiments carried out such that the model can adapt to new unseen conditions in considerably less time than when trained from scratch. We utilize the Reptile algorithm, a first-order, model-agnostic meta-learning approach. To enhance and expand the meta-training dataset, conventional computer vision methods are applied to augment images from previous experiments. We observe up to ∼30-40% reduction in the number of training epochs for active learning exploration. The approach will be extended to distributed meta-learning workflows; meta-model trained in HPC datacenter using data from different microscopy sites and pushed to individual sites for active learning.
items.abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新颖的方法，即主动元学习，来改善各种科学实验的计算控制。它对于 STEM EELS 纳米颗粒等离子体图像的光谱重建特别有价值。传统上，通过主动学习为每个实验训练单独的人工智能模型，但这种方法可能面临高分辨率数据的可扩展性问题，以及由于复杂的结构-属性关系而需要复杂的人工智能模型。在这项工作中，我们展示了通过多个实验学习人工智能结构表示的可行性。我们根据之前进行的 10 次实验来训练元模型，以便该模型能够在比从头开始训练时少得多的时间内适应新的未见条件。我们利用 Reptile 算法，这是一种一阶、模型无关的元学习方法。为了增强和扩展元训练数据集，应用传统的计算机视觉方法来增强先前实验中的图像。我们观察到主动学习探索的训练周期数量减少了 30-40%。该方法将扩展到分布式元学习工作流程；元模型使用来自不同显微镜站点的数据在 HPC 数据中心进行训练，并推送到各个站点进行主动学习。

items.title: Benchmarking a portable lattice quantum chromodynamics kernel written in Kokkos and MPI.
items.abstract: Simulations of Lattice Quantum Chromodynamics (LQCD) are an important application (two digit percentage of cycles) on major High Performance Computing (HPC) installations, including systems high up on and leading the top500 list. In the rapidly changing hardware landscape of HPC, tying up manpower optimizing simulation software for every architecture becomes a sustainability issue. In this work we explore the feasibility of using performance portable parallel code for an important LQCD kernel. Fusing the Kokkos C++ Performance Portability EcoSystem with MPI allows applications to scale on massive parallel machines while still being able to target a plentitude of different architectures with the same simple code. We report on benchmarking results for a range of currently deployed and recently introduced systems, including AMD EPYC 7742, AMD MI250, Fujitsu A64FX, Nvidia A100 and Nvidia H100 components, with mostly encouraging results.
items.abstract_zh: 晶格量子色动力学 (LQCD) 模拟是主要高性能计算 (HPC) 安装的重要应用（循环百分比为两位数），包括在 500 强列表中名列前茅并处于领先地位的系统。在快速变化的 HPC 硬件环境中，为每种架构占用人力优化仿真软件成为一个可持续性问题。在这项工作中，我们探讨了对重要的 LQCD 内核使用性能可移植并行代码的可行性。将 Kokkos C++ 性能可移植性生态系统与 MPI 相融合，使应用程序能够在大规模并行计算机上进行扩展，同时仍然能够使用相同的简单代码来针对大量不同的架构。我们报告了一系列当前部署和最近推出的系统的基准测试结果，包括 AMD EPYC 7742、AMD MI250、Fujitsu A64FX、Nvidia A100 和 Nvidia H100 组件，结果大多令人鼓舞。

items.title: Evaluating the Resiliency of Posits for Scientific Computing.
items.abstract: IEEE-754 is the de-facto standard for the implementation of floating-point number systems in hardware. With the rise of machine-learning and mixed-precision computation, applications tolerate small inaccuracies in the data by using lower bit-width floating-point values to improve computational speed and memory bandwidth, but still rely on some variant of IEEE-754. Posits have been proposed as a drop-in replacement to the IEEE-754 floating-point standard. Recent work has suggested that posits can offer greater numerical accuracy and reproducibility than IEEE-754-compliant floating point numbers at a comparable architectural cost. There have been several studies which consider the use of posits and other floating-point implementations in hardware and software, but there is limited work examining this new number system from a reliability perspective.
items.abstract_zh: IEEE-754 是在硬件中实现浮点数系统的事实上的标准。随着机器学习和混合精度计算的兴起，应用程序通过使用较低位宽的浮点值来提高计算速度和内存带宽，从而容忍数据中的微小误差，但仍然依赖于 IEEE-754 的某些变体。 Poits 已被提议作为 IEEE-754 浮点标准的直接替代品。最近的研究表明，与 IEEE-754 兼容的浮点数相比，posits 可以在相当的架构成本下提供更高的数值精度和再现性。已经有几项研究考虑了在硬件和软件中使用定点和其他浮点实现，但从可靠性角度检查这种新数字系统的工作有限。

items.title: MPI-RICAL: Data-Driven MPI Distributed Parallelism Assistance with Transformers.
items.abstract: Computational science has made rapid progress in recent years, leading to ever increasing demand for supercomputing resources. For scientific applications that leverage such resources, Message Passing Interface (MPI) plays a crucial role in enabling distributed memory parallelization across multiple nodes. However, parallelizing MPI code manually, and specifically, performing domain decomposition, is a challenging and error-prone task.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来计算科学取得了快速发展，导致对超级计算资源的需求不断增加。对于利用此类资源的科学应用程序，消息传递接口 (MPI) 在实现跨多个节点的分布式内存并行化方面发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，手动并行化 MPI 代码，特别是执行域分解，是一项具有挑战性且容易出错的任务。

items.title: RMARaceBench: A Microbenchmark Suite to Evaluate Race Detection Tools for RMA Programs.
items.abstract: Parallel programming models with Remote Memory Access (RMA), such as MPI RMA, OpenSHMEM, and GASPI, allow processes to modify the memory of other processes directly. Special care is required to avoid concurrent conflicting accesses that lead to data races across processes resulting in undefined behavior. To detect such RMA races, different race detection tools have been developed. However, there is currently no possibility to compare their effectiveness systematically. In this paper, we present RMARaceBench, a microbenchmark suite to evaluate the detection capabilities of RMA race detection tools for MPI RMA, OpenSHMEM, and GASPI. It consists of about 100 synthetic race test cases for each programming model, aiming to cover all possible race scenarios. Using RMARaceBench, we evaluate two MPI RMA race detectors implemented in the correctness tool suites MUST and PARCOACH. The evaluation shows that RMARaceBench can pinpoint the strengths and weaknesses of RMA race detectors.
items.abstract_zh: 具有远程内存访问 (RMA) 的并行编程模型（例如 MPI RMA、OpenSHMEM 和 GASPI）允许进程直接修改其他进程的内存。需要特别注意避免并发冲突访问，从而导致跨进程的数据竞争，从而导致未定义的行为。为了检测此类 RMA 竞争，已经开发了不同的竞争检测工具。然而，目前还无法系统地比较它们的有效性。在本文中，我们提出了 RMARaceBench，这是一个微基准套件，用于评估 MPI RMA、OpenSHMEM 和 GASPI 的 RMA 竞争检测工具的检测能力。它由每个编程模型的约 100 个综合竞赛测试用例组成，旨在覆盖所有可能的竞赛场景。使用 RMARaceBench，我们评估了在正确性工具套件 MUST 和 PARCOACH 中实现的两个 MPI RMA 竞争检测器。评估表明 RMARaceBench 可以查明 RMA 竞赛检测器的优点和缺点。

items.title: Towards Correctness Checking of MPI Partitioned Communication in MUST.
items.abstract: The partitioned point-to-point communication concept introduced with the MPI-4.0 standard can improve the communication efficiency of hybrid parallel execution models. It allows threads on the sender and the receiver side to start working on parts of a communication buffer before the communication operation is fully completed. This new concept, however, also comes with new possible programming mistakes. In this paper, we discuss erroneous usage patterns in MPI partitioned communication and provide a set of example test cases to be integrated in future classification quality benchmark suites. The tests include invalid arguments, erroneous partition activations, deadlocks, and local buffer races. Further, we explain how we implemented first basic checks specific to partitioned communication in our correctness checking tool MUST and discuss required extensions for existing analyses. The evaluation on the example test cases shows that MUST can correctly pinpoint bugs in applications using partitioned communication.
items.abstract_zh: MPI-4.0标准引入的分区点对点通信概念可以提高混合并行执行模型的通信效率。它允许发送方和接收方的线程在通信操作完全完成之前开始处理通信缓冲区的部分内容。然而，这个新概念也带来了新的可能的编程错误。在本文中，我们讨论了 MPI 分区通信中的错误使用模式，并提供了一组示例测试用例以集成到未来的分类质量基准套件中。测试包括无效参数、错误的分区激活、死锁和本地缓冲区竞争。此外，我们解释了如何在正确性检查工具中实现特定于分区通信的第一个基本检查，并讨论现有分析所需的扩展。对示例测试用例的评估表明，必须能够使用分区通信正确查明应用程序中的错误。

items.title: GPUscout: Locating Data Movement-related Bottlenecks on GPUs.
items.abstract: GPUs pose an attractive opportunity for delivering high-performance applications. However, GPU codes are often limited due to memory contention, resulting in overall performance degradation. Since GPU scheduling is transparent to the user, and GPU memory architectures are very complex compared to ones on CPUs, finding such bottlenecks is a very cumbersome process.
items.abstract_zh: GPU 为交付高性能应用程序提供了诱人的机会。然而，GPU 代码常常由于内存争用而受到限制，导致整体性能下降。由于 GPU 调度对用户来说是透明的，而且 GPU 内存架构与 CPU 上的相比非常复杂，因此找到此类瓶颈是一个非常麻烦的过程。

items.title: Centralized provisioning of large language models for a research community.
items.abstract: Local support for large language models (LLMs) in a research community can address unique technological and procedural challenges that arise in an academic setting. Platforms providing multi-GPU nodes, typically found in a centralized computational resource, such as a university datacenter, can manage the large memory footprint of the open-source LLMs. Customizations employing peripheral frameworks help extend the capabilities of these models. Further, the local implementation addresses the protection of researcher IP and control of restricted data sources. This report describes recent efforts toward provisioning this popular new tool and provides guidance for recreating our approach at Arizona State University.
items.abstract_zh: 研究界对大型语言模型 (LLM) 的本地支持可以解决学术环境中出现的独特技术和程序挑战。提供多 GPU 节点的平台通常存在于集中式计算资源中，例如大学数据中心，可以管理开源 LLM 的大量内存占用。使用外围框架的定制有助于扩展这些模型的功能。此外，本地实施还解决了研究人员知识产权的保护和受限数据源的控制问题。本报告描述了最近为配置这种流行的新工具所做的努力，并为亚利桑那州立大学重新创建我们的方法提供了指导。

items.title: BGLS: A Python Package for the Gate-by-Gate Sampling Algorithm to Simulate Quantum Circuits.
items.abstract: The classical simulation of quantum computers is in general a computationally hard problem. To emulate the behavior of realistic devices, it is sufficient to sample bitstrings from circuits. Recently, Ref. [5] introduced the so-called gate-by-gate sampling algorithm to sample bitstrings and showed it to be computationally favorable in many cases. Here we present bgls, a Python package which implements this sampling algorithm. bgls has native support for several states and is highly flexible for use with additional states. We show how to install and use bgls, discuss optimizations in the algorithm, and demonstrate its utility on several problems.
items.abstract_zh: 量子计算机的经典模拟通常是一个计算难题。为了模拟现实设备的行为，从电路中采样位串就足够了。最近，参考文献。 [5]引入了所谓的逐门采样算法来对比特串进行采样，并表明它在许多情况下在计算上是有利的。在这里，我们介绍 bgls，一个实现此采样算法的 Python 包。 bgls 具有对多个状态的本机支持，并且对于与其他状态一起使用具有高度灵活性。我们展示了如何安装和使用 bgls，讨论算法的优化，并演示其在几个问题上的实用性。

items.title: Reducing Memory Requirements for the IPU using Butterfly Factorizations.
items.abstract: High Performance Computing (HPC) benefits from different improvements during last decades, specially in terms of hardware platforms to provide more processing power while maintaining the power consumption at a reasonable level. The Intelligence Processing Unit (IPU) is a new type of massively parallel processor, designed to speedup parallel computations with huge number of processing cores and on-chip memory components connected with high-speed fabrics. IPUs mainly target machine learning applications, however, due to the architectural differences between GPUs and IPUs, especially significantly less memory capacity on an IPU, methods for reducing model size by sparsification have to be considered. Butterfly factorizations are well-known replacements for fully-connected and convolutional layers. In this paper, we examine how butterfly structures can be implemented on an IPU and study their behavior and performance compared to a GPU. Experimental results indicate that these methods can provide 98.5% compression ratio to decrease the immense need for memory, the IPU implementation can benefit from 1.3x and 1.6x performance improvement for butterfly and pixelated butterfly, respectively. We also reach to 1.62x training time speedup on a real-word dataset such as CIFAR10.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能计算（HPC）受益于过去几十年的不同改进，特别是在硬件平台方面，以提供更多的处理能力，同时将功耗保持在合理的水平。智能处理单元（IPU）是一种新型大规模并行处理器，旨在通过与高速结构连接的大量处理核心和片上存储组件来加速并行计算。 IPU 主要针对机器学习应用，然而，由于 GPU 和 IPU 之间的架构差异，特别是 IPU 上的内存容量明显较小，必须考虑通过稀疏化来减小模型大小的方法。蝴蝶分解是全连接层和卷积层的众所周知的替代品。在本文中，我们研究了如何在 IPU 上实现蝶形结构，并研究其与 GPU 相比的行为和性能。实验结果表明，这些方法可以提供 98.5% 的压缩率，从而减少对内存的巨大需求，IPU 实现可以分别从蝴蝶和像素化蝴蝶的 1.3 倍和 1.6 倍性能改进中受益。我们还在 CIFAR10 等真实数据集上实现了 1.62 倍的训练时间加速。

items.title: A Reference Implementation for a Quantum Message Passing Interface.
items.abstract: Practical applications of quantum computing are currently limited by the number of qubits that can be set with reasonable fidelity for each system. Therefore, a distributed quantum computing system with multiple quantum computers coherently connected is highly demanding. To realize the inter-node communication of quantum information, the software interface, Quantum Message Passing Interface (QMPI), leveraging the framework built for classical MPI but taking advantage of quantum teleportation to communicate between different quantum nodes was proposed. In this work, we developed a QMPI implementation with a variety of point-to-point and collective operations in Qiskit and characterize its performance by demonstrating the reference implementations on a few benchmark quantum applications. Moreover, we developed a new approach for optimizing collective communications for the distributed quantum programs with multi-controlled Toffoli gates. This approach outperforms current state-of-the-art in terms of fidelity and the number of remote EPR pairs in both simulations and experiments over IBM’s quantum platforms.
items.abstract_zh: 量子计算的实际应用目前受到每个系统可以合理保真度设置的量子位数量的限制。因此，多台量子计算机相干连接的分布式量子计算系统的要求很高。为了实现量子信息的节点间通信，提出了软件接口——量子消息传递接口（QMPI），利用经典MPI构建的框架，但利用量子隐形传态在不同量子节点之间进行通信。在这项工作中，我们在 Qiskit 中开发了具有各种点对点和集体操作的 QMPI 实现，并通过在一些基准量子应用程序上演示参考实现来表征其性能。此外，我们开发了一种新方法，用于优化具有多控制 Toffoli 门的分布式量子程序的集体通信。在 IBM 量子平台上的模拟和实验中，这种方法在保真度和远程 EPR 对数量方面均优于当前最先进的技术。

items.title: Latency and Bandwidth Microbenchmarks of US Department of Energy Systems in the June 2023 Top 500 List.
items.abstract: As a rule, Top 500 class supercomputers are extensively benchmarked as part of their acceptance testing process. However, barring publicly posted LINPACK / HPCG results, most benchmark results are often inaccessible outside the hosting institution. Moreover, these higher level benchmarks do not provide easy answers to common questions such as “What is the realizable memory bandwidth?” or “What is the launch latency on the accelerator?” To partially address these issues, we executed selected single-node micro-benchmarks — focused on latencies and memory bandwidth — on every US Department of Energy system above rank 150 of the June 2023 Top 500 list, excepting NERSC’s Cori and ORNL’s Frontier TDS (now decommissioned or repurposed). We hope to provide an easy “first stop” reference for users of current Top 500 systems and inspire users and administrators of other Top 500 systems to similarly compile and make available benchmark results for their systems.
items.abstract_zh: 通常，500 强级超级计算机都会在验收测试过程中进行广泛的基准测试。然而，除非公开发布 LINPACK / HPCG 结果，否则大多数基准测试结果通常无法在托管机构之外访问。此外，这些更高级别的基准测试并不能为诸如“可实现的内存带宽是多少？”等常见问题提供简单的答案。或“加速器的启动延迟是多少？”为了部分解决这些问题，我们对 2023 年 6 月 500 强排行榜中排名 150 名以上的每个美国能源部系统执行了选定的单节点微基准测试（重点关注延迟和内存带宽），但 NERSC 的 Cori 和 ORNL 的 Frontier TDS（现已退役或重新利用）除外。我们希望为当前 Top 500 系统的用户提供一个简单的“第一站”参考，并激励其他 Top 500 系统的用户和管理员以类似方式为其系统编译和提供可用的基准测试结果。

items.title: Accurate Measurement of Application-level Energy Consumption for Energy-Aware Large-Scale Simulations.
items.abstract: Sustainability in high performance computing (HPC) is a major challenge not only for HPC centers and their users, but also for society as the climate goals become stricter. A lot of effort went into reducing the energy consumption of systems in general. Even though certain efforts to optimize the energy-efficiency of HPC workloads exist, most such efforts propose solutions targeting CPUs. As HPC systems shift more and more to GPU-centric architectures, simulation codes increasingly adopt GPU-programming models. This leads to an urgent need to increase the energy-efficiency of GPU-enabled codes. However, studies for reducing the energy consumption of large-scale simulations executing on CPUs and GPUs have received insufficient attention. In this work, we enable accurate power and energy measurements using an open-source toolkit across a range of CPU+GPU node architectures. We use this approach in SPH-EXA, an open-source GPU-centric astrophysical and cosmological simulation framework. We show that with simple code instrumentation, users can accurately measure power and energy related data about their application, beyond data provided by HPC systems alone. The accurate power and energy data provide significant insight to users for conducting energy-aware computational experiments and future energy-aware code development.
items.abstract_zh: 随着气候目标变得更加严格，高性能计算 (HPC) 的可持续性不仅是 HPC 中心及其用户面临的重大挑战，也是社会面临的重大挑战。总体而言，为了降低系统的能耗，人们付出了很多努力。尽管存在某些优化 HPC 工作负载能效的努力，但大多数此类努力提出了针对 CPU 的解决方案。随着 HPC 系统越来越多地转向以 GPU 为中心的架构，模拟代码越来越多地采用 GPU 编程模型。这导致迫切需要提高支持 GPU 的代码的能效。然而，降低在CPU和GPU上执行的大规模模拟的能耗的研究还没有受到足够的重视。在这项工作中，我们使用开源工具包跨一系列 CPU+GPU 节点架构实现精确的功率和能量测量。我们在 SPH-EXA 中使用了这种方法，SPH-EXA 是一个以 GPU 为中心的开源天体物理和宇宙学模拟框架。我们证明，通过简单的代码检测，用户可以准确测量与其应用程序相关的电力和能源数据，而不仅仅是 HPC 系统单独提供的数据。准确的功率和能源数据为用户进行能源感知计算实验和未来能源感知代码开发提供了重要的见解。

items.title: TaskVine: Managing In-Cluster Storage for High-Throughput Data Intensive Workflows.
items.abstract: Many scientific applications are expressed as high-throughput workflows that consist of large graphs of data assets and tasks to be executed on large parallel and distributed systems. A challenge in executing these workflows is managing data: both datasets and software must be efficiently distributed to cluster nodes; intermediate data must be conveyed between tasks; output data must be delivered to its destination. Scaling problems result when these actions are performed in an uncoordinated manner on a shared filesystem. To address this problem, we introduce TaskVine: a system for exploiting the aggregate local storage and network capacity of a large cluster. TaskVine tracks the lifetime of data in a workflow –from archival sources to final outputs– making use of local storage to distribute, and re-use data wherever possible. We describe the architecture and novel capabilities of TaskVine, and demonstrate its use with applications in genomics, high energy physics, molecular dynamics, and machine learning.
items.abstract_zh: 许多科学应用程序都表示为高吞吐量工作流程，其中包含要在大型并行和分布式系统上执行的大型数据资产图和任务。执行这些工作流程的一个挑战是管理数据：数据集和软件都必须有效地分发到集群节点；任务之间必须传送中间数据；输出数据必须传送到目的地。当这些操作在共享文件系统上以不协调的方式执行时，就会出现扩展问题。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 TaskVine：一个用于利用大型集群的聚合本地存储和网络容量的系统。 TaskVine 跟踪工作流程中数据的生命周期（从存档源到最终输出），尽可能利用本地存储来分发和重用数据。我们描述了 TaskVine 的架构和新颖功能，并展示了其在基因组学、高能物理、分子动力学和机器学习中的应用。

items.title: Automatic Energy-Efficient Job Scheduling in HPC: A Novel SLURM Plugin Approach.
items.abstract: This paper presents a novel approach to enable energy-efficient job scheduling in High-Performance Computing (HPC) environments through application-specific energy models. We propose an architecture that decouples scheduling heuristics to a Python plugin of the HPC scheduler SLURM. The approach leverages the principles of Service-Oriented Architecture and Clean Architecture to create a proof-of-concept system that is adaptable for production setups, providing a platform for integrating various energy-efficient scheduling models. We demonstrate the approach in a single-node HPC system with an energy saving of 11% for the High-Performance Conjugate Gradients (HPCG) benchmark, which represents modern applications’ data access patterns and computation. The proposed approach opens up possibilities for more complex setups, such as automatically scheduling jobs when energy is cheap and renewable, a practice already used in companies utilizing HPC.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种通过特定于应用的能源模型在高性能计算 (HPC) 环境中实现节能作业调度的新方法。我们提出了一种架构，将调度启发式解耦到 HPC 调度程序 SLURM 的 Python 插件。该方法利用面向服务的架构和清洁架构的原则来创建一个适用于生产设置的概念验证系统，为集成各种节能调度模型提供了一个平台。我们在单节点 HPC 系统中演示了该方法，在高性能共轭梯度 (HPCG) 基准测试中节能 11%，该基准测试代表了现代应用程序的数据访问模式和计算。所提出的方法为更复杂的设置提供了可能性，例如在能源便宜且可再生时自动调度作业，这种做法已经在使用 HPC 的公司中使用。

items.title: Addressing Stale Gradients in Scalable Federated Deep Reinforcement Learning.
items.abstract: Advancements in reinforcement learning (RL) via deep neural networks have enabled their application to a variety of real-world problems. However, these applications often suffer from long training times. While attempts to distribute training have been successful in controlled scenarios, they face challenges in heterogeneous-capacity, unstable, and privacy critical environments ([3], [9]). This work applies concepts from federated learning (FL) to distributed RL, specifically addressing the stale gradient problem. A deterministic framework for asynchronous federated RL is utilized to explore dynamic methods for handling stale gradient updates in the Arcade Learning Environment. Experimental results from applying these methods to two Atari-2600 games demonstrate a relative speedup of up to 95% compared to plain A3C in large and unstable federations.
items.abstract_zh: 通过深度神经网络强化学习（RL）的进步使其能够应用于各种现实世界的问题。然而，这些应用程序通常需要较长的训练时间。虽然分布式训练的尝试在受控场景中取得了成功，但它们在异构容量、不稳定和隐私关键环境中面临挑战（[3]、[9]）。这项工作将联邦学习 (FL) 的概念应用到分布式强化学习中，专门解决了过时梯度问题。利用异步联合强化学习的确定性框架来探索在 Arcade 学习环境中处理陈旧梯度更新的动态方法。将这些方法应用于两款 Atari-2600 游戏的实验结果表明，在大型且不稳定的联邦中，与普通 A3C 相比，相对加速高达 95%。

items.title: Task-Based Polar Decomposition Using SLATE on Massively Parallel Systems with Hardware Accelerators.
items.abstract: We investigate a new task-based implementation of the polar decomposition on massively parallel systems augmented with multiple GPUs using SLATE. We implement the iterative QR Dynamically-Weighted Halley (QDWH) algorithm, whose building blocks mainly consist of compute-bound matrix operations, allowing for high levels of parallelism to be exploited on various hardware architectures, such as NVIDIA, AMD, and Intel GPU-based systems. To achieve both performance and portability, we implement our QDWH-based polar decomposition in the SLATE library, which uses efficient techniques in dense linear algebra, such as 2D block cyclic data distribution and communication-avoiding algorithms, as well as modern parallel programming approaches, such as dynamic scheduling and communication overlapping, and uses OpenMP tasks to track data dependencies.
items.abstract_zh: 我们研究了一种新的基于任务的极分解在使用 SLATE 通过多个 GPU 增强的大规模并行系统上的实现。我们实现了迭代 QR 动态加权哈雷 (QDWH) 算法，其构建块主要由计算绑定矩阵运算组成，允许在各种硬件架构（例如 NVIDIA、AMD 和基于 Intel GPU 的系统）上利用高水平的并行性。为了实现性能和可移植性，我们在 SLATE 库中实现了基于 QDWH 的极分解，该库使用密集线性代数中的高效技术，例如 2D 块循环数据分布和通信避免算法，以及现代并行编程方法，例如动态调度和通信重叠，并使用 OpenMP 任务来跟踪数据依赖性。

items.title: Using Mixed-Radix Decomposition to Enumerate Computational Resources of Deeply Hierarchical Architectures.
items.abstract: Current HPC architectures are deeply hierarchical (racks, nodes, sockets, NUMA domains, caches,...), and the mapping of MPI processes to cores can significantly influence application performance. To study hierarchy effects on MPI application performance, we propose a procedure for expressing mappings by enumerating cores in the hierarchy in different orders. We explore two use cases: MPI rank reordering for applications using subcommunicators, and core selection for applications not using all cores on a node.
items.abstract_zh: 当前的 HPC 架构具有很深的层次结构（机架、节点、套接字、NUMA 域、缓存等），MPI 进程到内核的映射可以显着影响应用程序性能。为了研究层次结构对 MPI 应用程序性能的影响，我们提出了一种通过以不同顺序枚举层次结构中的核心来表达映射的过程。我们探讨了两个用例：使用子通信器的应用程序的 MPI 排名重新排序，以及不使用节点上所有核心的应用程序的核心选择。

items.title: Prototype of a Batched Quantum Circuit Simulator for the Vector Engine.
items.abstract: State-of-the-art quantum circuit simulators have mostly focused on scaling the number of qubits. However, we argue that studying current noisy quantum computers and variational quantum algorithms benefits from high-throughput simulation of intermediate-scale quantum circuits. We present the first implementation and evaluation of a batched quantum simulator on the NEC Vector Engine (VE), a vector processor with massive memory bandwidth that is ideal for memory-intensive state vector simulation. To take advantage of the long-vector architecture of VE, we design a parallelization strategy and memory layout suited for batched state vector simulation. Our evaluation shows that the latest-generation VE Type 30A achieves equal performance as the NVIDIA A100 80 GB model for single-qubit gates, but slightly underperforms A100 for two-qubit gates. Furthermore, our vector-friendly noise gate implementation offers a large speedup compared to that of cuStateVec. When simulating a noisy 16-qubit random circuit with our simulator, VE30 is up to 1.95 × faster than A100.
items.abstract_zh: 最先进的量子电路模拟器主要专注于扩展量子位的数量。然而，我们认为研究当前的噪声量子计算机和变分量子算法受益于中等规模量子电路的高通量模拟。我们首次在 NEC 矢量引擎 (VE) 上实现和评估批处理量子模拟器，这是一种具有大内存带宽的矢量处理器，非常适合内存密集型状态矢量模拟。为了利用 VE 的长向量架构，我们设计了适合批量状态向量模拟的并行化策略和内存布局。我们的评估表明，最新一代 VE 30A 型在单量子位门方面的性能与 NVIDIA A100 80 GB 型号相当，但在两量子位门方面的性能略低于 A100。此外，与 cuStateVec 相比，我们的矢量友好噪声门实现提供了很大的加速。当使用我们的模拟器模拟噪声 16 量子位随机电路时，VE30 比 A100 快 1.95 倍。

items.title: A New Sparse GEneral Matrix-matrix Multiplication Method for Long Vector Architecture by Hierarchical Row Merging.
items.abstract: Vector processors have become essential to high-performance computing in scientific and engineering applications, especially in numerical calculations that leverage data parallelism. With escalating computational demands, the efficient execution of Sparse GEneral Matrix-matrix Multiplication (SpGEMM) on vector processors has become crucial. However, it brings challenges for vector processors due to its complex data structures and irregular memory access patterns. This paper presents a new method designed to perform SpGEMM on vector processors, inspired by Iterative Row Merging. The proposed method hierarchically merges rows by utilizing long vector instructions. We evaluate the proposed method against other methods across 27 sparse matrices. The results indicate that the proposed method outperforms other methods for 22 out of the 27 sparse matrices, reaching up to 31.9 times better performance in the best case.
items.abstract_zh: 矢量处理器对于科学和工程应用中的高性能计算至关重要，尤其是在利用数据并行性的数值计算中。随着计算需求的不断增加，在向量处理器上高效执行稀疏通用矩阵乘法 (SpGEMM) 变得至关重要。然而，由于其复杂的数据结构和不规则的内存访问模式，它给矢量处理器带来了挑战。本文提出了一种受迭代行合并启发而设计的在向量处理器上执行 SpGEMM 的新方法。所提出的方法通过利用长向量指令来分层合并行。我们针对 27 个稀疏矩阵的其他方法来评估所提出的方法。结果表明，该方法在 27 个稀疏矩阵中的 22 个方面优于其他方法，在最佳情况下达到了 31.9 倍的性能提升。

items.title: An Event Model for Trace-Based Performance Analysis of MPI Partitioned Point-to-Point Communication.
items.abstract: The MPI 4.0 standard introduced the concept of partitioned point-to-point communication. One facet that may help in encouraging application developers to use this new concept in their programs is the availability of proper tool support in a timely manner. In this paper, we therefore propose nine new events extending the OTF2 event model to accurately represent the runtime behavior of partitioned point-to-point communication. We then demonstrate the suitability of these extensions with three different use cases in the context of performance analysis. In particular, we showcase a prototype implementation of an extended waitstate analysis in the Scalasca trace analyzer, and discuss further potential use cases in the realm of trace visualization and simulation.
items.abstract_zh: MPI 4.0 标准引入了分区点对点通信的概念。可能有助于鼓励应用程序开发人员在他们的程序中使用这一新概念的一个方面是及时提供适当的工具支持。因此，在本文中，我们提出了九个新事件来扩展 OTF2 事件模型，以准确表示分区点对点通信的运行时行为。然后，我们在性能分析的背景下通过三个不同的用例证明这些扩展的适用性。特别是，我们展示了 Scalasca 跟踪分析器中扩展等待状态分析的原型实现，并讨论了跟踪可视化和模拟领域的进一步潜在用例。

items.title: Comparing a Naive and a Tree-Based N-Body Algorithm using Different Standard SYCL Implementations on Various Hardware.
items.abstract: N-body algorithms aim to calculate the interactions between n different bodies with the goal of obtaining their trajectories. Algorithms that solve the n-body problem can leverage significant amounts of parallelism. Today, s are commonly used besides s for the execution of parallel algorithms. However, targeting several hardware platforms at once often requires using different programming languages. In this work, we have implemented a naive and tree-based Barnes-Hut n-body algorithm using SYCL to target s and s with the same programming language. We compare both algorithms on heterogeneous hardware platforms and for different SYCL implementations, with respect to their runtime behavior and support for several performance optimizations. Our results show that some optimizations reveal unexpected behavior for different SYCL implementations. And even though data center s have a clear performance advantage for the naive algorithm, surprisingly consumer s offer competitive runtimes for the Barnes-Hut algorithm.
items.abstract_zh: N-body algorithms aim to calculate the interactions between n different bodies with the goal of obtaining their trajectories.解决 n 体问题的算法可以利用大量的并行性。如今，除了 s 之外，s 还广泛用于执行并行算法。然而，同时针对多个硬件平台通常需要使用不同的编程语言。在这项工作中，我们使用 SYCL 实现了一种基于树的 Barnes-Hut n 体算法，以使用相同的编程语言来定位 s 和 s。我们比较了异构硬件平台上和不同 SYCL 实现上的两种算法的运行时行为和对多种性能优化的支持。我们的结果表明，一些优化揭示了不同 SYCL 实现的意外行为。尽管数据中心对于朴素算法具有明显的性能优势，但令人惊讶的是，消费者为 Barnes-Hut 算法提供了有竞争力的运行时间。

items.title: Tydi-lang: A Language for Typed Streaming Hardware.
items.abstract: Transferring composite data structures with variable-length fields often requires designing unique protocols, causing incompatibility issues and decreased collaboration among hardware developers, especially in the open-source community. Because the high-level meaning of a protocol is often lost in translation to low-level languages when a custom protocol needs to be designed, extra documentation is required, the interpretation of which introduces new opportunities for errors.
items.abstract_zh: 传输具有可变长度字段的复合数据结构通常需要设计独特的协议，这会导致不兼容问题并减少硬件开发人员之间的协作，尤其是在开源社区中。由于当需要设计自定义协议时，协议的高级含义通常会在翻译为低级语言时丢失，因此需要额外的文档，而这些文档的解释会带来新的错误机会。

items.title: OpenMP Kernel Language Extensions for Performance Portable GPU Codes.
items.abstract: In contemporary high-performance computing architectures, the integration of GPU accelerators has become increasingly prevalent. To harness the full potential of these accelerators, developers often resort to vendor-specific kernel languages, such as CUDA. While this approach ensures optimal efficiency, it inherently compromises portability and engenders vendor dependency. Existing portable programming models, such as OpenMP, while promising, demand extensive code rewriting due to their foundamental difference from kernel languages.
items.abstract_zh: 在当代高性能计算架构中，GPU加速器的集成已经变得越来越普遍。为了充分利用这些加速器的潜力，开发人员通常求助于特定于供应商的内核语言，例如 CUDA。虽然这种方法可确保最佳效率，但它本质上会损害可移植性并产生供应商依赖性。现有的可移植编程模型（例如 OpenMP）虽然很有前途，但由于它们与内核语言的根本区别，需要大量的代码重写。

items.title: Embedding Rust within Open MPI.
items.abstract: The Message-Passing Interface (MPI) requires implementations that are able to adapt to new hardware and architectures while ensuring correctness and usability. The most widely used MPI implementations, however, are written in older programming languages that can lead to memory-unsafe code with poor isolation between modules, and complicated interfaces that can lead to serious bugs, all of which leads to difficulty in testing, debugging, and checking for correctness. In order to improve development of MPI implementations, we posit that new components, and key existing code segments, may benefit from being written in the Rust programming language. In this work we reimplement a core component of Open MPI used for intra-node communication in Rust and show that it achieves performance approaching that of the existing, highly optimized, C code, demonstrating that Rust is able to provide performance while allowing for better testing, memory safety guarantees, and correctness.
items.abstract_zh: 消息传递接口 (MPI) 需要能够适应新硬件和架构的实现，同时确保正确性和可用性。然而，最广泛使用的 MPI 实现是用较旧的编程语言编写的，这可能会导致内存不安全的代码，模块之间的隔离很差，并且复杂的接口可能会导致严重的错误，所有这些都会导致测试、调试和检查正确性的困难。为了改进 MPI 实现的开发，我们认为新组件和关键的现有代码段可能会受益于用 Rust 编程语言编写。在这项工作中，我们在 Rust 中重新实现了用于节点内通信的 Open MPI 核心组件，并表明它的性能接近现有的高度优化的 C 代码，证明 Rust 能够提供性能，同时允许更好的测试、内存安全保证和正确性。

items.title: PTI-GPU: Kernel Profiling and Assessment on Intel GPUs.
items.abstract: Modern supercomputing applications are complex programs built on optimized frameworks and accelerated on GPUs. As such, dedicated tools for profiling GPU kernel utilization and performance are needed to support development of these applications, which in turn accelerates progress for the scientific computing and machine learning communities. This paper presents the Oneprof and Onetrace tools from the Intel PTI-GPU framework. These tools are capable of profiling applications and different levels of the runtime stack executing on Intel GPUs. To demonstrate the features and utility of these tools, we examine one HPC and one AI application.
items.abstract_zh: 现代超级计算应用程序是构建在优化框架上并在 GPU 上加速的复杂程序。因此，需要用于分析 GPU 内核利用率和性能的专用工具来支持这些应用程序的开发，从而加速科学计算和机器学习社区的进步。本文介绍了英特尔 PTI-GPU 框架中的 Oneprof 和 Onetrace 工具。这些工具能够分析在英特尔 GPU 上执行的应用程序和不同级别的运行时堆栈。为了演示这些工具的功能和实用性，我们研究了一款 HPC 和一款 AI 应用程序。

items.title: LibPressio-Predict: Flexible and Fast Infrastructure For Inferring Compression Performance.
items.abstract: Over recent years, substantial efforts have gone into developing systems to infer compression performance without running compressors. These efforts have driven down the error in the estimates, reduced their runtimes, and improved their generality. However, these efforts are uncoordinated increasing the efforts required to perform comparisons between them. There may be subtle differences in sampling approaches, and nuances to the interfaces requiring efforts to port applications between them and to reproduce experiments. Additionally, many of these methods call for substantial amounts of training data to produce reliable estimates, as well as scalable codes to perform the training. In this work, we present LibPressio-Predict – a scalable library for use in applications using predictions of compression performance and a scalable tool LibPressio-Bench to run these experiments quickly at scale. We use this tool to evaluate 3 recent compression prediction approaches systematically with all 48 timesteps and 13 fields from the Hurricane Issable dataset.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，人们投入了大量精力来开发无需运行压缩机即可推断压缩性能的系统。这些努力降低了估计误差，减少了运行时间，并提高了通用性。然而，这些努力是不协调的，增加了在它们之间进行比较所需的努力。采样方法可能存在细微差别，并且接口的细微差别需要努力在它们之间移植应用程序并重现实验。此外，许多这些方法需要大量的训练数据来产生可靠的估计，以及可扩展的代码来执行训练。在这项工作中，我们提出了 LibPressio-Predict——一个可在使用压缩性能预测的应用程序中使用的可扩展库，以及一个可大规模快速运行这些实验的可扩展工具 LibPressio-Bench。我们使用该工具使用 Hurricane Issable 数据集中的所有 48 个时间步长和 13 个字段来系统地评估 3 种最新的压缩预测方法。

items.title: An Ising-based Model for Qubit Mapping.
items.abstract: A crucial step in compiling a quantum algorithm involves addressing a layout problem to meet the device’s layout constraints. The Qubit Mapping and Routing (QMR) problem aims to minimize the number of SWAP gates added to the circuit to fulfill NISQ hardware’s connectivity constraints. Although this problem is NP-hard, finding solutions quickly is vital as it is part of the compilation process.
items.abstract_zh: 编译量子算法的关键步骤涉及解决布局问题以满足设备的布局约束。量子位映射和路由 (QMR) 问题旨在最大限度地减少添加到电路中的 SWAP 门的数量，以满足 NISQ 硬件的连接限制。尽管这个问题是 NP 难题，但快速找到解决方案至关重要，因为它是编译过程的一部分。

items.title: DPU Offloading Programming with the OpenMP API.
items.abstract: Data processing units (DPUs) as network co-processors are an emerging trend in our community, with plenty of opportunities yet to be explored. These have been generally used as domain-specific accelerators transparent to application developers; In the HPC field, DPUs have been used as MPI accelerators, but also to offload some tasks from the general-purpose processor. However, the latter required application developers to deploy MPI ranks in the DPUs, as if they were remote (weak) compute nodes, hence considerably hindering programmability. The wide adoption of OpenMP as the threading model in the HPC arena, along with that of GPU accelerators, is making OpenMP offloading to GPUs a wide trend for HPC applications. In this paper we introduce, for the first time in the literature, OpenMP offloading support for network co-processor DPUs. We present our design in LLVM to support OpenMP standard offloading semantics and discuss the programming productivity advantages with respect to the existing MPI-based programming model. We also provide the corresponding performance analysis demonstrating competitive results in comparison with the MPI baseline.
items.abstract_zh: 作为网络协处理器的数据处理单元 (DPU) 是我们社区中的一个新兴趋势，还有大量的机会有待探索。这些通常被用作对应用程序开发人员透明的特定领域加速器；在HPC领域，DPU已被用作MPI加速器，而且还可以从通用处理器上卸载一些任务。然而，后者要求应用程序开发人员在 DPU 中部署 MPI 等级，就好像它们是远程（弱）计算节点一样，因此极大地阻碍了可编程性。 OpenMP 作为 HPC 领域的线程模型以及 GPU 加速器的广泛采用，使得 OpenMP 卸载到 GPU 成为 HPC 应用程序的广泛趋势。在本文中，我们在文献中首次介绍了对网络协处理器 DPU 的 OpenMP 卸载支持。我们在 LLVM 中展示了我们的设计，以支持 OpenMP 标准卸载语义，并讨论了相对于现有的基于 MPI 的编程模型的编程生产力优势。我们还提供相应的性能分析，展示与 MPI 基线相比的竞争结果。

items.title: Mixed-Precision S/DGEMM Using the TF32 and TF64 Frameworks on Low-Precision AI Tensor Cores.
items.abstract: Using NVIDIA graphics processing units (GPUs) equipped with Tensor Cores has enabled the significant acceleration of general matrix multiplication (GEMM) for applications in machine learning (ML) and artificial intelligence (AI) and in high-performance computing (HPC) generally. The use of such power-efficient, specialized accelerators can provide a performance increase between 8 × and 20 ×, albeit with a loss in precision. However, a high level of precision is required in many large scientific and HPC applications, and computing in single or double precision is still necessary for many of these applications to maintain accuracy. Fortunately, mixed-precision methods can be employed to maintain a higher level of numerical precision while also taking advantage of the performance increases from computing with lower-precision AI cores. With this in mind, we extend the state of the art by using NVIDIA’s new TF32 framework. This new framework not only burdens some constraints of the previous frameworks, such as costly 32 16-bit castings but also provides an equivalent precision and performance by using a much simpler approach. We also propose a new framework called TF64 that attempts double-precision arithmetic with low-precision Tensor Cores. Although this framework does not exist yet, we validated the correctness of this idea and achieved an equivalent of 64-bit precision on 32-bit hardware.
items.abstract_zh: 使用配备 Tensor Core 的 NVIDIA 图形处理单元 (GPU)，可以显着加速机器学习 (ML) 和人工智能 (AI) 以及高性能计算 (HPC) 中应用的通用矩阵乘法 (GEMM)。使用这种高能效的专用加速器可以将性能提高 8 倍到 20 倍，但精度会有所损失。然而，许多大型科学和 HPC 应用程序需要高精度，并且许多此类应用程序仍然需要单精度或双精度计算来保持精度。幸运的是，可以采用混合精度方法来保持更高水平的数值精度，同时还可以利用低精度 AI 核心计算带来的性能提升。考虑到这一点，我们通过使用 NVIDIA 的新 TF32 框架来扩展最先进的技术。这个新框架不仅减轻了以前框架的一些限制，例如昂贵的 32 16 位转换，而且还通过使用更简单的方法提供了同等的精度和性能。我们还提出了一个名为 TF64 的新框架，尝试使用低精度 Tensor Core 进行双精度算术。尽管这个框架还不存在，但我们验证了这个想法的正确性，并在 32 位硬件上实现了相当于 64 位的精度。

items.title: Moment Representation of Regularized Lattice Boltzmann Methods on NVIDIA and AMD GPUs.
items.abstract: The lattice Boltzmann method is a highly scalable Navier-Stokes solver that has been applied to flow problems in a wide array of domains. However, the method is bandwidth-bound on modern GPU accelerators and has a large memory footprint. In this paper, we present new 2D and 3D GPU implementations of two different regularized lattice Boltzmann methods, which are not only able to achieve an acceleration of ∼ 1.4 × w.r.t. reference lattice Boltzmann implementations but also reduce the memory requirements by up to 35% and 47% in 2D and 3D simulations respectively. These new approaches are evaluated on NVIDIA and AMD GPU architectures.
items.abstract_zh: 格子玻尔兹曼方法是一种高度可扩展的纳维-斯托克斯求解器，已应用于广泛领域中的流动问题。然而，该方法在现代 GPU 加速器上受到带宽限制，并且内存占用较大。在本文中，我们提出了两种不同正则化格子玻尔兹曼方法的新 2D 和 3D GPU 实现，它们不仅能够实现 ∼ 1.4 × w.r.t 的加速。参考格子玻尔兹曼实现，而且在 2D 和 3D 模拟中分别将内存需求减少了 35% 和 47%。这些新方法在 NVIDIA 和 AMD GPU 架构上进行了评估。

items.title: Performance Engineering for Graduate Students: a View from Amsterdam.
items.abstract: HPC relies on experts to design, implement, and tune (computational science) applications that can efficiently use current (super)computing systems. As such, we strongly believe we must educate our students to ensure their ability to drive these activities, together with the domain experts. To this end, in 2017, we have designed a performance engineering course that, inspired by several conference-like tutorials, covers the principles and practice of performance engineering: benchmarking, performance modeling, and performance improvement. In this paper, we describe the goals, learning objectives, and structure of the course, share students feedback and evaluation data, and discuss the lessons learned. After teaching the course seven times, our results show that the course is tough (as expected) but very well received, with high-scores and several students continuing on the path of performance engineering during and after their master studies.
items.abstract_zh: HPC 依靠专家来设计、实施和调整（计算科学）应用程序，以有效地使用当前（超级）计算系统。因此，我们坚信我们必须教育我们的学生，以确保他们有能力与领域专家一起推动这些活动。为此，2017年，我们设计了性能工程课程，受到几场会议式教程的启发，涵盖了性能工程的原理和实践：基准测试、性能建模和性能改进。在本文中，我们描述了课程的目标、学习目的和结构，分享学生的反馈和评估数据，并讨论所学到的经验教训。在教授该课程七次后，我们的结果表明，该课程很难（正如预期的那样），但很受欢迎，得分很高，并且一些学生在硕士学习期间和之后继续走上性能工程的道路。

items.title: Scalable Lead Prediction with Transformers using HPC resources.
items.abstract: A promising direction in cancer drug discovery is high-throughput screening of extensive compound datasets to identify advantageous properties, including their ability to interact with relevant biomolecules such as proteins. However, traditional structural approaches for assessing binding affinity, such as free energy methods or molecular docking, pose significant computational bottlenecks when dealing with such vast datasets. To address this, we have developed a docking surrogate called the SMILES transformer (ST), which learns molecular features from the SMILES representation of compounds and approximates their binding affinity. SMILES data is first tokenized using a well-established SMILES-pair tokenizer and fed into a BERT-like Transformer model to generate vector embeddings for each molecule, effectively capturing the essential information. These extracted embeddings are then fed into a regression model to predict the binding affinity. Leveraging the high-performance computing resources at Argonne National Lab, we devised a workflow to scale model training and inference across multiple supercomputing nodes. To evaluate the performance and accuracy of our workflow, we conducted experiments using molecular docking binding affinity data on multiple receptors, comparing ST with another state-of-the-art docking surrogate. Impressively, both surrogates yielded comparable val-r2 measurements of between 70 and 90%, affirming the capability of ST to learn molecular features directly from language-based data. Furthermore, one significant advantage of the ST approach is its notably faster tokenization preprocessing compared to the alternative method, which requires generating molecular descriptors using Mordred. Our workflow facilitated screening of ∼3 billion compounds on 48 nodes of the Polaris supercomputer in approximately an hour. In summary, our approach presents an efficient means to screen extensive compound databases for potential molecular properties that could serve as lead compounds targeting cancer. Looking ahead, an important future direction for our workflow involves integrating de-novo drug design, enabling us to scale our efforts to explore the limits of synthesizable compounds within chemical space.
items.abstract_zh: 癌症药物发现的一个有前途的方向是对广泛的化合物数据集进行高通量筛选，以识别有利的特性，包括它们与相关生物分子（例如蛋白质）相互作用的能力。然而，用于评估结合亲和力的传统结构方法（例如自由能方法或分子对接）在处理如此庞大的数据集时会造成严重的计算瓶颈。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种称为 SMILES 转换器 (ST) 的对接替代物，它可以从化合物的 SMILES 表示中学习分子特征并近似其结合亲和力。 SMILES 数据首先使用完善的 SMILES 对标记器进行标记，然后输入类似 BERT 的 Transformer 模型，为每个分子生成向量嵌入，从而有效捕获基本信息。然后将这些提取的嵌入输入回归模型以预测结合亲和力。利用阿贡国家实验室的高性能计算资源，我们设计了一个工作流程来跨多个超级计算节点扩展模型训练和推理。为了评估我们工作流程的性能和准确性，我们使用多个受体上的分子对接结合亲和力数据进行了实验，将 ST 与另一种最先进的对接替代物进行了比较。令人印象深刻的是，两个替代物都产生了 70% 到 90% 之间的可比 val-r2 测量结果，证实了 ST 直接从基于语言的数据学习分子特征的能力。此外，ST 方法的一个显着优势是，与需要使用 Mordred 生成分子描述符的替代方法相比，它的标记化预处理速度明显更快。我们的工作流程在大约一个小时内，在 Polaris 超级计算机的 48 个节点上筛选了约 30 亿种化合物。总之，我们的方法提供了一种有效的方法来筛选广泛的化合物数据库，以寻找可作为靶向癌症的先导化合物的潜在分子特性。展望未来，我们工作流程的一个重要未来方向涉及整合从头药物设计，使我们能够扩大努力，探索化学空间内可合成化合物的极限。

items.title: OpenSHMEM Queues: An abstraction for enhancing message rate, bandwidth utilization, and reducing tail latency in OpenSHMEM Applications.
items.abstract: The performance of OpenSHMEM applications is significantly influenced by the network message rate and the efficient utilization of bandwidth for small messages. While network hardware offers higher message rates, software overheads hinder the achievement of these rates within the programming model and applications. The absence of appropriate abstractions in the OpenSHMEM model exacerbates this challenge. For instance, message aggregation, which has been successful with MPI derived datatypes through user mode memory registration (UMR), encounters abstraction hurdles in the OpenSHMEM programming model. Although, such improvements can only be achieved using separate middleware built on top of OpenSHMEM and cannot be easily achieved natively. Furthermore, Quality of Service (QoS) for short messages under high loads is important for HPC applications, particularly in the case of OpenSHMEM. Congestion experienced in shared HPC systems due to contention for shared networks, I/O systems, etc., can create an adverse user experience and can impact overall system performance, leading to prolonged tail latencies. To address these issues, this paper introduces a Queues API abstraction for the OpenSHMEM programming model, enabling message aggregation and in-network prioritization for small data transfers. We present the OpenSHMEM API, build a prototype for OpenSHMEM queues, explore various message aggregation techniques, and evaluate NVIDIA InfiniBand virtual lanes for QoS in OpenSHMEM. Our results demonstrate a 2x-3x bandwidth improvement using OpenSHMEM queues with message aggregation. Additionally, we achieve a substantial reduction in tail latency, with improvements of up to 3.5x observed in congested scenarios for one-sided transfers.
items.abstract_zh: OpenSHMEM 应用程序的性能很大程度上受到网络消息速率和小消息带宽的有效利用的影响。虽然网络硬件提供了更高的消息速率，但软件开销阻碍了编程模型和应用程序中这些速率的实现。 The absence of appropriate abstractions in the OpenSHMEM model exacerbates this challenge.例如，通过用户模式内存注册 (UMR) 成功使用 MPI 派生数据类型的消息聚合在 OpenSHMEM 编程模型中遇到了抽象障碍。尽管如此，此类改进只能使用构建在 OpenSHMEM 之上的单独中间件来实现，并且无法轻松地在本机实现。此外，高负载下短消息的服务质量 (QoS) 对于 HPC 应用程序非常重要，特别是在 OpenSHMEM 的情况下。由于共享网络、I/O 系统等的争用，共享 HPC 系统中出现的拥塞可能会造成不良的用户体验，并可能影响整体系统性能，导致尾部延迟延长。为了解决这些问题，本文引入了 OpenSHMEM 编程模型的队列 API 抽象，支持小数据传输的消息聚合和网络内优先级排序。我们介绍 OpenSHMEM API，构建 OpenSHMEM 队列原型，探索各种消息聚合技术，并评估 NVIDIA InfiniBand 虚拟通道的 OpenSHMEM 中的 QoS。我们的结果表明，使用具有消息聚合功能的 OpenSHMEM 队列可将带宽提高 2-3 倍。此外，我们还大幅减少了尾部延迟，在单侧传输的拥塞场景中观察到延迟延迟高达 3.5 倍。

items.title: Enhancing Metadata Transfer Efficiency: Unlocking the Potential of DAOS in the ADIOS context.
items.abstract: In HPC, data movement between applications is typically facilitated by I/O middleware, such as the Adaptable I/O System (ADIOS). This middleware leverages the capabilities of the underlying storage services, to facilitate data movement and distribution. A recent storage system, Intel DAOS, promises to deliver new capabilities for achieving performance and scalability on emerging memory/storage systems. DAOS has already deployed in University of Cambridge, TACC, and the upcoming Aurora supercomputer. This paper investigates the performance tradeoffs associated with mapping ADIOS over one of the many different DAOS interfaces and data models, and makes recommendations for their efficient use.
items.abstract_zh: 在 HPC 中，应用程序之间的数据移动通常由 I/O 中间件（例如自适应 I/O 系统 (ADIOS)）来促进。该中间件利用底层存储服务的功能来促进数据移动和分发。最近的存储系统英特尔 DAOS 承诺提供新功能，以在新兴内存/存储系统上实现性能和可扩展性。 DAOS 已经部署在剑桥大学、TACC 以及即将推出的 Aurora 超级计算机中。本文研究了与将 ADIOS 映射到多种不同 DAOS 接口和数据模型之一相关的性能权衡，并为其有效使用提出了建议。

items.title: Streaming Data from Experimental Facilities to Supercomputers for Real-Time Data Processing.
items.abstract: In this paper we demonstrate direct data streaming from instruments and detectors at a large-scale experimental facility to a supercomputer for real-time data processing and feedback. Streaming data to supercomputers introduces the potential for novel scientific applications and workflow models, including the ability to provide real-time feedback from very large datasets during an experiment and the integration of real-time ML training and inference at scale. We discuss a successful demonstration for real-time processing of data from the Advanced Photon Source (APS) on the Polaris supercomputer using an EPICS-based streaming framework. We describe the capabilities of the streaming framework itself, and outline the architecture that allows us to process experimentally derived data on a supercomputer without file-based data transfers. We present throughput measurements that are indicative of system performance capable of sustaining the expected data production rates of the facility, as well as discuss some outstanding challenges and our future directions.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们演示了从大型实验设施的仪器和探测器到超级计算机的直接数据流，以进行实时数据处理和反馈。将数据流式传输到超级计算机引入了新颖的科学应用和工作流程模型的潜力，包括在实验期间从非常大的数据集提供实时反馈的能力以及大规模实时机器学习训练和推理的集成。我们讨论了使用基于 EPICS 的流框架在 Polaris 超级计算机上实时处理来自高级光子源 (APS) 的数据的成功演示。我们描述了流框架本身的功能，并概述了允许我们在超级计算机上处​​理实验得出的数据而无需基于文件的数据传输的架构。我们提供了吞吐量测量结果，这些测量结果表明系统性能能够维持设施的预期数据生产率，并讨论了一些突出的挑战和我们未来的方向。

items.title: Rethinking Data Race Detection in MPI-RMA Programs.
items.abstract: Supercomputers are capable of increasingly more computations, and nodes forming them need to communicate even more efficiently with each other. The Message Passing Interface (MPI) proposes a communication model based on one-sided communications called the MPI Remote Memory Access (MPI-RMA). Thanks to these operations, applications can improve the overlap of communications with computations. However, one-sided communications are complex to write since they are subject to data races. This paper rethinks an existing on-the-fly data race detection algorithm for MPI-RMA programs by improving the storage of memory accesses in a Binary Search Tree using a new insertion algorithm based on fragmentation and merging algorithms. Thus, experimental results on real-life applications show that this new insertion algorithm improves the accuracy of the data race detection and can reduce the overhead of the analysis at runtime by a factor up to two.
items.abstract_zh: 超级计算机能够进行越来越多的计算，构成超级计算机的节点需要更有效地相互通信。消息传递接口 (MPI) 提出了一种基于单侧通信的通信模型，称为 MPI 远程内存访问 (MPI-RMA)。由于这些操作，应用程序可以改善通信与计算的重叠。然而，单方面的通信编写起来很复杂，因为它们会受到数据竞争的影响。本文通过使用基于碎片和合并算法的新插入算法改进二叉搜索树中内存访问的存储，重新思考了 MPI-RMA 程序的现有动态数据竞争检测算法。因此，实际应用的实验结果表明，这种新的插入算法提高了数据竞争检测的准确性，并且可以将运行时的分析开销减少多达两倍。

items.title: Highlighting PARCOACH Improvements on MBI.
items.abstract: PARCOACH is one of the few verification tools that mainly relies on a static analysis to detect errors in MPI programs. First focused on the detection of call ordering errors with collectives, it has recently been extended to detect local concurrency errors in MPI-RMA programs. Furthermore, the new version of the tool fixes multiple errors and is easier to use. This paper presents the improvements we made and the results we obtained on the MPI Bugs Initiative.
items.abstract_zh: PARCOACH is one of the few verification tools that mainly relies on a static analysis to detect errors in MPI programs.首先专注于检测集合的调用顺序错误，最近已扩展到检测 MPI-RMA 程序中的本地并发错误。此外，新版本的工具修复了多个错误，并且更易于使用。本文介绍了我们在 MPI Bugs Initiative 上所做的改进和获得的结果。

items.title: Short Reasons for Long Vectors in HPC CPUs: A Study Based on RISC-V.
items.abstract: For years, SIMD/vector units have enhanced the capabilities of modern CPUs in High-Performance Computing (HPC) and mobile technology. Typical commercially-available SIMD units process up to 8 double-precision elements with one instruction. The optimal vector width and its impact on CPU throughput due to memory latency and bandwidth remain challenging research areas. This study examines the behavior of four computational kernels on a RISC-V core connected to a customizable vector unit, capable of operating up to 256 double precision elements per instruction. The four codes have been purposefully selected to represent non-dense workloads: SpMV, BFS, PageRank, FFT. The experimental setup allows us to measure their performance while varying the vector length, the memory latency, and bandwidth. Our results not only show that larger vector lengths allow for better tolerance of limitations in the memory subsystem but also offer hope to code developers beyond dense linear algebra.
items.abstract_zh: 多年来，SIMD/矢量单元增强了现代 CPU 在高性能计算 (HPC) 和移动技术方面的功能。典型的商用 SIMD 单元可使用一条指令处理多达 8 个双精度元素。最佳向量宽度及其因内存延迟和带宽而对 CPU 吞吐量的影响仍然是具有挑战性的研究领域。本研究检查了连接到可定制向量单元的 RISC-V 内核上的四个计算内核的行为，每条指令能够运行多达 256 个双精度元素。特意选择了四个代码来代表非密集工作负载：SpMV、BFS、PageRank、FFT。实验设置允许我们在改变向量长度、内存延迟和带宽的同时测量它们的性能。我们的结果不仅表明更大的向量长度可以更好地容忍内存子系统中的限制，而且还为代码开发人员提供超越密集线性代数的希望。

items.title: Enabling Scalable VQE Simulation on Leading HPC Systems.
items.abstract: Large-scale simulations of quantum circuits pose significant challenges, especially in quantum chemistry, due to the number of qubits, circuit depth, and the number of circuits needed per problem. High-performance computing (HPC) systems offer massive computational capabilities that could help overcome these obstacles. We developed a high-performance quantum circuit simulator called NWQ-Sim, and demonstrated its capability to simulate large quantum chemistry problems on NERSC’s Perlmutter supercomputer. Integrating NWQ-Sim with XACC, an open-source programming framework for quantum-classical applications, we have executed quantum phase estimation (QPE) and variational quantum eigensolver (VQE) algorithms for downfolded quantum chemistry systems at unprecedented scales. Our work demonstrates the potential of leveraging HPC resources and optimized simulators to advance quantum chemistry and other applications of near-term quantum devices. By scaling to larger qubit counts and circuit depths, high-performance simulators like NWQ-Sim will be critical for characterizing and validating quantum algorithms before their deployment on actual quantum hardware.
items.abstract_zh: 由于量子位的数量、电路深度以及每个问题所需的电路数量，量子电路的大规模模拟提出了重大挑战，尤其是在量子化学领域。高性能计算 (HPC) 系统提供的强大计算能力可以帮助克服这些障碍。我们开发了一种名为 NWQ-Sim 的高性能量子电路模拟器，并展示了其在 NERSC 的 Perlmutter 超级计算机上模拟大型量子化学问题的能力。将 NWQ-Sim 与 XACC（一种用于量子经典应用的开源编程框架）集成，我们以前所未有的规模为下折叠量子化学系统执行了量子相位估计 (QPE) 和变分量子本征求解器 (VQE) 算法。我们的工作展示了利用 HPC 资源和优化模拟器来推进量子化学和近期量子设备的其他应用的潜力。通过扩展到更大的量子位计数和电路深度，像 NWQ-Sim 这样的高性能模拟器对于在实际量子硬件上部署量子算法之前表征和验证量子算法至关重要。

items.title: PEAK: a Light-Weight Profiler for HPC Systems.
items.abstract: In the context of the expanding landscape of contemporary High-Performance Computing (HPC) applications from petascale to exascale, the pursuit of performance optimization emerges as a significant impediment within software development endeavors. In the meantime, the escalating intricacies inherent in parallel architectures and systems serve to compound the challenges associated with performance enhancement. Here, we introduce PEAK (Performance Evaluation and Analysis Kit), a light-weight profiling tool developed with a specific focus on large-scale HPC applications. Using Dynamic Binary Instrumentation, PEAK is able to profile large-scale multi-threaded, multi-process applications with low overhead and high accuracy. We analyzed the overhead and accuracy of PEAK using synthetic benchmarks and real applications and compared it against the other widely used HPC profiling tools available. Our demonstration underscores that PEAK exhibits comparable overhead and accuracy to alternative profiling tools, while preserving its inherent simplicity.
items.abstract_zh: 在当代高性能计算 (HPC) 应用从千万亿级扩展到百亿亿级的背景下，对性能优化的追求成为软件开发工作中的一个重大障碍。与此同时，并行架构和系统固有的不断升级的复杂性加剧了与性能增强相关的挑战。在这里，我们介绍 PEAK（性能评估和分析套件），这是一款专门针对大规模 HPC 应用程序而开发的轻量级分析工具。使用动态二进制仪器，PEAK 能够以低开销和高精度分析大规模多线程、多进程应用程序。我们使用综合基准和实际应用程序分析了 PEAK 的开销和准确性，并将其与其他广泛使用的 HPC 分析工具进行了比较。我们的演示强调，PEAK 具有与其他分析工具相当的开销和准确性，同时保留了其固有的简单性。

items.title: Analyzing Impact of Data Reduction Techniques on Visualization for AMR Applications Using AMReX Framework.
items.abstract: Today’s scientific simulations generate exceptionally large volumes of data, challenging the capacities of available I/O bandwidth and storage space. This necessitates a substantial reduction in data volume, for which error-bounded lossy compression has emerged as a highly effective strategy. A crucial metric for assessing the efficacy of lossy compression is visualization. Despite extensive research on the impact of compression on visualization, there is a notable gap in the literature concerning the effects of compression on the visualization of Adaptive Mesh Refinement (AMR) data. AMR has proven to be a potent solution for addressing the rising computational intensity and the explosive growth in data volume that requires storage and transmission. However, the hierarchical and multi-resolution characteristics of AMR data introduce unique challenges to its visualization, and these challenges are further compounded when data compression comes into play. This article delves into the intricacies of how data compression influences and introduces novel challenges to the visualization of AMR data.
items.abstract_zh: 当今的科学模拟会生成异常大量的数据，对可用 I/O 带宽和存储空间的容量提出了挑战。这就需要大幅减少数据量，为此，错误限制有损压缩已成为一种高效的策略。评估有损压缩效果的一个关键指标是可视化。尽管对压缩对可视化的影响进行了广泛的研究，但有关压缩对自适应网格细化（AMR）数据可视化的影响的文献中仍存在显着的空白。事实证明，AMR 是解决日益增长的计算强度以及需要存储和传输的数据量爆炸性增长的有效解决方案。然而，AMR 数据的分层和多分辨率特征为其可视化带来了独特的挑战，而当数据压缩发挥作用时，这些挑战会进一步加剧。本文深入探讨了数据压缩如何影响 AMR 数据的复杂性，并介绍了 AMR 数据可视化的新挑战。

items.title: An Empirical Comparison of the RISC-V and AArch64 Instruction Sets.
items.abstract: In this work we perform one of the first in-depth, empirical comparisons of the Arm and RISC-V instruction sets. We compare a series of benchmarks compiled with GCC 9.2 and 12.2, targeting the scalar subsets of Arm’s Armv-8a and RISC-V’s rv64g. We analyse instruction counts, critical paths and windowed critical paths to get an estimate of performance differences between the two instruction sets, determining where each has advantages and disadvantages. The results show the instruction sets are relatively closely matched on the metrics we evaluated for the benchmarks we considered, indicating that neither ISA has a large, inherent advantage over the other, architecturally.
items.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们对 Arm 和 RISC-V 指令集进行了首次深入的实证比较。我们比较了使用 GCC 9.2 和 12.2 编译的一系列基准测试，针对 Arm 的 Armv-8a 和 RISC-V 的 rv64g 的标量子集。我们分析指令计数、关键路径和窗口关键路径，以估计两个指令集之间的性能差异，确定每个指令集的优点和缺点。结果显示，指令集与我们所考虑的基准评估指标的匹配度相对较高，这表明两种 ISA 在架构上都没有比对方大的固有优势。

items.title: Altis-SYCL: Migrating Altis Benchmarking Suite from CUDA to SYCL for GPUs and FPGAs.
items.abstract: In this work, we introduce Altis-SYCL, a benchmark suite based on SYCL for GPUs and FPGAs. For developing Altis-SYCL, we leverage the oneAPI heterogeneous programming framework in two consecutive steps: 1) by using the modern Altis GPGPU benchmark suite as baseline and migrating it from CUDA to SYCL, and 2) by exploring several techniques to optimize the performance of the resulting SYCL code. Our migration-and-optimization methodology starts targeting GPUs and progressively moves towards FPGAs. In this process, we discuss the differences between device-specific strategies as well as detailing the required code refactoring and optimization efforts. The performance of Altis-SYCL was evaluated on Stratix 10 and Agilex FPGAs, and for some applications, their execution runtimes were competitive with those achieved on latest high-end GPUs. The corresponding code is released as open source under: https://github.com/esa-tu-darmstadt/altis_sycl.
items.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们介绍了 Altis-SYCL，这是一个基于 SYCL 的 GPU 和 FPGA 基准测试套件。为了开发 Altis-SYCL，我们通过两个连续步骤利用 oneAPI 异构编程框架：1) 使用现代 Altis GPGPU 基准套件作为基准并将其从 CUDA 迁移到 SYCL，2) 通过探索多种技术来优化所得 SYCL 代码的性能。我们的迁移和优化方法开始以 GPU 为目标，并逐步转向 FPGA。在此过程中，我们讨论特定于设备的策略之间的差异，并详细说明所需的代码重构和优化工作。 Altis-SYCL 的性能在 Stratix 10 和 Agilex FPGA 上进行了评估，对于某些应用程序，其执行运行时间与最新高端 GPU 上实现的运行时间相当。相应的代码作为开源发布在：https://github.com/esa-tu-darmstadt/altis_sycl。

items.title: Implementing scalable matrix-vector products for the exact diagonalization methods in quantum many-body physics.
items.abstract: Exact diagonalization is a well-established method for simulating small quantum systems. Its applicability is limited by the exponential growth of the Hamiltonian matrix that needs to be diagonalized. Physical symmetries are usually utilized to reduce the matrix dimension, and distributed-memory parallelism is employed to explore larger systems. This paper focuses on an implementation of the core distributed algorithms, with a special emphasis on the matrix-vector product. Instead of the conventional MPI+X paradigm, Chapel is chosen as the language in this work.
items.abstract_zh: 精确对角化是模拟小型量子系统的成熟方法。它的适用性受到需要对角化的哈密顿矩阵的指数增长的限制。通常利用物理对称性来减少矩阵维数，并利用分布式内存并行性来探索更大的系统。本文重点关注核心分布式算法的实现，特别强调矩阵向量积。本次工作中选择 Chapel 作为语言，而不是传统的 MPI+X 范例。

items.title: Performance Portability of Programming Strategies for Nearest-Neighbor Communication with GPU-Aware MPI.
items.abstract: To better advise HPC application developers, we have implemented Faces, a nearest-neighbor microbenchmark that quantifies performance trade-offs. The Faces experiments presented here explore the following design choices: 1) fewer dependent messages versus more independent messages, 2) fewer fused GPU kernels versus more simple kernels, 3) number of GPU streams, 4) size of GPU thread blocks, and 5) linear versus blocked ordering of MPI ranks. We present weak-scaling performance of a latency-sensitive “small” per-rank domain and of a bandwidth-sensitive “large” per-rank domain, and we compare results for two high-performance computers with contrasting CPU, GPU, and interconnect architectures: Summit and Frontier. We find that using more independent messages tends to give better performance than using few dependent messages. We identify performance-portability recommendations for GPU streams and synchronization, but other aspects of performance show complicated dependence on problem size and computer.
items.abstract_zh: 为了更好地为 HPC 应用程序开发人员提供建议，我们实施了 Faces，这是一种量化性能权衡的最近邻微基准测试。这里介绍的 Faces 实验探索了以下设计选择：1）更少的相关消息与更多的独立消息，2）更少的融合 GPU 内核与更简单的内核，3）GPU 流的数量，4）GPU 线程块的大小，以及 5）MPI 等级的线性排序与块排序。我们展示了延迟敏感的“小”每列域和带宽敏感的“大”每列域的弱扩展性能，并且我们比较了具有对比 CPU、GPU 和互连架构的两台高性能计算机的结果：Summit 和 Frontier。我们发现使用更多的独立消息往往比使用少量的相关消息具有更好的性能。我们确定了 GPU 流和同步的性能可移植性建议，但性能的其他方面显示出对问题大小和计算机的复杂依赖性。

items.title: An End-to-End HPC Framework for Dynamic Power Objectives.
items.abstract: High-Performance Computing (HPC) centers demand a lot of power, and continue to grow through the Exascale era.
