To address this issue, Graph3PO is designed to combine storage device queue information with system topological information for forming a temporal graph, which can accurately predict device queue states. Additionally, Graph3PO contains the urgency degree model and cost model for measuring SLO violation risks and penalties of scheduling requests on storage device queues. When the urgency degree of a request exceeds a threshold, Graph3PO determines whether to schedule it in the queue or initiate a hedge request to another storage device. Experimental results show that Graph3PO outperforms its competitors, with SLO violation rates 2.8 to 201.1 times lower.
items.abstract_zh: 对象云存储系统部署有不同的应用程序，这些应用程序具有不同的延迟服务级别目标 (SLO)，这给以有限的存储资源支持服务质量带来了挑战。现有方法提供基于预测的建议，用于将请求从应用程序分派到存储设备，但预测准确性可能会受到复杂系统拓扑的影响。为了解决这个问题，Graph3PO被设计为将存储设备队列信息与系统拓扑信息结合起来形成时间图，从而可以准确地预测设备队列状态。此外，Graph3PO 还包含紧急度模型和成本模型，用于衡量存储设备队列上的调度请求的 SLO 违规风险和惩罚。当请求的紧急程度超过阈值时，Graph3PO会决定是否将其调度到队列中或向另一个存储设备发起对冲请求。实验结果表明，Graph3PO 的性能优于竞争对手，SLO 违规率低 2.8 至 201.1 倍。

items.title: Phases, Modalities, Spatial and Temporal Locality: Domain Specific ML Prefetcher for Accelerating Graph Analytics.
items.abstract: Memory performance is a key bottleneck in accelerating graph analytics. Existing Machine Learning (ML) prefetchers encounter challenges with phase transitions and irregular memory accesses in graph processing. We propose MPGraph, an ML-based Prefetcher for Graph analytics using domain specific models. MPGraph introduces three novel optimizations: soft detection of phase transitions, phase-specific multi-modality models for access delta and page predictions, and chain spatio-temporal prefetching (CSTP) for prefetch control.
items.abstract_zh: 内存性能是加速图形分析的关键瓶颈。现有的机器学习 (ML) 预取器在图形处理中遇到相变和不规则内存访问的挑战。我们提出了 MPGraph，这是一种基于 ML 的预取器，用于使用特定领域模型进行图形分析。 MPGraph 引入了三种新颖的优化：相变的软检测、用于访问增量和页面预测的特定于阶段的多模态模型以及用于预取控制的链式时空预取 (CSTP)。

items.title: Parallel Top-K Algorithms on GPU: A Comprehensive Study and New Methods.
items.abstract: The top-K problem is an essential part of many important applications in scientific computing, information retrieval, etc. As data volume grows rapidly, high-performance parallel top-K algorithms become critical. We propose two parallel top-K algorithms, AIR Top-K (Adaptive and Iteration-fused Radix Top-K) and GridSelect, for GPU. AIR Top-K employs an iteration-fused design to minimize CPU-GPU communication and device data access. Its adaptive strategy eliminates unnecessary device memory traffic automatically under various data distributions. GridSelect can process data on-the-fly. It adopts a shared queue and parallel two-step insertion to decrease the frequency of costly operations. We comprehensively compare 8 open-source GPU implementations and our methods for a wide range of problem sizes and data distributions. For batch sizes 1 and 100, respectively, AIR Top-K shows 1.98--21.48× and 8.01--574.78× speedup over previous radix top-K algorithm, and 1.44--7.34× and 1.38--31.91× speedup over state-of-the-art methods. GridSelect shows up to 882.29× speedup over its baseline.
items.abstract_zh: top-K问题是科学计算、信息检索等许多重要应用的重要组成部分。随着数据量的快速增长，高性能并行top-K算法变得至关重要。我们提出了两种用于 GPU 的并行 top-K 算法：AIR Top-K（自适应和迭代融合的 Radix Top-K）和 GridSelect。 AIR Top-K 采用迭代融合设计，最大限度地减少 CPU-GPU 通信和设备数据访问。其自适应策略在各种数据分布下自动消除不必要的设备内存流量。 GridSelect 可以即时处理数据。它采用共享队列和并行两步插入来降低昂贵操作的频率。我们针对各种问题规模和数据分布全面比较了 8 种开源 GPU 实现和我们的方法。对于批量大小分别为 1 和 100，AIR Top-K 比以前的基数 top-K 算法分别显示 1.98--21.48× 和 8.01--574.78× 加速，比最先进的方法显示 1.44--7.34× 和 1.38--31.91× 加速。 GridSelect 的速度比其基线提高了 882.29 倍。

items.title: DistTGL: Distributed Memory-Based Temporal Graph Neural Network Training.
items.abstract: Memory-based Temporal Graph Neural Networks are powerful tools in dynamic graph representation learning and have demonstrated superior performance in many real-world applications. However, their node memory favors smaller batch sizes to capture more dependencies in graph events and needs to be maintained synchronously across all trainers. As a result, existing frameworks suffer from accuracy loss when scaling to multiple GPUs. Even worse, the tremendous overhead of synchronizing the node memory makes it impractical to deploy the solution in GPU clusters. In this work, we propose DistTGL --- an efficient and scalable solution to train memory-based TGNNs on distributed GPU clusters. DistTGL has three improvements over existing solutions: an enhanced TGNN model, a novel training algorithm, and an optimized system. In experiments, DistTGL achieves near-linear convergence speedup, outperforming the state-of-the-art single-machine method by 14.5% in accuracy and 10.17× in training throughput.
items.abstract_zh: 基于内存的时态图神经网络是动态图表示学习的强大工具，并且在许多实际应用中表现出了卓越的性能。然而，它们的节点内存倾向于较小的批量大小，以捕获图形事件中的更多依赖关系，并且需要在所有训练器之间同步维护。因此，现有框架在扩展到多个 GPU 时会出现精度损失。更糟糕的是，同步节点内存的巨大开销使得在 GPU 集群中部署该解决方案变得不切实际。在这项工作中，我们提出了 DistTGL——一种在分布式 GPU 集群上训练基于内存的 TGNN 的高效且可扩展的解决方案。 DistTGL 相对于现有解决方案有三项改进：增强的 TGNN 模型、新颖的训练算法和优化的系统。在实验中，DistTGL 实现了近线性收敛加速，其准确率比最先进的单机方法高 14.5%，训练吞吐量高 10.17 倍。
